A friend at dinner said to me a couple months ago, "Thank you, Andrew. Thanks to you, I quit using Instagram."
"Really?" I responded. "What did I do?" I was a little concerned that I had done something odd or off-putting.
He said, "Well, I was posting pictures of food or my life all of the time and I got myself to 5,000 followers. It took a lot of effort and I was really proud. Then I looked at you and you had 500,000 followers. And I thought, 'What am I doing? I'm putting all of this effort into something that will never feel like enough.' So I quit. So thank you."
"You're welcome," I said, which was pretty easy since I hadn't actually done anything.
My friend is a suburban Dad with a steady job, so him posting to Instagram was just a random hobby. I feel like Instagram is a necessity if you're someone who is looking for a date or if you're a public personality.
I'm on social media a lot. It's something that I feel is part of my job; I'm trying to catalyze a movement or maybe just make people feel a little bit better about things. And at this point I have significant followings on most platforms, so it would feel like a gargantuan waste if I were to stop. My platforms each month have a reach of several million people.
That said, using them doesn't always make me feel great. And they can be a very big time and energy suck.
"Today, we are more likely to passively consume friends' life updates on things like Instagram Stories or a direct message which creates a lot of micro check-ins. But it decreases your likelihood of a deeper check-in or reconnect because you feel up to date. It's starting to substitute for committing time in real life," says Jules Terpak, a digital culture analyst who specializes in young people's use of social media. I interview Jules on the [podcast](https://substack.com/redirect/74eb1df5-e30e-49a4-8d91-85483b9cd2fc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) this week.
Perversely, social media could be leading to less getting together with friends. "Meta says that the average American has three friends but demand for fifteen. I feel like three friends sounds like a lot. A ton of people online wind up in parasocial relationships where it's not mutual, you don't actually know the person. If you live in a major city like New York, your online contacts are likely to roll through at some point. But if you live someplace more remote like where I grew up in rural PA that's not really the case," Jules observes. "So people might just stay at home and make 'friends' online whom they may never see."
This makes sense to me. As we move more of our socializing online, we feel connected without having to see the person. In my case, I know hundreds of people whom I have never met in person. Occasionally, I meet someone with whom I've been digitally connected for years and we're like, "Finally!!!" I am constantly getting some version of "Huh, you're ________ in person than I thought you were." The two words I get most often are "taller" and "nicer." I guess I seem shorter and meaner online?
The social media platform I use the most is X, formerly Twitter. It has gotten worse, and I now also post on [Bluesky](https://substack.com/redirect/77b463c2-f2ea-4ebe-a5c6-8847fc11cf77?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). I use Instagram for photos and events, and TikTok mainly for fun and to reach young people. I do have a staffer working to manage my online presence, so it's not always me doing the actual posting on some platforms.
Social media in general is driving us into online corners where we engage in clashes, some of which drive behavior in real life. I have met people who seem like lunatics online and they're 100 times better and more reasonable-seeming in person. I am wholly on board with Jonathan Haidt's _[Anxious Generation](https://substack.com/redirect/857cdc60-a514-4201-9b12-19f4fa529fed?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_ -message that we should restrict social media use for minors. I live in fear of my kids getting on social media when they hit that age group in a few years. I periodically go for nature walks to try and detox, often from something online.
One of our goals should be to get people out and about in real life. I read an [article](https://substack.com/redirect/185d6739-c560-4aff-b991-6ee8bb40090e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in the Atlantic that people don't party as much as they used to. I hosted an 'Offline' no-phones Party in Manhattan last week that drew 700 people; there's a real hunger for community and activity that translates out in to the real world. Concerts and live events are in demand right now, albeit overpriced.
TLDR: I am very online. I am deeply ambivalent about it. If you have an opportunity to unplug, take it. I'm going to be looking for ways to help us all unplug and look up.
For my interview with Jules Terpak click [here](https://substack.com/redirect/74eb1df5-e30e-49a4-8d91-85483b9cd2fc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). To see what Forward is doing in your area click [here](https://substack.com/redirect/e7e171fd-1017-49f6-bec8-36dd851518aa?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). To sign up for the next Offline event, click [here](https://substack.com/redirect/48ff060b-9eeb-4db2-9bac-dc38a3c0a028?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) - we will be taking them on the road.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/f13aec35-76c6-4793-9f0c-6a8c96fdcf07?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|

name: Team Freedom Virginia
subject: ⏰Primary Elections are TOMORROW 🗳️
body:
There's only ONE DAY until Virginia's June 17th Primary Election!
| | |
---
| |
---
| ⏰Primary Elections are TOMORROW 🗳️
---

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: I’m often asked this one question:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
Was it worth it? For the TRUTH - you bet!

[https://secure.winred.com/rudy-giuliani-freedom-fund-79a3adfa/238155c016f12e69/?utm_campaign=20250603&utm_medium=email&utm_source=RW_B&utm_content=MAWCO&utm_term=lrm-active]

Friend, over the course of the last two years, many friends and kind
souls have asked me if it was worth it.

Was it worth it to be relentlessly targeted by the Democrats’ Deep
State all because I defended our 45th and 47th President – Donald J.
Trump – from unimaginable and vicious witch hunts and refused to
disavow the truth?

These rabid leftists have labeled me a “DEAD MAN WALKING,” RAIDED
my home, ARRESTED me, took a MUGSHOT of me, forced me into BANKRUPTCY,
and even now, are _still_ attempting to throw me in PRISON for the
rest of my life, but the _TRUTH_ remains...

[https://secure.winred.com/rudy-giuliani-freedom-fund-79a3adfa/238155c016f12e69/?utm_campaign=20250603&utm_medium=email&utm_source=RW_B&utm_content=MAWCO&utm_term=lrm-active]
__

...Being an _enemy_ of the Deep State like President Trump is not
something to fear, _it’s a badge of honor – a sign that you were
willing to take the arrows for what you know is RIGHT!_

SO YES, FRIEND. FOR THE TRUTH, LIBERTY, AND JUSTICE – YOU BET IT WAS
WORTH IT.

When I look back at the past few years and all that the Radical
Democrats and the Biden-Harris _regime_ did to try and make an example
out of me, I have ZERO REGRETS.

My resolve _NEVER_ wavered, and that’s all thanks to you!

_Every step of the way I’ve fought with every fiber of my being –
supported by generous patriots like YOU._

BUT THERE IS ONE THING I MUST CONFESS: THROUGH EVERY SHAM INDICTMENT,
FALSE ARREST, AND BOGUS CHARGE WHERE I’VE HAD TO DEFEND MY INNOCENCE
AND GOOD NAME, I’VE BEEN SADDLED WITH ENORMOUS LEGAL BILLS,
UNIMAGINABLE COSTS, AND DEBTS.

And if we’re being honest with each other, it’s a cost I simply
cannot bear on my own.

Make no mistake, this was the vindictive Democrats’ plan all
along...

This latest sham criminal case in Arizona – where if the Democrat
Attorney General gets her way, I could take my last breath in prison
– is designed to bleed me dry.

THAT’S WHY I NOW HAVE NO CHOICE BUT TO SET A GOAL TO RAISE $100,000
THIS MONTH FOR MY LEGAL DEFENSE TRUST – THE RUDY GIULIANI FREEDOM
FUND – SO THAT I CAN CONTINUE FIGHTING TO REMAIN A _FREE_ MAN.

I hate reaching out like this, and this is difficult for me to say,
but right now, my fate is truly in _your_ hands.

PLEASE MAKE A GRASSROOTS CONTRIBUTION TO THE RUDY GIULIANI FREEDOM
FUND TO HELP ME RAISE THE $100,000 I NEED TO COVER THE COSTS TO
CONTINUE FIGHTING FOR MY FREEDOM AND JUSTICE AS THE DEMOCRATS TRY TO
JAIL ME FOR LIFE AS AN INNOCENT MAN.
[https://secure.winred.com/rudy-giuliani-freedom-fund-79a3adfa/238155c016f12e69/?utm_campaign=20250603&utm_medium=email&utm_source=RW_B&utm_content=MAWCO&utm_term=lrm-active]

__

name: AMAC Action
subject: President Trump only has 18 months.
body:
My friend, President Trump only has 18 months left until the midterm elections.

| |
---
| |
---
| |
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zvatpf9s8flkl2oac097gk0u1ncspvcgufemu5n8_rp22sh2s8i6epb0c1ie0pb4chh2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative, **[I’m writing to you today because I need your help to secure our elections once and for all and keep America on the path to greatness.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zo36r7ek9fhm62o0j136afd3rno928hbe51nmbbo_rp22sh2s8i6epb0c1ie0pb4chh2bs)** My friend, President Trump only has 18 months left until the midterm elections. **That’s 18 months to push through as much of his America First agenda as he can while we have a majority in the House and Senate.** I don’t mean to be pessimistic about our chances in the midterms. I’m just being a realist.Historically, the party not in the White House wins control of the House of Representatives in the midterms. That means, in just 18 months we could be right back where we started if young radicals like Hakeem Jeffries and Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez regain power and start blocking every one of our efforts. **[That’s why our election integrity efforts must be a priority right now._election integrity efforts_ must be a priority right now.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zu8h7b691orehb6qitusdq6jvf3m5oi0hio7l1g8_rp22sh2s8i6epb0c1ie0pb4chh2bs)**_If we can’t get the SAVE Act through the Senate...__ _ _If we can’t cement President Trump’s “Preserving and Protecting the Integrity of American Elections” executive order through legislation...__ __If we can’t stop non-citizens from being counted towards the apportionment of congressional seats and electoral vote counts..._ ...the Left will be free to use every dirty trick in the book for the midterms in 2026, the presidential election in 2028... and beyond.[**AMAC Action, will never give up. But my friend, as a strong conservative senior, we NEED you right there beside us.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z85da2b7cb074759qc0itudpt94itrkcp9v0fpr8_rp22sh2s8i6epb0c1ie0pb4chh2bs) My name is Rebecca Weber. I’m the chairwoman of AMAC Action. **AMAC Action****is****the most influential advocacy group in the country when it comes to standing for the values of conservative Seniors.** **We’ve got 72 chapters and 300 volunteer delegates, who are the “feet on the street” advocates who contact Members of Congress and state legislators in their district offices.****Moreover, our chapters and delegates help organize Town Hall meetings with elected officials and candidates to enable those locally of 2,000,000 AMAC members to meet, hear, and question them.** **And you should also know that we now have more than 337,000 AMAC members who respond to our “calls-to-action” and weigh in with members of the U.S. House and Senate, as well as their state legislators on the****is****sues.** Friend, with the support of patriotic seniors like you, in just the past few months AMAC Action has been able to:
---
** Hold 100 meetings with Congress -- this year alone! And send 40 Letters of Support on a variety of issues that are important to you including opposing benefits for non-citizens. ** Support President Trump’s executive order “Preserving and Protecting the Integrity of American Elections.” This order requires that all mail-in and absentee ballots be received by Election Day, directs the DOJ to enforce laws prohibiting noncitizen voting, and instructs federal agencies to maintain accurate voter rolls. ** Answer the call from Speaker Johnson to mobilize our supporters and get 7,000 messages sent to Congress to help get the SAVE Act passed in the House of Representatives. The SAVE Act ensures only American citizens vote in American elections.** Launch calls-to-action in individual states to stop illegal immigrants from voting. ** And unite thousands of Americans around our “BAN NONCITIZEN VOTING” petition drive that calls for an amendment to the United States Constitution that expressly forbids illegal aliens from voting and from being counted in the census that determines congressional seats and electoral votes.
---
All our work is made possible by brave AMAC Action patriots. But with the stakes higher than ever, we need every conservative freedom fighter standing with us.That means YOU, friend.**[That’s why I hope you’ll click this link to support AMAC Action during this critical time for your sacred vote.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zd52o0i318pc70uced85aakkdcsdjs6u24j2e7j0_rp22sh2s8i6epb0c1ie0pb4chh2bs)** We’ve got our work cut out for us as we fight to stop the 11.5 million illegals Joe Biden and Kamala Harris let into our country from:
---
* voting in our elections
* taking benefits reserved for you
* being counted the same as citizens when it comes to apportioning seats in the House of Representatives
* and being counted as citizens when it comes to giving states electoral votes.

---
Letting illegals change the balance of power in Congress and the electoral college means your vote may be fully **canceled out in all future elections**.The Left thinks they can pull a fast one on the American people.You, me and AMAC Action... we can’t let up for one minute. **[And that’s why I hope you’ll pledge your support for AMAC Action with your very best gift today.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z2hmnftmiuqc1n9ds1ro47gpph4196rb2lbe4h0g_rp22sh2s8i6epb0c1ie0pb4chh2bs)** AMAC Action is taking every step possible to secure our elections because no matter what issue you care about the most – inflation, crime, the 2nd Amendment, Social Security and Medicare solvency, even the right to life......if you and I don’t have a vote... none of it matters. **[That’s what makes your best gift to AMAC Action so important today.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z5mr4fdjlc72s0ri7aecbrv7u4h8mrls0pu3pf5g_rp22sh2s8i6epb0c1ie0pb4chh2bs)** So whatever critical amount you decide to return to help us secure our elections and your vote, please respond as soon as possible. We have an ambitious battle plan for the rest of the year—but first I must know that we have the resources to make it happen.I look forward to your response.
---
| | For Freedom,
---
**Rebecca Weber,_Chairwoman_****AMAC Action**

[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zfhlbdp4d1vvrfaemkafoabsbqith521mvhqipvg_rp22sh2s8i6epb0c1ie8ob2cph2bs)

| | Dear Fellow Conservative, **[I’m writing to you today because I need your help to secure our elections once and for all and keep America on the path to greatness.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zh7htgrr9evgm7gf0kkb441ubo7kbgmlfv982ts8_rp22sh2s8i6epb0c1ie8ob2cph2bs)** My friend, President Trump only has 18 months left until the midterm elections. **That’s 18 months to push through as much of his America First agenda as he can while we have a majority in the House and Senate.** I don’t mean to be pessimistic about our chances in the midterms. I’m just being a realist.Historically, the party not in the White House wins control of the House of Representatives in the midterms. That means, in just 18 months we could be right back where we started if young radicals like Hakeem Jeffries and Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez regain power and start blocking every one of our efforts. **[That’s why our election integrity efforts must be a priority right now._election integrity efforts_ must be a priority right now.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zshpc2ljl0h9faqqcbuj9ma6amfhbchl0jtdvck0_rp22sh2s8i6epb0c1ie8ob2cph2bs)**_If we can’t get the SAVE Act through the Senate...__ _ _If we can’t cement President Trump’s “Preserving and Protecting the Integrity of American Elections” executive order through legislation...__ __If we can’t stop non-citizens from being counted towards the apportionment of congressional seats and electoral vote counts..._ ...the Left will be free to use every dirty trick in the book for the midterms in 2026, the presidential election in 2028... and beyond.[**AMAC Action, will never give up. But my friend, as a strong conservative senior, we NEED you right there beside us.**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zn1l1v29n7844cii5p57kouomi629bg82rfi3veg_rp22sh2s8i6epb0c1ie8ob2cph2bs) My name is Rebecca Weber. I’m the chairwoman of AMAC Action. **AMAC Action****is****the most influential advocacy group in the country when it comes to standing for the values of conservative Seniors.** **We’ve got 72 chapters and 300 volunteer delegates, who are the “feet on the street” advocates who contact Members of Congress and state legislators in their district offices.****Moreover, our chapters and delegates help organize Town Hall meetings with elected officials and candidates to enable those locally of 2,000,000 AMAC members to meet, hear, and question them.** **And you should also know that we now have more than 337,000 AMAC members who respond to our “calls-to-action” and weigh in with members of the U.S. House and Senate, as well as their state legislators on the****is****sues.** Friend, with the support of patriotic seniors like you, in just the past few months AMAC Action has been able to:
---
** Hold 100 meetings with Congress -- this year alone! And send 40 Letters of Support on a variety of issues that are important to you including opposing benefits for non-citizens. ** Support President Trump’s executive order “Preserving and Protecting the Integrity of American Elections.” This order requires that all mail-in and absentee ballots be received by Election Day, directs the DOJ to enforce laws prohibiting noncitizen voting, and instructs federal agencies to maintain accurate voter rolls. ** Answer the call from Speaker Johnson to mobilize our supporters and get 7,000 messages sent to Congress to help get the SAVE Act passed in the House of Representatives. The SAVE Act ensures only American citizens vote in American elections.** Launch calls-to-action in individual states to stop illegal immigrants from voting. ** And unite thousands of Americans around our “BAN NONCITIZEN VOTING” petition drive that calls for an amendment to the United States Constitution that expressly forbids illegal aliens from voting and from being counted in the census that determines congressional seats and electoral votes.
---
All our work is made possible by brave AMAC Action patriots. But with the stakes higher than ever, we need every conservative freedom fighter standing with us.That means YOU, friend.**[That’s why I hope you’ll click this link to support AMAC Action during this critical time for your sacred vote.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zmjeoft1s2loqo95npd03guo0gbehu7gmv8j9pp0_rp22sh2s8i6epb0c1ie8ob2cph2bs)** We’ve got our work cut out for us as we fight to stop the 11.5 million illegals Joe Biden and Kamala Harris let into our country from:
---
* voting in our elections
* taking benefits reserved for you
* being counted the same as citizens when it comes to apportioning seats in the House of Representatives
* and being counted as citizens when it comes to giving states electoral votes.

---
Letting illegals change the balance of power in Congress and the electoral college means your vote may be fully **canceled out in all future elections**.The Left thinks they can pull a fast one on the American people.You, me and AMAC Action... we can’t let up for one minute. **[And that’s why I hope you’ll pledge your support for AMAC Action with your very best gift today.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z9sb092r273ih3vn6gm232em30h7u42obip9t8i8_rp22sh2s8i6epb0c1ie8ob2cph2bs)** AMAC Action is taking every step possible to secure our elections because no matter what issue you care about the most – inflation, crime, the 2nd Amendment, Social Security and Medicare solvency, even the right to life......if you and I don’t have a vote... none of it matters. **[That’s what makes your best gift to AMAC Action so important today.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zj0f5ervdd2b7lvkv4f7ard40hs6bbco732lfrpg_rp22sh2s8i6epb0c1ie8ob2cph2bs)** So whatever critical amount you decide to return to help us secure our elections and your vote, please respond as soon as possible. We have an ambitious battle plan for the rest of the year—but first I must know that we have the resources to make it happen.I look forward to your response.
---
| | For Freedom,
---
**Rebecca Weber,_Chairwoman_****AMAC Action**
---
| [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zh9ivq4lr862cc0gqrn6keqcqau9188acoar7gq0_rp22sh2s8i6epb0c1ie8ob2cph2bs)
---
| | P.S. [**To secure our elections and your vote once and for all please click this link or the button below to make your critical gift today.**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z4rbjjrcr02f7trhed80pq2rjghqkr6pmctqbb78_rp22sh2s8i6epb0c1ie8ob2cph2bs) My friend, YOU are the difference between success and failure.
---
[ **SUPPORT AMAC ACTION** ](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zam757p2nvsqqhka4qp5oetolh8rr822eln4tdt0_rp22sh2s8i6epb0c1ie8ob2cph2bs)

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: America First agenda in peril: the Senate must act NOW
body:
Urge your senators to confirm nominees, strengthen the Big Bill, and pass the Rescission package to save taxpayer dollars!
| | | |
---
|
---
| Patriot-

---
| **** ****The rescission package has successfully passed the house, which means our focus is now on the Senate, and after **the Left 's protests against the America First agenda this past Saturday, it's especially important to inundate Senate offices with phone calls showing support for our agenda.** In addition to their protests, left-wing groups are driving hundreds of calls to vulnerable Senate Republicans multiple times per week urging them to oppose the One, Big, Beautiful Bill and the rescission spending cuts. In the face of this opposition, we need your help to push the pro-America First side front and center. **ACTION:** Use our [**easy-call action page**](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb9794ac0109ab/1edb9794ac002811) to make your calls to both of your U.S. Senators. We have a script you can use, and we've included the messages below as well.
1. The Senate must get to work and confirm the nearly **100 presidential nominees who are still pending**!
2. **Tell your senators it 's imperative that they strengthen the One, Big, Beautiful Bill and pass it right away.** These are the key changes needed to make it stronger:
* **Eliminate all of the Green New Deal/Inflation "Reduction" Act spending; **especially the wind and solar tax credits that drain taxpayers pockets, sends jobs to China, and threatens national security.
* **Do away with the $1,000 new taxpayer-funded entitlement for babies, or at least revise it so that the money doesn 't come from taxpayers.**
* **Leave the State and Local Tax (SALT) cap untouched. **
3. **Now is the time to cut waste fraud and abuse through the rescission package.** Tell your U.S. Senators to pass this bill and support saving taxpayer dollars! This bill aims to codify DOGE cuts and lead into more cuts later this summer. This is how we keep Democrats from using the filibuster to stop real spending cuts.

__ **__****__****__****__** __ **__** **** ************
---
| | [ TAKE ACTION ](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb9794ac0109ab/1edb9794ac002813)
---
| **** ******************Then share this call to action with others!** That's it! It's super easy and will take you less than 5 minutes total to ensure that your senators know that their constituents support America First. If you aren't calling, then the only voices they're hearing are from the Left and they will think they should oppose President Trump's agenda. Don't let that happen! In liberty, Jenny Beth Martin __ **__****__****__****__** __ **__** **** ************
---

name: Board President David Canepa
subject: There’s More Work Ahead — Join Me in What’s Next
disclaimer_text: Paid for by David Canepa for Supervisor 2024, ID# 1399463**
body:
| | | | [ ](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=3d8da62747&e=c0babbc643)
---
| | | Dear Friend, I hope this note finds you well, and that your summer is off to a great start! As I reflect on my work serving San Mateo County, I am grateful for your continued support in helping me achieve so much for our community. Together, we’ve worked to address critical priorities like public safety, housing affordability, the environment, enhancing children, and saving family services. ** [David Canepa — Donate via ActBlue](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=28b116c64a&e=c0babbc643)** While my current role has allowed me to make a meaningful impact, I know there is still more work to be done. As I look toward the future and the opportunities ahead, I would love to have your continued support. Your encouragement, ideas, and generosity have always been invaluable, and they will continue to help create a better future. ** [David Canepa — Donate via ActBlue](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=75277f2a85&e=c0babbc643)**

I am eager to hear what’s most important to you as we continue working to make San Mateo County a place we are all proud to call home.

In friendship,

David Canepa
Board President, San Mateo County

name: Karrin Taylor Robson
subject: URGENT: Hobbs Blocks Bill to STOP China
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KARRIN FOR ARIZONA
body:
Hobbs just vetoed a bill to block China from buying Arizona land.

[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zmki9t2lk59fts3vpi2r2p6073pkgl17mdq5073o_rp22sh2s8i6epb0c1ie4pj0c3h2bs "Karrin for Arizona")

**

Patriot,

**
We should be putting America **FIRST**. **NOT** the Chinese Communist Party.

But Katie Hobbs? **She has other plans.**

🚨 [This week, Hobbs **VETOED** a common-sense bill that would’ve **BLOCKED** foreign adversaries like Communist China from **buying up** Arizona land.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z938s0krerotb2j7v8arihf77q06knkttjf9fv38_rp22sh2s8i6epb0c1ie4pj0c3h2bs)

**Let that sink in.**

➡ The CCP is circling our farmland.
➡ They’re buying up land near military bases.
➡ And they’re embedding themselves deeper into our state’s economy.

And Hobbs just gave them the green light.

This isn’t leadership. This is a total failure of priorities.

Patriot—national security is **NON-NEGOTIABLE.**

Yet time after time, Hobbs chooses her radical donors, foreign interests, and D.C. elites over Arizona families.

First, she **VETOED** crucial election integrity legislation.

Now, she’s paving the way for the CCP to seize Arizona land.

I’ve had enough.

That’s why I’m running—to finally deliver **STRONG** leadership that puts Arizona **FIRST**.

✅ Secure our border
✅ Protect Arizona’s land from foreign adversaries
✅ Defend election integrity
✅ Grow jobs & rebuild our economy

But I cannot do this without YOU.

The Radical Left and their dark money allies have already poured **MILLIONS** into Arizona to keep Hobbs in power.

Now my primary is just around the corner, and the clock is ticking.

This is our moment to take Arizona back.

[**Will you stand with me and send a message that Arizona is NOT for sale?**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zk1ac7n70qnlqf2r2gaipi0gc52pfv99gh8vf62o_rp22sh2s8i6epb0c1ie4pj0c3h2bs)

[RUSH A DONATION & HELP DEFEAT HOBBS](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z6p4on8uu7jbuko258q1p08f8kc3ch6obr7b3jtg_rp22sh2s8i6epb0c1ie4pj0c3h2bs)

Let’s show the Left that Arizona belongs to Arizonans, not the CCP.

For America & Arizona,
Karrin Taylor Robson
[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zvh68ug1o82da5ltaut8mpoll0qnfo8d2khk7pfg_rp22sh2s8i6epb0c1ie4pj0c3h2bs)

name: Stand with Gov. Newsom! (via VPP)
subject: Newsom: “Arrest me, let’s go.”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
Trump is taking political theater to new heights.
| **THE GOOD NEWS:** Gavin Newsom is FIGHTING BACK against Trump’s _ridiculous_ act of _political theater_ in California! ⬇️ [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/91177?t=6&akid=20234%2E878179%2E-N81q9) **THE BAD NEWS:** _Trump is threatening to ARREST GAVIN NEWSOM!_

[**25,000 DEMOCRATS NEEDED ⚠️ We need EVERY Democrat reading this to take _immediate_ action and sign our letter to STAND WITH GAVIN NEWSOM. We can’t afford inaction, friend — not when the stakes are this high: Add your name by midnight »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/91177?t=7&akid=20234%2E878179%2E-N81q9) | [**SIGN MY NAME: STAND WITH GAVIN NEWSOM »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/91177?t=8&akid=20234%2E878179%2E-N81q9)
---
TO: Governor Gavin Newsom
FROM: A grateful Democrat
Subject: Thank you for taking a stand. **Dear Governor Newsom,

Thank you for standing up for our democracy and the will of the people against Donald Trump’s _extremist political theater_ in California.**

You are bravely risking everything — even arrest — to stand up for the American people, and we’re extremely grateful.

**As Trump resorts to POLITICAL THEATER to threaten and intimidate Americans,_your resilience is needed now more than ever._**

I’m sick and tired of the GOP letting Trump do whatever he pleases — so I’m doing everything in my power to protect Democrats like you who are brave enough to face Trump head-on and risk MAGA revenge.

[**I know you’re facing relentless attacks from Trump and his MAGA minions, so I’m signing this thank you letter and chipping in $3 to the Voter Protection Project to help Democrats keep fighting for justice »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/91177?t=9&akid=20234%2E878179%2E-N81q9) | [**Donate $3 to sign now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/91177?t=10&akid=20234%2E878179%2E-N81q9)
---
[](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/91177?t=11&akid=20234%2E878179%2E-N81q9)
**_X A proud Democrat_**
\- The Voter Protection Project
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=20234%2E878179%2E-N81q9). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=20234%2E878179%2E-N81q9).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=20234%2E878179%2E-N81q9) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=12&akid=20234%2E878179%2E-N81q9). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=20234%2E878179%2E-N81q9)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=20234%2E878179%2E-N81q9)

clean_body: Fund free pro-bono support for clinics | Peter— Right now, we are up against unprecedented attacks on reproductive rights in the United States. People are being denied access to basic health care, clinics and providers are being threatened, and lives are at stake. Without your support, countless clinics would be forced to close—and the people who rely on them would lose access to essential care. | "$35 = $105" "$75 = $225" "$100 = $300" "$250 = $750" "MATCH YOUR GIFT 3X" Every dollar you give will be amplified and with so much at stake, every single gift counts. From day one of this second administration, President Trump has been targeting birth control, medication abortion, and abortion clinics. And every step of the way, the Center has been there to provide clinics and providers with the legal and advocacy support they need to keep their doors open and their medical care accessible... "DEFEND REPRO RIGHTS" Onward, Center for Reproductive Rights P.S. The second Trump administration has been one red flag after another. "DONATE NOW" | | | | ---|---|--- The Center for Reproductive Rights uses the power of law to advance reproductive rights as fundamental human rights around the world. name: Sign Your Name | Left Action
subject: Congress members need increased security. Tell Republican leaders to stop blocking it
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Congress members need increased security. Tell Republican leaders to stop blocking it](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td7ef53f6-043e-4296-b385-6c6bde2ba3a7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T31dd91cd-4c60-449d-b1d0-82004af0a2a6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | The recent shootings of Democratic elected officials in Minnesota once again show why Democratic officials in particular desperately need increased protection from potential attackers. Not just in the Capitol, but at home, on the road, etc. **But Republican leaders in Congress[aren't doing a damn thing to make this happen](https://default.salsalabs.org/Teeeb3717-b0dd-41d8-88ca-b33b4d45f7e3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9), even though some of their own party members are calling for it.** On a near daily basis, Democratic members of Congress are subject to hate mail, death threats, and actual assaults. Potential attackers are spurred on by violent rhetoric from Trump and other Republicans, and by open GOP support for violence -- the January 6th criminals, the thugs who tried to kill Governor Gretchen Whitmer of Michigan, and the hammer attack on Nancy Pelosi's husband. Instead of being outraged by these attacks, Republicans laugh at them, and egg them on. And Republican Congressional leaders are STILL not taking action to provide protection. They are horrible people, who are using the threats for their own political purposes. [**Enough is enough. Tell Republican leaders to act NOW and take the steps necessary for increased security for members. **](https://default.salsalabs.org/T442cc31d-76a5-4ed9-8d5b-c7fe5f22784e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | | | | | The recent shootings of Democratic elected officials in Minnesota once again show why Democratic officials in particular desperately need increased protection from potential attackers. Not just in the Capitol, but at home, on the road, etc. But Republican leaders in Congress, even though some of their own party members are calling for it. On a near daily basis, Democratic members of Congress are subject to hate mail, death threats, and actual assaults. Potential attackers are spurred on by violent rhetoric from Trump and other Republicans, and by open GOP support for violence -- the January 6th criminals, the thugs who tried to kill Governor Gretchen Whitmer of Michigan, and the hammer attack on Nancy Pelosi's husband. Instead of being outraged by these attacks, Republicans laugh at them, and egg them on. And Republican Congressional leaders are STILL not taking action to provide protection. They are horrible people, who are using the threats for their own political purposes. | | | | | | | Thank you, Left Action | | | | | | Other things you can do: Follow us on * Follow Us | | LeftAction Washington, District of Columbia info@leftaction.com | Having trouble viewing this email? | | | or

name: Pete Buttigieg
subject: We cannot afford to lose Jon Ossoff’s leadership in the Senate.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jon Ossoff for SenateThis email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail
body:
#

[
---
Peter — it’s Pete Buttigieg. We are living through a time in the life of our country when freedom itself is on the line — and few races will test that more directly than Jon Ossoff’s re-election campaign in Georgia. **I’ll share more in a moment. But if you believe, as I do, that hope can be the consequence of action, one meaningful step you can take today is to support Jon’s campaign using this link:** [**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ossoff-em-june25?refcode=Pete**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-june25.2OdyOr&refcode=em250616-1-subs&t=2&akid=470%2E5691347%2ETuxos2) Right now, the same forces working to consolidate total power in Washington have made Jon their top Senate target. They’re prepared to spend whatever it takes to replace Jon with someone who will help them undermine the freedom of working people. They need to replace Jon with one more Senate enabler of this administration’s abuses of power. Let’s be clear about what that means. When the tools of government are used to make people more afraid, more angry, and more alone — it’s serving the opposite of the government’s true purpose. A well-run government enhances freedom — from fundamental freedoms like the right to speak your mind, to the economic freedoms that come from access to health care, and an affordable everyday life for your family. That’s the kind of freedom Jon Ossoff stands for. And he represents the kind of leadership we cannot afford to lose in the Senate. **Jon’s election couldn’t be more important: There is no path to retaking the Senate that doesn’t run through Georgia.** The consequences of this election won’t just be felt in Washington or even Georgia — they’ll show up across America in the lives of people who need their government to stand up for their freedom, not take it away. I don’t say this lightly, and I wouldn’t ask if it weren’t urgent. This is one of those moments that will define what comes next: for Jon’s campaign, for Georgia, and for our country. And it’s going to take all of us. [**That’s why I’m asking: Would you please join me in supporting Jon Ossoff’s re-election campaign by making a donation of any amount today?**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-june25.2OdyOr&refcode=em250616-1-subs&t=3&akid=470%2E5691347%2ETuxos2) Gratefully, — Pete

Email is a critical way to keep up with Jon and his work in the US Senate, but you can click [here](https://act.electjon.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=470%2E5691347%2ETuxos2) if you'd like to unsubscribe.

body:
I refuse to back down | [ ](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=623f408b584c49d9b4cebee1b0e7ed18&_e=J4ghqJrkV3PpzKFyxWoHBvpFMUCJeCH-JtJQzevzSVtizkz1DkbR0t3WhyTaJpglSiq2IoYzXPZvtqMt8qYL2-vWWP5t3fE2vzYWcWZs2wkOdH49_9xzInFu-mCepfTzw-PfjfFdWZi-lcXAGgyyZImTYcwMaux3ehh5zScRbsYxkc6MrdkhoepeVpokl4BJd3Qgwz1EX9Id40Ib2DrW2TIefrdnD4L85Tm44shuff5if3WwpbL4JGRoN1uFo4SmHnCM6_vKNXJnr8fGMui1LqZHwWQm8MKamnFc4IlZ8RHxJLpZ-NCLXX-mCBEOFuqbHrRZhOtahNlDRg89vFgABtHfarxBiHiYMVKTsLEK8pHsg8Li1U9XGHIdVcZOw7s61FzC5R4zQIP55Pp6P-Y9D0Rfe3ry9Agb2pk-2Tn_p5ichual90S7nhw2Ruon-fg96Z5lm6TPje3s2Y3YDr-U7LCHXcPHXLkqF2klabQ0oaMr9a-jxayTobl8Ds5El559VVz_Y_ukHOrJ7MGqIzS9xtASpFbPv750ehlXVYHRCIRlIv0UIyYY_u0LlEjyknMZ)
---

Peter,

**The Democrats BLOCKED my bill, The Protection of Women and Girls in Sports Act, in the Senate. Even 79% of Americans, regardless of Party, believe men don’t belong in women’s sports.**

These sorts of political games make me sick.

We had this bill on the goal line and were inches away from the endzone, but the Radical Left is standing in our way. The Democrats in D.C. can’t stand common sense.

I’m reaching out to ask for your support within the next five minutes to keep our fight alive. I refuse to back down and with your support we can continue to fight to protect women and girls across the country.

Since then, we’ve already seen COUNTLESS examples of biological men competing and dominating in women’s sports, most recently in California when a transgender took home first place in the State Championship Track and Field Meet.

Meet Coach Tuberville:

**Coach Tuberville was born in Camden, Arkansas, the third of three children of Olive and Charles Tuberville. College Football’s 2004 Coach of the Year and two-time SEC Coach of the Year, Tommy Tuberville is most often recognized for his success on the field. But it is the legacy of his father, a highly decorated WWII veteran and Purple Heart recipient, that motivates Coach Tuberville to give back to the brave men and women of the United States Armed Forces.

In 1989 Coach Tuberville met his future wife, Suzanne Fette, at the Sugar Bowl in New Orleans. They were married in 1991 and have two boys, Tucker and Troy, who continue to make their dad proud.

In his career as a College Football Coach, Tommy started a long and successful career at the University of Miami, starting as a graduate assistant and rising to the Hurricanes' defensive coordinator. He led the Canes to three AP national championships and coached future Hall of Famers Ray Lewis and Warren Sapp, as well as Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson.

In 1998, Coach Tuberville was announced as the next head coach for the Auburn Tigers. Tuberville’s time at Auburn was a success by any measure, as the Tigers captured eight consecutive bowl appearances, including five New Year’s Day bowl appearances, five SEC Western Division titles, one SEC Championship, and a 13-0 season in 2004, after which Coach Tuberville was once again named the AP’s SEC Coach of the Year. For his efforts during the perfect 2004 season, Tuberville would be named Paul “Bear” Bryant Coach of the Year, Associated Press Coach of the Year, Walter Camp Coach of the Year, Sporting News Coach of the Year, and AFCA Coach of the Year, among others.

_In 2020, Coach Tuberville became Senator Tuberville, winning his election to represent all Alabamians in the United States Senate with the full support of President Trump. Since then, he's supported President Trump's America-First policies while fighting off the Radical Left. In his first term as Senator, Tommy was one of eight Republicans to vote against certifying the 2020 election, has been a strong pro-life advocate, and called out Democrats for being pro-crime.

Now, Coach Tuberville is running for Governor so he can continue representing Alabamians and Americans in his homestate of Alabama. The Radical Left thinks they can flip Alabama blue and turn it into the California of the South. Can he count on your support? _

Hi Peter,

As abortion bans swept the nation after the fall of _Roe v. Wade_ , there is only one remaining safe haven state for abortion access in the South: **Virginia.**

The Trump administration has already announced federal policies that put women’s lives and well-being in danger, so we will be looking to state governments to defend us. This year, all eyes are on Virginia’s elections as the state currently has an extremely slim 1-vote margin in favor of abortion access in its legislature. We’re writing today because **Virginia’s primary elections are happening _TOMORROW._**

[**We need to move quickly: Help our qualified endorsed candidates reach as many voters as possible BEFORE TOMORROW by rushing a split contribution of $20.25 or more today →**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hbm-va/?refcode=EM_F_250616VAprimary_N_CD_NO_10_NG_N_L1&amount=20.25) **Here is a look at our endorsed candidates who will be in the most consequential races on Tuesday:

✅ Lt. Gov. candidate Ghazala Hashmi** – Senator Hashmi helped draft Virginia’s constitutional amendment protecting safe and legal abortion, and served as a Chief Co-Patron for the legislation. **She is the _only woman_ in a seven-candidate primary, and is the most experienced legislator in the race.**

**✅ May Nivar** – Running for a seat that has been named the TOP pickup opportunity for securing a pro-choice majority in Virginia. Her opponent, the Republican incumbent, passed zero bills during his 2025 legislative session, and an independent analysis by the Virginia Public Access Project found him to be the least effective legislator in Virginia.

He has said he would like to see abortion become illegal in Virginia and has repeatedly voted against commonsense gun safety policies, paid medical leave, lower prescription drug costs, and more...

**✅ Shannon Jones** – Running for Commonwealth Attorney – Newport News, VA. It has been 35 years – more than 3 DECADES – since Shannon’s incumbent opponent has even had to campaign/appeal to voters. No one has run against him in 35 years! Shannon is highly qualified to take on his position, **and is the first woman to be listed as a candidate on the ballot for the job.**

With reproductive healthcare access under dire threat, a Republican frontrunner for Governor who wants to ELIMINATE abortion access in the state, and a 1-vote margin in the State Legislature, **_the stakes could not be higher._**

[**These candidates are facing competitive primaries TOMORROW and, in many cases, are falling behind their male opponents in fundraising. Help ensure these candidates have the funds they’ll need to reach voters in these final hours by rushing a split donation immediately.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109678844/551880999/892077722?refcode=EM_F_250616VAprimary_N_CD_NO_10_NG_N__L2&amount=20.25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjI1YzdhZTFlLWI4NGEtZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ApVeweI0tqNZzCyZXoze9P-wg1s-Fq7phwEyaoWzTJE=)

body:
| | |

| Friend,
This weekend, Donald Trump was humiliated:

---
| | [](https://wep8ryhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001OSrctfrUGLwZPO-ra6Q9qZkBok1IYzhJyuAfDNJdJxeK5Y9DAQlRUFq2RaMOrFjdCXIypQ4zAmDtAmar9bYh3EO5qsfxHWZx3rDOCmlKFiUtYtA9SOBvx6iT3rOdSZKASbYWfzl5IlmMl9aNXNm5OXgHHZxyfM9qpLIQk2HMT2XTJ8NO8eEvBlTj-TEokywBJ-w_qTI1tEDaMZJ84OlH7u3XySrIVYp9DZwrhO1Zc2o=&c=slCFRBipN3LA1yz3LCjIl5k6MQCDYQft-Xig68ykFFgD9jAZFx_7GQ==&ch=0d2zLnXbmXGj9tvQhY3wb3ZkwPrq6vpJwiI4_qXkoLzQ1VcF262lww==)
---
Trump is handling this exactly how you would expect him to - externalizing his insecurity and massively compensating. In an unhinged rant on social media last night, he announced he is sending militarized ICE thugs to terrorize communities in more Democratic-run cities after being absolutely embarrassed this weekend:
---
| [](https://wep8ryhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001OSrctfrUGLwZPO-ra6Q9qZkBok1IYzhJyuAfDNJdJxeK5Y9DAQlRUFq2RaMOrFjdCXIypQ4zAmDtAmar9bYh3EO5qsfxHWZx3rDOCmlKFiUtYtA9SOBvx6iT3rOdSZKASbYWfzl5IlmMl9aNXNm5OXgHHZxyfM9qpLIQk2HMT2XTJ8NO8eEvBlTj-TEokywBJ-w_qTI1tEDaMZJ84OlH7pJYtuiyBbwqyfRFTx1A5y4=&c=slCFRBipN3LA1yz3LCjIl5k6MQCDYQft-Xig68ykFFgD9jAZFx_7GQ==&ch=0d2zLnXbmXGj9tvQhY3wb3ZkwPrq6vpJwiI4_qXkoLzQ1VcF262lww==)
---
Trump can't handle opposition or criticism. He wants so badly to be a "beloved" dictator who can do whatever he wants while the people begrudgingly praise him out of fear of government retaliation. Admiration is all he desires, he does not care about the constitution and rule of law or the wellbeing of America. Last week, a federal court ruled that Trump's seizure of the CA National Guard was illegal, giving command back to Governor Newsom. Trump's expansion of ICE operations is likely a ploy to provoke more chaos nationwide - pretext to invoke the Insurrection Act and the ability to deploy the US military in Democratic-run cities all across America using emergency powers. That way, he can force Democrats to praise him at gunpoint. The only thing stopping Trump from becoming a full-blown dictator are our courts. That's why Defend Our Courts is working non-stop to help Dem supreme court justices in key swing states where Trump is attempting to replace them with MAGA loyalists who will let him act as a dictator and rig elections in his favor - like in the upcoming Pennsylvania 2025 supreme court retention election that we are preparing for. BREAKING: Last night authorities caught and arrested Vance Boelter in Green Isle, MN. Boelter is the terrorist accused of murdering both MN State Representative Melissa Hortman and her husband, and wounding both MN State Senator John Hoffman and his wife. Despite being armed and dangerous, Boelter was arrested alive and unharmed. He now faces four counts of second-degree murder.
Let's be very clear: Vance Boelter is a fascist right-wing extremist who spewed anti-Muslim hatred, admired InfoWars, voted for Donald Trump, and kept a literal kill list of at least 60 people targeting Democratic lawmakers and abortion care providers. By every legal and moral definition, he is a domestic terrorist. And yet, after committing this gruesome, politically motivated mass shooting--he was arrested without incident. No knee on the neck. No seven bullets in the back. No fear for officer safety. No "he matched the description." Just a calm, controlled, peaceful arrest.
As Paul Mooney reminds us, it must be nice to have the complexion for protection. **Let 's Address This.**

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/c0dff7cc-3cbe-4310-8802-4cfbf9c7ec98?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Accused mass murderer Vance Boelter was caught and arrested last night.
### When the Law Protects Some but Endangers Others
I want to be absolutely clear: I don't _want_ police to kill guilty people either. I want due process for _everyone_ --because that's what a functioning democracy demands. I do find it deeply troubling, enraging even, that police seem to always summon superhuman restraint when the suspect is white, armed, and deadly, but seem to forget it for Black people. Where was that restraint for Philando Castile? For George Floyd? For Breonna Taylor?
Boelter is a mass murderer. He assassinated elected officials. He had a hit list targeting Democratic lawmakers, reproductive justice providers, and even Governor Tim Walz and Congresswoman Ilhan Omar. His own best friend confirmed he is a far-right extremist who would be "deeply offended" if called a Democrat. [Boelter consumed hours of InfoWars conspiracy theories and proudly voted for Donald Trump](https://substack.com/redirect/f52ec584-dca0-4101-a5b9-ab17c1d316c2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). He traveled as a mercenary to Gaza and Africa. He wasn't a lone wolf--he was a product of violent propaganda and a culture of impunity for white supremacist violence. Yet he enjoys the benefit of being calmly arrested, alive and unharmed, while innocent Black children like Tamir Rice and Aiyana Jones are killed by police under false pretenses.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..slUim3hjqqcRLczuHvvrlJ5q4-i-ZxP2JFHur4I8iXA?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=166045499)
### So Why Was He Charged With Second-Degree Murder?
I've already received this question from dozens of people. As of now, Boelter is facing four charges of second-degree murder--two for the killings, and two for the injuries. In Minnesota, first-degree murder requires an indictment by a grand jury and proof of premeditation. Second-degree murder, on the other hand, can be charged more immediately and does not require proving premeditation, only intent. Prosecutors likely wanted to move quickly to get the warrant, make the arrest, and ensure Boelter was in custody before he could harm anyone else. I believe they absolutely did the right thing to ensure they can get this murderer off the streets as quickly as possible. Indeed, the charges against him can, and likely will, still be amended.
And let's not ignore the fact that these are state charges. Trump cannot pardon Boelter. Yes, we're in such a dangerous place in our democracy that we have to point that out--but here we are.
### Call It What It Is: Terrorism
Moreover, in a just world, Boelter should face terrorism charges.The FBI defines terrorism as "the unlawful use of violence against persons to intimidate or coerce a government or population for political objectives." Vance Boelter meets every aspect of that definition. Yet, will he be charged with terrorism? I won't hold my breath. Compare his case to Luigi Mangione--an alleged killer currently facing terrorism charges for supposedly targeting a corrupt health insurance CEO. If Mangione fits the bill, then Boelter _absolutely_ does.
A little reported fact is that Boelter and his wife Jenny have a private security firm with a history of serving as a mercenary in Gaza and parts of Africa. This isn't an irrelevant footnote--it's an urgent wake-up call. When we ignore injustice abroad, it _always_ finds its way home. U.S. militarism, white supremacist violence, Islamophobia, and authoritarianism are not isolated issues. They are all interwoven strands of the same toxic ideology. It is also unclear what role, if any, Jenny Boelter played in this mass murder? She was just stopped by law enforcement with a car full of cash, firearms, and passports. She is not currently detained. Contrast this lenience with the cruelty of ICE raiding, arresting, and deporting US citizens of Latino backgrounds, and you began to understand the meaning of having the complexion for protection.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/0b55d623-11ae-4519-af70-b55ffbfd819b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Jenny Boelter
Boelter's case is a sobering reminder that the DHS, FBI, and hundreds of police departments warn that [white supremacist violence is the greatest domestic terror threat in the United States](https://substack.com/redirect/87e61cd1-2c84-413f-b46a-11664aa3cb6c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). This fact makes it that much more critical that Boelter and any accomplices he may have face meaningful accountability and terrorism charges.
### Final Thoughts
I'm grateful Boelter was arrested before he could harm anyone else. But no arrest can bring back Rep. Hortman or her husband. No court ruling can undo the trauma Sen. Hoffman and his wife now carry. What we _can_ do is fight like hell to make sure this never happens again. That means naming the violence, refusing to normalize it, and holding our institutions accountable.
It means rejecting the idea that white killers deserve peace while Black and brown people must beg for breath. It means standing for justice--even when it's inconvenient, uncomfortable, or unpopular.
As this case develops I will continue to provide updates grounded in facts and receipts. Join our efforts. Subscribe. And let us continue speaking truth to power.

I want due process for everyone --because that's what a functioning democracy demands. I do find it deeply troubling, enraging even, that police seem to always summon superhuman restraint when the suspect is white, armed, and deadly, but seem to forget it for Black people. Where was that restraint for Philando Castile? For George Floyd? For Breonna Taylor? Boelter is a mass murderer. He assassinated elected officials. He had a hit list targeting Democratic lawmakers, reproductive justice providers, and even Governor Tim Walz and Congresswoman Ilhan Omar. His own best friend confirmed he is a far-right extremist who would be "deeply offended" if called a Democrat. . He traveled as a mercenary to Gaza and Africa. He wasn't a lone wolf--he was a product of violent propaganda and a culture of impunity for white supremacist violence. Yet he enjoys the benefit of being calmly arrested, alive and unharmed, while innocent Black children like Tamir Rice and Aiyana Jones are killed by police under false pretenses. So Why Was He Charged With Second-Degree Murder? I've already received this question from dozens of people. As of now, Boelter is facing four charges of second-degree murder--two for the killings, and two for the injuries. In Minnesota, first-degree murder requires an indictment by a grand jury and proof of premeditation. Second-degree murder, on the other hand, can be charged more immediately and does not require proving premeditation, only intent. Prosecutors likely wanted to move quickly to get the warrant, make the arrest, and ensure Boelter was in custody before he could harm anyone else. I believe they absolutely did the right thing to ensure they can get this murderer off the streets as quickly as possible. Indeed, the charges against him can, and likely will, still be amended. And let's not ignore the fact that these are state charges. Trump cannot pardon Boelter. Yes, we're in such a dangerous place in our democracy that we have to point that out--but here we are. Call It What It Is: Terrorism Moreover, in a just world, Boelter should face terrorism charges.The FBI defines terrorism as "the unlawful use of violence against persons to intimidate or coerce a government or population for political objectives." Vance Boelter meets every aspect of that definition. Yet, will he be charged with terrorism? I won't hold my breath. Compare his case to Luigi Mangione--an alleged killer currently facing terrorism charges for supposedly targeting a corrupt health insurance CEO. If Mangione fits the bill, then Boelter absolutely does. A little reported fact is that Boelter and his wife Jenny have a private security firm with a history of serving as a mercenary in Gaza and parts of Africa. This isn't an irrelevant footnote--it's an urgent wake-up call. When we ignore injustice abroad, it always finds its way home. U.S. militarism, white supremacist violence, Islamophobia, and authoritarianism are not isolated issues. They are all interwoven strands of the same toxic ideology. It is also unclear what role, if any, Jenny Boelter played in this mass murder? She was just stopped by law enforcement with a car full of cash, firearms, and passports. She is not currently detained. Contrast this lenience with the cruelty of ICE raiding, arresting, and deporting US citizens of Latino backgrounds, and you began to understand the meaning of having the complexion for protection. | | ---|---|--- Jenny Boelter Boelter's case is a sobering reminder that the DHS, FBI, and hundreds of police departments warn that . This fact makes it that much more critical that Boelter and any accomplices he may have face meaningful accountability and terrorism charges. Final Thoughts I'm grateful Boelter was arrested before he could harm anyone else. But no arrest can bring back Rep. Hortman or her husband. No court ruling can undo the trauma Sen. Hoffman and his wife now carry. What we can do is fight like hell to make sure this never happens again. That means naming the violence, refusing to normalize it, and holding our institutions accountable. It means rejecting the idea that white killers deserve peace while Black and brown people must beg for breath. It means standing for justice--even when it's inconvenient, uncomfortable, or unpopular. As this case develops I will continue to provide updates grounded in facts and receipts. Join our efforts. Subscribe. And let us continue speaking truth to power. Quick Ask! I am doing everything in my power to stave off fascism in the United States, and I need your support. Subscribe and join more than 133,000 fellow activists. | | ---|---|--- Quick Ask! I am doing everything in my power over the next four years to stave off fascism in the United States, and I need your support.Become a paid subscriber and join the movement.** | | | | | | | (C) 2025 Qasim Rashid, Esq. 1552 South Route 59 #1333 Naperville, IL 60564 ? ?

Former Navy SEAL Rep. Eli Crane **[clashed with a woke professor with a bad attitude](https://substack.com/redirect/00e16f09-812e-4861-9658-d1746cd46a06?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** over labeling Republicans vs Democrats as "stochastic terrorists," or individuals who incite violence through inflaming rhetoric.
Crane did not like this guy one bit...
[Click To Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/00e16f09-812e-4861-9658-d1746cd46a06?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/00e16f09-812e-4861-9658-d1746cd46a06?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"My question is this," Crane started. " You are extremely critical of republicans through what you call 'stochastic terrorism,' inciting terrorism through volatile rhetoric, but when democrats incite violence you seem to be a little bit silent,... My colleague who just left, Dan Goldman, said 'Trump is dangerous to democracy and has to be eliminated,' did you speak out or criticize Mr. Goldman when he said that?"
"I never heard that quote," the witness, Dr. Kurt Braddock said.
Crane continued to read off **[examples of Democrats using inflammatory language to call for aggressive or violent actions](https://substack.com/redirect/00e16f09-812e-4861-9658-d1746cd46a06?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** to be taken against republicans.
"How about this one, President Biden, who said 'we gotta lock him up' or that Trump was a 'threat to democracy' right before numerous assassination attempts, did you say anything about that one?"
"No that wouldn't meet my threshold," Braddock answered, before claiming that President Trump has met his criteria for a "stochastic terrorist" in the past.
**["I'm gonna tell you something right now, this is why Americans](https://substack.com/redirect/00e16f09-812e-4861-9658-d1746cd46a06?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** have such a hard time with censorship coming from guys like you, who call balls and strikes only on one side of the aisle and then they won't do it on the other side!" Crane went off at the professor.
Watch the tense exchange here:
[Click To Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/00e16f09-812e-4861-9658-d1746cd46a06?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

President Trump has been pushing the limits on what is possible. I haven't seen anything like this since President Ronald Reagan.

# _Must see headlines of the morning:_
## Trump cranks up deportations in America's major cities following nationwide protests and riots
President Donald Trump **[ordered ICE to expand mass deportation efforts](https://substack.com/redirect/35f48ef4-cce0-4967-a8d6-a824d972a450?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** in major cities like LA, Chicago, and New York.
* **In a Sunday Truth Social post,** the president directed immigration officers to intensify detention and deportation operations in what he called "America's largest cities" where "millions upon millions of illegal aliens reside."
"Our Nation's ICE Officers have shown incredible strength, determination, and courage as they facilitate a very important mission, the largest Mass Deportation Operation of Illegal Aliens in History," Trump wrote. "Every day, the Brave Men and Women of ICE are subjected to violence, harassment, and even threats from Radical Democrat Politicians, but nothing will stop us from executing our mission, and fulfilling our Mandate to the American People."
* **The order came after a week of nationwide anti-ICE protests that turned violent in some cities** \- While most demonstrations remained peaceful, riots erupted in places like Los Angeles and Portland, with violence injuring law enforcement and protesters, including a fatal shooting of an innocent bystander in Salt Lake City during a Saturday protest.
* **Trump accused Democratic cities of using illegal immigrants to expand their voter base and "cheat in elections"** \- The president claimed these cities represent "the core of the Democrat Power Center" where officials use undocumented immigrants to grow the welfare state and rob jobs from "hardworking American citizens."
* **The administration has faced criticism for separating families despite promises to prioritize criminals** \- While Trump pledged to focus on criminal illegal aliens, critics allege the raids are targeting non-criminal workers and separating families, with LA Mayor Karen Bass warning that "entire sectors of our economy cannot function without immigrant labor."

* * *
## Suspected Minnesota assassin arrested after unprecedented manhunt
Vance Boelter, 57, is accused of killing a Minnesota House speaker and her husband and wounding another Democratic lawmaker and his wife **[was captured Sunday](https://substack.com/redirect/1bbe7c6e-d5cf-434c-ad2e-64d694187260?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** after what police called the largest manhunt in state history, ending a two-day search involving more than 20 SWAT teams.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/1bbe7c6e-d5cf-434c-ad2e-64d694187260?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **More than 20 SWAT teams searched for Boelter** across multiple counties before he "verbally identified himself" and "crawled to law enforcement teams" in Sibley County, ending a two-day search involving helicopters and officers from multiple agencies.
* **Boelter allegedly killed House Speaker Melissa Hortman and her husband, then shot Senator John Hoffman and his wife** \- The attacks occurred early Saturday morning, with Boelter first allegedly shooting the Hoffmans around 2:05 a.m. in Champlin (both survived), then killing the Hortmans about 90 minutes later in Brooklyn Park while impersonating a police officer in tactical gear.
* **Police found an extensive arsenal and hit list in Boelter's possession** \- Authorities discovered three AK-47 assault rifles, a 9mm handgun, a ballistic vest, police-style badge and lights, plus a list containing names and addresses of other public officials, suggesting he may have planned additional attacks.
* **Boelter faces four felony murder charges with bail set at $5 million** \- He's charged with two counts of second-degree murder for the Hortmans' deaths and two counts of attempted second-degree murder for shooting the Hoffmans, with each charge carrying a maximum 40-year sentence and mandatory minimum of three years due to firearm use.

* * *
## Netanyahu claims Iran behind Trump assassination attempts
Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu **[claimed Sunday that Iran was behind both assassination attempts against President Donald Trump](https://substack.com/redirect/d91d72c9-c30b-41c8-a816-7da990d62b6d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** during the 2024 campaign, telling Fox News the attacks were carried out "through proxies" and intelligence operations.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/73d32d29-2724-4dc5-a016-7e8d21ab02f6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* **American security agencies have never officially tied the assassination attempts to Iran** \- While Netanyahu made the explosive claim, U.S. intelligence has not confirmed Iranian involvement in either the Butler, Pennsylvania shooting by Thomas Matthew Crooks or the golf course incident with Ryan Routh, though federal authorities did accuse an Iranian agent of recruiting someone to surveil and potentially assassinate Trump.
* **Trump survived two close calls during his 2024 campaign, calling one a "miracle"** \- The former president narrowly escaped death when a bullet clipped his ear at a Butler rally in July, with Trump saying he's "not supposed to be here," while a second attempt occurred at his golf club in September when Routh was arrested with a semi-automatic rifle.

"This is why Americans have such a hard time with censorship coming from guys like you!!" | | | Jun 16 | | | | | | | | | | | | Former Navy SEAL Rep. Eli Crane over labeling Republicans vs Democrats as "stochastic terrorists," or individuals who incite violence through inflaming rhetoric. Crane did not like this guy one bit... "My question is this," Crane started. " You are extremely critical of republicans through what you call 'stochastic terrorism,' inciting terrorism through volatile rhetoric, but when democrats incite violence you seem to be a little bit silent,... My colleague who just left, Dan Goldman, said 'Trump is dangerous to democracy and has to be eliminated,' did you speak out or criticize Mr. Goldman when he said that?" "I never heard that quote," the witness, Dr. Kurt Braddock said. Crane continued to read off to be taken against republicans. "How about this one, President Biden, who said 'we gotta lock him up' or that Trump was a 'threat to democracy' right before numerous assassination attempts, did you say anything about that one?" "No that wouldn't meet my threshold," Braddock answered, before claiming that President Trump has met his criteria for a "stochastic terrorist" in the past. have such a hard time with censorship coming from guys like you, who call balls and strikes only on one side of the aisle and then they won't do it on the other side!" Crane went off at the professor. Watch the tense exchange here: | | ---|---|--- What we are seeing right now is truly historic. President Trump has been pushing the limits on what is possible. I haven't seen anything like this since President Ronald Reagan. But with this unbelievable push for an American First agenda, comes a few problems. Well, as President Trump said in a recent interview I had with him... "There could be a little disruption. What we're doing is building a foundation for the future." If you want to learn more about , go ahead read this that just went up. It's filled with some valuable information about what's in store for America, and what we could potentially be up against. Yours Truly, SEAN HANNITY | | ---|---|--- Must see headlines of the morning: Trump cranks up deportations in America's major cities following nationwide protests and riots President Donald Trump in major cities like LA, Chicago, and New York. In a Sunday Truth Social post, the president directed immigration officers to intensify detention and deportation operations in what he called "America's largest cities" where "millions upon millions of illegal aliens reside." "Our Nation's ICE Officers have shown incredible strength, determination, and courage as they facilitate a very important mission, the largest Mass Deportation Operation of Illegal Aliens in History," Trump wrote. "Every day, the Brave Men and Women of ICE are subjected to violence, harassment, and even threats from Radical Democrat Politicians, but nothing will stop us from executing our mission, and fulfilling our Mandate to the American People." The order came after a week of nationwide anti-ICE protests that turned violent in some cities \- While most demonstrations remained peaceful, riots erupted in places like Los Angeles and Portland, with violence injuring law enforcement and protesters, including a fatal shooting of an innocent bystander in Salt Lake City during a Saturday protest. Trump accused Democratic cities of using illegal immigrants to expand their voter base and "cheat in elections" \- The president claimed these cities represent "the core of the Democrat Power Center" where officials use undocumented immigrants to grow the welfare state and rob jobs from "hardworking American citizens." The administration has faced criticism for separating families despite promises to prioritize criminals \- While Trump pledged to focus on criminal illegal aliens, critics allege the raids are targeting non-criminal workers and separating families, with LA Mayor Karen Bass warning that "entire sectors of our economy cannot function without immigrant labor." Suspected Minnesota assassin arrested after unprecedented manhunt Vance Boelter, 57, is accused of killing a Minnesota House speaker and her husband and wounding another Democratic lawmaker and his wife after what police called the largest manhunt in state history, ending a two-day search involving more than 20 SWAT teams. | | ---|---|--- More than 20 SWAT teams searched for Boelter across multiple counties before he "verbally identified himself" and "crawled to law enforcement teams" in Sibley County, ending a two-day search involving helicopters and officers from multiple agencies. Boelter allegedly killed House Speaker Melissa Hortman and her husband, then shot Senator John Hoffman and his wife \- The attacks occurred early Saturday morning, with Boelter first allegedly shooting the Hoffmans around 2:05 a.m. in Champlin (both survived), then killing the Hortmans about 90 minutes later in Brooklyn Park while impersonating a police officer in tactical gear. Police found an extensive arsenal and hit list in Boelter's possession \- Authorities discovered three AK-47 assault rifles, a 9mm handgun, a ballistic vest, police-style badge and lights, plus a list containing names and addresses of other public officials, suggesting he may have planned additional attacks. Boelter faces four felony murder charges with bail set at $5 million \- He's charged with two counts of second-degree murder for the Hortmans' deaths and two counts of attempted second-degree murder for shooting the Hoffmans, with each charge carrying a maximum 40-year sentence and mandatory minimum of three years due to firearm use. Netanyahu claims Iran behind Trump assassination attempts Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu during the 2024 campaign, telling Fox News the attacks were carried out "through proxies" and intelligence operations. American security agencies have never officially tied the assassination attempts to Iran \- While Netanyahu made the explosive claim, U.S. intelligence has not confirmed Iranian involvement in either the Butler, Pennsylvania shooting by Thomas Matthew Crooks or the golf course incident with Ryan Routh, though federal authorities did accuse an Iranian agent of recruiting someone to surveil and potentially assassinate Trump. Trump survived two close calls during his 2024 campaign, calling one a "miracle" \- The former president narrowly escaped death when a bullet clipped his ear at a Butler rally in July, with Trump saying he's "not supposed to be here," while a second attempt occurred at his golf club in September when Routh was arrested with a semi-automatic rifle. * PolitiBrawl is a reader-supported publication. clean_body: Peter, I'm going to cut out the B.S. and get right to the point. > Do you want to see Democrats outraise Republicans, giving them a free pass to buy the 2026 election? > Do you want to see Democrats pass Articles of Impeachment ending Trump's Presidency? If your answer is no to either of those questions, Senate Democrats are waging an unprecedented, multi-million-dollar deception campaign to derail Trump's Presidency and end his America First movement. If they flip this seat and the Senate Majority, they'll have the votes to execute their plan. Support from grassroots Republicans like you Peter, is integral to fighting back against the lies Democrats are circulating on social media and the mainstream press. Thank you, Steve Daines | Paid for by the NRSC. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. |

**The Democrat Machine didn 't just win here - they infiltrated.** Big city Liberals in Denver have pushed the state to the brink. They flooded it with out-of-state cash overnight, pushed open-border policies, legalized hard drugs, and turned our schools into a petri dish of the woke mind virus. And by the time Conservatives were ready to fight back...

It was far too late. Now, they're using Colorado as a blueprint on how to take over Conservative states.

But here's the cold truth: If we lose the House in the Midterms, the Democrats will finish what they started.

They'll Californi-cate every red state on the map.

They are already laying out the battlefield - pouring MILLIONS into red districts and targeting local races, school boards, and sheriff offices.

They don't need to flip the whole country overnight. **They just need to catch us sleeping - creep up slowly, flip a few key seats, and let the Democrat Machine do the rest.**

clean_body: threw everything I had into a horse trailer and drove East to Washington, DC. I didn't have connections or a polished resume. No job waiting for me. But I had grit, conviction, and a deep belief in the promise of America. My name's Jeff Crank. I was born about a mile above sea level in Pueblo, Colorado and raised on God, family, and country. I remember when Colorado was a Conservative state - pro-family, pro-military, pro-America. I was damn proud of it. The Democrat Machine didn 't just win here - they infiltrated. Big city Liberals in Denver have pushed the state to the brink. They flooded it with out-of-state cash overnight, pushed open-border policies, legalized hard drugs, and turned our schools into a petri dish of the woke mind virus. And by the time Conservatives were ready to fight back... It was far too late. Now, they're using Colorado as a blueprint on how to take over Conservative states. But here's the cold truth: If we lose the House in the Midterms, the Democrats will finish what they started. They'll Californi-cate every red state on the map. They are already laying out the battlefield - pouring MILLIONS into red districts and targeting local races, school boards, and sheriff offices. They don't need to flip the whole country overnight. They just need to catch us sleeping - creep up slowly, flip a few key seats, and let the Democrat Machine do the rest. That's why I'm emailing you today. body:
Please take 1 second to read.

| | | | | “Due to increased threats to federal law enforcement officers and federal buildings, approximately 700 active-duty U.S. Marines from Camp Pendleton are being deployed to Los Angeles to restore order.”
“We have an obligation to defend federal law enforcement officers - even if Gavin Newsom will not.”
\- Pete Hegseth

---

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zag2qik5cdgkkldfgif866m9dhsq6lbvnvmtpr1g_rp22sh2s8i6epb0c1ieepr6cth2bs)

**While Gavin Newsom lets California burn and innocent Americans suffer, President Trump and Pete Hegseth are doing all that they can to stop it.**
**The sad truth is** : Democrats don’t give a damn about the consequences of their own actions.
They’ve let illegal immigrants run wild, major cities collapse, and now American taxpayers are footing the bill.
The only thing standing in their way are active duty Marines, who have been deployed to stop the chaos.
