name: Jeff Jackson
subject: Another win in court
body:
And - no new A.I. laws for 10 years?

| |
---|---|---
| | | Forwarded this email? [Subscribe here](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9qZWZmamFja3Nvbm5jLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.W8vIMLRbaDzXITbOl0QYGy6wC_RSfFO3H5PEIdR8NtM?) for more
---
# [Another win in court](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1145021&post_id=166070709&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY2MDcwNzA5LCJpYXQiOjE3NTAwODQ3MzcsImV4cCI6MTc1MjY3NjczNywiaXNzIjoicHViLTExNDUwMjEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.gv5v-bqcVEw0VVfgc1w3_HmTOtnLouIhI1QfYG7X33E)
### And - no new A.I. laws for 10 years?
| | [Jeff Jackson](https://substack.com/@jeffjacksonnc)
---
| Jun 16
---
| [](https://substack.com/@jeffjacksonnc)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1145021&post_id=166070709&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY2MDcwNzA5LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc1MDA4NDczNywiZXhwIjoxNzUyNjc2NzM3LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMTE0NTAyMSIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.20DeVa8kVo9scHl-NDTkxR6Tl6OSfPWp0WwZ78gSU4Y&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1145021&post_id=166070709&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY2MDcwNzA5LCJpYXQiOjE3NTAwODQ3MzcsImV4cCI6MTc1MjY3NjczNywiaXNzIjoicHViLTExNDUwMjEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.gv5v-bqcVEw0VVfgc1w3_HmTOtnLouIhI1QfYG7X33E&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1145021&post_id=166070709&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY2MDcwNzA5LCJpYXQiOjE3NTAwODQ3MzcsImV4cCI6MTc1MjY3NjczNywiaXNzIjoicHViLTExNDUwMjEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.gv5v-bqcVEw0VVfgc1w3_HmTOtnLouIhI1QfYG7X33E)
---
| | [](https://substack..r1r7lEcaqeXX19k1FWSYjnv2Sl0gq4Gpzi9xzzzOikg?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/jeffjacksonnc/p/another-win-in-court?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

A few weeks ago, I was with my son at a go-kart track when my phone rang.
It was an AG from another state. I picked up and he quickly said, "You need to read page 276 of the House bill that just dropped."
He was talking about the gigantic, 1,000-page budget bill that is still consuming D.C.'s attention.
It turns out, a few short paragraphs were wedged in there - Section 43,201 - that could wipe out years of consumer protection laws in states across the country.
Here's the key line:
"[N]o State or political subdivision thereof may enforce, during the 10-year period beginning on the date of the enactment of this Act, any law or regulation limiting, restricting, or otherwise regulating artificial intelligence [models]."
In plain English, this means that no state can pass or enforce any A.I. consumer or voter protection laws **for the next 10 years.**
But what if your state already has those laws on the books?
This provision would seek to ban them.
That means existing laws that block A.I.-generated deepfakes designed to mislead voters, or that prevent scammers from digitally cloning your voice to fool your family, or that ban mass robocalls generated by language models could all potentially get nixed.
Now, the argument _in favor_ of this idea is basically that, instead of having 50 different states go in 50 different directions, Congress should create one national set of safeguards.
I get that. There's a case for it.
But here's the problem: **Congress won 't do it.**
They didn't do it with the internet, or privacy, or social media - not even to protect kids.
I was in Congress - _last year_. I watched many thoughtful, bipartisan A.I. bills get filed. Some had overwhelming support and were laser-focused on protecting consumers.
None of them passed. They were all dead on arrival.
And now Congress is saying, "_We know we know we know -_ but this time, we're gonna do it."
The thing is, there's an easy fix here. All they have to do is pass a bill putting up some A.I. safeguards for consumers and voters _before_ they pass a bill that tries to ban all of ours, and then they'll have a strong position.
But until then, these are massive dice to roll. We all know this technology is going to get exponentially more powerful over the next decade and the thought of having _zero safeguards_ in place for that entire period is truly unnerving.
That's why 40 attorneys general - including members of both parties - signed a letter opposing it.
I also made a video addressing Congress directly about this. **[Here](https://substack.com/redirect/2541b85d-a325-4a81-a895-dd5215affd36?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** it is:
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/03749cf7-7066-4716-b8a0-46d2024ca86c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
### **Another win: Americorps**
Last time you heard from me, I told you we were filing a lawsuit against the federal administration after it attempted to unlawfully defund AmeriCorps.
Why?
Because Congress authorized AmeriCorps funding, and the executive branch cannot unilaterally cut it.
Moreover, it would have hit western North Carolina especially hard as it's rebuilding from Hurricane Helene. AmeriCorps has a strong presence there.
Well, we just won an injunction to stop those cuts from happening. That's good news for WNC.
### **Supreme Court Investiture**
Finally, I had the wonderful opportunity to play a small, formal role in the investiture of our newest state Supreme Court Justice, Allison Riggs.
It was my honor to report to the full court that Justice Riggs had been duly elected and is prepared to take the oath of office.
She then took that oath, and took her seat with her fellow Justices.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/c5f70deb-2507-4569-8afe-e08654490740?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Best,
Jeff Jackson

Dear Friend of Liberty,

It's time for merit to make a comeback.

[That’s why I’m writing to ask you to participate in Hillsdale College’s **DEFEAT DEI SURVEY**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/fVg3ZlaOqJeoH0MuoBz-ewqUc_x1p0Qqls5EbY8nBKS6zj8B_O_YI_jF0ufS7Eb1msl9Xu7EsL392jwN6JUVdaohV0-hgJgwit41fD0yqs3_cZt0Zo3a4gV-poOY-iJH_hF3D4DC1eHXd3kx9TomvcUcrZERgwY5tchFv0TsfQW09u7fWZq0j50JMQo1Z3yGukW520KZ770vfzoOhu1aSCjNAH-kdcefJF-Tk8CS8QiH6NrsYT5rDBk1KrypKs4e-iJXlwpfeLIdsRTJQcXCg7TCLzJo48SruzmcrvWvSteIk6y9j-JSasVLNcqpdb42-4ztOXHqMUTIP678gI0Xp3iMe51hZ5G7f7Aim-pg03MZTmbn0M-14dEz_KkmO3Rc2tkmnrK0qFDd2W9_9k520knNxdpxhpBkziy555EjrGsQaK68sBuIU2tadKMHg0aQDlMptx-tgyEU5p6WYt5nTy16BS9hmJkIHIOyMly-UIe4lfZ5aujwsAMpyzIicTOkgVrvT8tamjgcPXSKS-UPzE3DGqSxMHZpSUpqoJJIGzadt9bvoMM3ZsWC6PkpOmK04zm6XEqQrTRi-3qlLUHMVKQuJdOGqgVVwQjyFgmugtPDabxRTuMA8nXYh_COs-g6dsi3xuN_VM04gkjxYAlYGlf7PEUGwdmLBrADINNZirBMGIcBRkc9FgGBmTZQME5xWGlw64qdnw/59NVUOJhWnCj0ihESeT4g77Bsw0ZJa_l/10).

Like many Americans, I'm sure you're all too aware of the damage that has been done to our country by policies implemented in the name of "Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion" or "DEI."

Race grifters and hustlers make _millions_ perpetuating DEI lies, including...

* America is a nation built on slavery, not freedom.
* All racial disparities are indisputable evidence of systemic racism--and if you question this conclusion, you must be a racist.
* Students in K-12 schools can be divided into oppressors and oppressed based on their skin color.

DEI policies have infected almost every aspect of American life, from K-12 schools to college admissions and job applications. They have even spread into the hard sciences and the military.

These policies endanger lives and, ultimately, Western Civilization itself.

I'm sure, like a lot of Americans, you want to know what you can do to stop DEI. One of the most fundamental steps is ...

**Countering the far-Left ideologies that are being taught to students in K-12 schools, colleges, and universities.**

Hillsdale College, where I am president, is engaged in a nationwide fight on the battlefield of education to save young Americans from this anti-American agenda.

Since our founding in 1844, we have offered "sound learning" of the kind needed to preserve "the inestimable blessings of civil and religious liberty."

To do this work well, we need a clear understanding of **what informed Americans like you think about DEI and how best to fight it.**

So please share your views by completing the **DEFEAT DEI SURVEY** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few moments of your time.

Your completed survey will help us to develop the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty.

As you might know, Hillsdale College refuses to accept any government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations.

**We remain true to our original mission, even as many other colleges and universities have rejected their founding statements and embraced radical and dangerous ideologies.**

Please join Hillsdale College in our defense of Western Civilization by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the **DEFEAT DEI SURVEY** , which you can access at this secure link:

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/defeat-dei-survey**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/GX_6kf3rVWKfPANzjyWl_t7mhBIXRX4z4ohau2e8ieLf4tEXIDEdGPL06cRMFzXl8eh0HsUf897JB8T6-19NL9aAs3o15V3dLDTgQwdudSvsrQ4uFhgbC1SVXIckIK4PyKNQRsXtovrTOA3-XJe9lLmYfNC_jH04nWTUsSMSVM_0C_w3iP32aSloy7XEUUyWYuVwCeLy7WdMxeZIY147uFywhIVomBp26u3g0dbLIXUs03nJf67IDhbFOyhTO1wwWGaJz7tBST8BmHiZ-mDeV3Zihq8GFIAyL73DYKWkunhj_zp872QRCssFLScKdf-fIhphzFuSDrsKqlel7pX0CFm0dmv_teXIH57UR9mrMCMqEIJdwAMCSXfdokTDFbi2QHZirjOCTceoYrI9kZEg4BVJcAlh7_tSKM2ySqR7Lp-lhTPhhHV-PTEhH3TFM3lWYHIZnowo5gv0LUJMzoNKGzKJ2NrX2rlQA9wILOUKaU7MAF-qPt67tAKB_jDsL-NIffXtuehFokkURPgawD2cEDt76Z-HJxMB9Gxf2ctpibdkhG3dHOHGPaRJhdtVxgfuOXbJPXTHQ0GytVyc6qtnbphsNlqbiDIi7F-5EGOIz5oI6F_7PeOza3_wOuY-oN15BInGkzRok575oJ9BhYFyrBpR3nrQSZtirFRsfStPSmPcqlUAtlPHrF27PQ-0_NwZE2utAzm8Eg/e4Qp4ll9Zus1jGn6rhO0S8ts6N2mdT6C/10)

With your help, we will continue our work to defeat the tyranny of low standards and to restore excellence in America.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

P.S. Please fill out your **DEFEAT DEI SURVEY** today. Your answers will help us to defend excellence and merit against the tyranny of DEI. Today, DEI affects almost every aspect of American life. This endangers lives and, ultimately, Western Civilization itself.

You can take your survey at the secure link below. It will only take a few moments of your time.

[https://info.hillsdale.edu/defeat-dei-survey](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/rQCt7I9RyZRE96JQMAASuvMJYFjcgpoJPIkyyn43h_rf238IBdIDtIAPIZYZqpXf53y6-eOGGP0XutlLS7aWZ8FeTvLwgJd4i_W80oJ-JeSPII3cmY2yS5GyCsu2iiHEf5zx4KBQDcPGo2O6cQr2bRmnWI4qVKRPDEQNelGJH2vPU34MXHZMs8v56z8ne51TDlys17F9GaxLHqmEuxwXcPSFXjlYucwxOcVd9GTYDv9raTT4IxMlI3cIlnWIUdFnX7QWrsWP-cU-XGUBovkBSvaqpBpV7i0CRAZ9efr11eBn8pqNzMsJS1fv6QqBG0CtEad1a-ljXcMhLPysaub-7Eg2SehJL3y9akhPz4YN7pqAabtPcpnMPqvOkDggJW0LYE4-xKQ_j9HJQHQ4_O1126ue9m9jjVng7OLzc384WowD6YVPH6UOwWzLognILrdu48hT4VdCUWTmIWIG2pAco0lCHVmWSbmhz3aYm94BiYwpCyG7cYQPE-TOoFuxRmrZezI26ELbn1GLP0WL3hrcSDTTFWz4n100kDKn-RLIIV-Zd47mO6eZGezgQ97iSPaGMshGqiDR2zTxUpI_3EqwcjQ6RGobisdo_t8ZPD9ityGoQJqhU6oLaNL6cblo9wtb8jS7E4mFRzCnJLoYenQNIWvWKwP8ELYs4ek7OSdiXxtjicGfHG_oJs81-XmCJo7RNwo-0KKHeQ/qVsxt05bFv9ymWY2t77Y-ww4I9bq_SRg/10)

Thank you!

subject: Absurd.
body:
Friend, the latest dark money attack ad against Marcy is full of outrageous lies. Here's the truth:

| |
---
Friend, Marcy has spent her whole career standing up for Social Security, Medicare and Medicaid, and fighting for lower prescription drug costs for Ohioans. **Dark money groups can't attack her on that record, so they've resorted to lying. And the latest claims are absurd.** The newest attack ad claims Marcy "voted against funding Social Security and Medicare" — but the vote it cites had nothing to do with those programs. It goes on to claim Marcy "rubber stamped the Biden Pill Penalty." That's their way of saying she _voted to lower prescription drug prices, a bill which has already saved Americans $1.5 billion in out-of-pocket drug costs._ Friend, these lies are absurd and shameless. But they're also backed by $7 million in dark money, which makes them dangerous. We need your support to fight back and set the record straight. **[Can we count on you to chip in any amount right now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109683038/551894736/1039792322?refcode=250614_HQ_absurd_l1&ms=250614_HQ_absurd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZTAzYzIyMC1iZTRhLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kCtftsE1N7zm1uXrq3c9Fu-nwCord-Ls7geHEmsF634=)** | [Give $25 >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109683046/551894743/1039792322?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=250614_HQ_absurd&ms=250614_HQ_absurd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZTAzYzIyMC1iZTRhLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kCtftsE1N7zm1uXrq3c9Fu-nwCord-Ls7geHEmsF634=) | [Give $50 >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109683047/551894744/1039792322?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=250614_HQ_absurd&ms=250614_HQ_absurd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZTAzYzIyMC1iZTRhLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kCtftsE1N7zm1uXrq3c9Fu-nwCord-Ls7geHEmsF634=)

clean_body: Friend, the latest dark money attack ad against Marcy is full of outrageous lies. Here's the truth: | | Friend, Marcy has spent her whole career standing up for Social Security, Medicare and Medicaid, and fighting for lower prescription drug costs for Ohioans. Dark money groups can't attack her on that record, so they've resorted to lying. And the latest claims are absurd. The newest attack ad claims Marcy "voted against funding Social Security and Medicare" — but the vote it cites had nothing to do with those programs. It goes on to claim Marcy "rubber stamped the Biden Pill Penalty." That's their way of saying she voted to lower prescription drug prices, a bill which has already saved Americans $1.5 billion in out-of-pocket drug costs. Friend, these lies are absurd and shameless. But they're also backed by $7 million in dark money, which makes them dangerous. We need your support to fight back and set the record straight. = | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately. Thank you, friend. — Team Kaptur HQ | | | ---|---|--- About Marcy Kaptur Marcy Kaptur is a fighter for high-wage jobs, growing a workforce to meet the needs of the 21st century, and protecting our region’s most vital natural resource, the Great Lakes. She’s worked with both parties to secure investments in our communities and has been a true friend of veterans, seniors, first responders and working people. She’s a voice for us all in the People’s House. | = | = ---|--- Follow Marcy | | ---|--- Checks may also be mailed to: Kaptur for Congress - PO Box 899, Toledo, OH 43697 Paid for by Kaptur for Congress Email is a critical way to stay in touch with our supporters, but if you wish to unsubscribe, you may do so . clean_body: | | | Dr. Oz, Trump’s head of the Centers for Medicare and Medicaid Services and a quack , told Fox News that individuals must "prove that they matter" to retain their Medicaid benefits. This was his attempt to justify the devastating cuts in Trump’s “Big, Beautiful Bill” which would kick millions of people off of Medicaid, but instead he unmasked the regime’s heartless perspective that only those deemed economically profitable are worthy of support. At Able Dems, we are resolute in our mission to elect Democrats with disabilities and allies who recognize that human worth transcends economic output. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. Such a perspective is not only cruel but fundamentally opposed to the ideals of inclusion and equality that we hold dear. This is not just an affront; it's an alarming attempt to commodify human worth. In a truly civil society, every individual possesses inherent value—this is not a privilege to be earned or demonstrated. Our community is at stake, as these policies threaten the well-being of millions, including the most vulnerable among us.** Join us in rejecting an ideology that undermines the dignity of those who need help the most. Together, we can forge a future that values compassion and inclusivity. Thank you for your unwavering support. -Able Dems | elects Democrats with disabilities. We fight to protect accessible voting, expand health care and Social Security, and equality for all. To donate by check, send to: Able Dems PAC c/o Pocketbook Strategies 1110 N Virgil Ave #375 Los Angeles, CA 90029 \- \- Paid for by Able Dems PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions or gifts to Able Dems PAC are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. | | Sent via . name: Democrats.org
subject: Fwd: I’d love to meet you, Derek.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, **[www
body:
We wanted to make sure you didn’t miss this:
---
Derek — we wanted to make sure you didn’t miss President Obama’s message. Later this summer, one lucky winner (and a guest) will get to meet President Obama, so he can thank them for the work they’re doing. Travel? Covered. Hotel stay? Covered. [**Pitch in $3 and you’ll be automatically entered to win. And your donation will go toward funding the DNC’s work to organize across the country.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-meet-obama-sweepstakes-2025?refcode=em_20250616_3736_fr&amount=3&refcode2=3736_22930333_KwTMi6&akid=3736%2E22930333%2EKwTMi6) **[CONTRIBUTE $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-meet-obama-sweepstakes-2025?refcode=em_20250616_3736_fr&amount=3&refcode2=3736_22930333_KwTMi6&akid=3736%2E22930333%2EKwTMi6)** Thanks, and more below. The Democrats
\-------- Forwarded message --------
Sender: Barack Obama
Date: Tuesday, June 3, 2025
Subject Line: I’d love to meet you, Derek
Derek, I’m excited to share that later this summer, I’ll get to meet a supporter like you and thank you personally for the work you’re doing. [**You can use this link to make a contribution and to enter the contest.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-meet-obama-sweepstakes-2025?refcode=em_20250616_3736_fr&amount=3&refcode2=3736_22930333_KwTMi6&akid=3736%2E22930333%2EKwTMi6) Right now, with everything going on, it would be easy to give in to fear or despair — but people like you aren’t doing that. You’re showing up at town halls in your communities, holding your representatives accountable, and maybe even planning to run for office yourself. I’m excited to say thank you in person. [**If you use this email to chip in $3 or any amount that feels right to you to support the DNC’s work, you’ll be automatically entered to meet with me. Plus, you’ll get to bring a guest, too.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-meet-obama-sweepstakes-2025?amount=3&refcode=em_20250616_3736_fr&refcode2=3736_22930333_KwTMi6&akid=3736%2E22930333%2EKwTMi6) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-meet-obama-sweepstakes-2025?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em_20250616_3736_fr&refcode2=3736_22930333_KwTMi6&akid=3736%2E22930333%2EKwTMi6)**

****
| **[Donate $100](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-meet-obama-sweepstakes-2025?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em_20250616_3736_fr&refcode2=3736_22930333_KwTMi6&akid=3736%2E22930333%2EKwTMi6)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-meet-obama-sweepstakes-2025?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=em_20250616_3736_fr&refcode2=3736_22930333_KwTMi6&akid=3736%2E22930333%2EKwTMi6)**

| **[Other Amount](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-meet-obama-sweepstakes-2025?refcode=em_20250616_3736_fr&refcode2=3736_22930333_KwTMi6&akid=3736%2E22930333%2EKwTMi6)**
---
****
Your travel and hotel will be covered. We’ll get a chance to chat and even take a few photos together. And your contribution will go directly toward funding the DNC’s work to organize across the country as Democrats lay the groundwork to take back Congress.
I hope to see you soon,
Barack
Barack Obama
44th President of the United States
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-meet-obama-sweepstakes-2025?amount=3&refcode=em_20250616_3736_fr&refcode2=3736_22930333_KwTMi6&akid=3736%2E22930333%2EKwTMi6)

_No purchase, payment, or contribution is necessary to enter or win and will not improve chances of winning. Void where prohibited. This promotion begins on May 30, 2025, at 12:01 AM ET. Enter by[contributing here](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/meet-obama-sweepstakes-2025?t=5&refcode2=3736_22930333_KwTMi6&akid=3736%2E22930333%2EKwTMi6) or [click here](https://democrats.org/meet-obama-sweepstakes-2025?t=6&akid=3736%2E22930333%2EKwTMi6) to enter without contributing. One winner will receive the following prize package: transportation to and from Princeton, NJ (domestic travel only, via plane and/or train at Sponsor’s discretion) on July 11, 2025 for two people, a one (1) night hotel stay (one room), two tickets to the fundraiser, and a meeting with President Obama at the fundraiser photo line (approx. retail value $1,000). Odds depend on the number of entries received. Anything is possible when we come together and support candidates fighting for the causes that voters care about most. It’ll be tough, but **this seat is critical to building Democratic power in the legislature, so we can’t give up.**
**Letting far-right power go unchecked fuels hate and rolls back our rights. But together we can help support state Dems who are committed to building a better, safer, and more inclusive future.**
[Here’s the bottom line: Winning elections like this requires grassroots support. name: Ted Cruz
subject: We’re going to get this done
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate
body:
Watch now – link inside >>>

| | | [](http://trk.tedcruz.-qSnxJPRX3SWT6zVyDQ)
---
| | Fellow Conservative, I appeared on _Hannity_ the other night to discuss a number of topics - including the status in the Senate on President Trump's One Big Beautiful Bill recently passed by the House.

We know that every Democrat will vote against this landmark America First legislation.

There are also currently a number of my Republican colleagues in the Senate who object to certain aspects of the bill as well, and we have work to do to unite our conference. **But as I told Sean and viewers at home, at the end of the day we WILL****get President Trump 's One Big Beautiful Bill across the finish line.** [**WATCH NOW TO HEAR HOW I THINK THIS WILL PLAY OUT >>>**](http://trk.tedcruz._6g) This bill is the solution to get our nation back on track after the disastrous Biden-Harris era.

I'll be sure to keep you posted as we charge forward to get this legislation passed and sent to President Trump's desk.

For Liberty,

Ted Cruz
---
[ **WATCH NOW** ](http://trk.tedcruz.)
---

Houston, TX 77265

subject: Have you ever changed your address with the U.S.P.S.?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Fight
body:
I’m proud that Fair Fight is still making this case in court. |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109687671/551907212/1793776944?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20250616_ff_SYATTVNOR_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMzRmOTM4Zi1jNDRhLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=W0iLWwYOnGZgBcfcyp67MXSIl9_--JHQHXIHvTBvRBQ=&emci=db4e0d4d-be4a-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=134f938f-c44a-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=1037277)

| | Let’s go back in time for a moment. After the 2018 elections, I founded Fair Fight — an organization dedicated to combating voter suppression and protecting voting rights. And Georgia’s 2021 runoff elections for the U.S. Senate showed [**exactly why this work is so critical.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109687672/551907213/1069921273?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20250616_ff_SYATTVNOR_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMzRmOTM4Zi1jNDRhLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=W0iLWwYOnGZgBcfcyp67MXSIl9_--JHQHXIHvTBvRBQ=) We saw an insidious attempt to intimidate voters — particularly Black, Brown, or first-time voters. **A Texas-based right-wing organization called True the Vote orchestrated the largest known mass voter eligibility challenge in Georgia’s history.** They provided volunteers with lists of voters from the United States Postal Service’s national change-of-address database — folks they flagged as ineligible to vote. Now, if you’ve ever moved, lived in college campus housing, or changed apartments, you know how the system works. Well, these anti-voter advocates used this database as evidence of ineligibility — even though the database can be outdated, and despite the fact that people who file to change their mailing address can still be properly registered to vote. Plus, the base of their challenges used unreliable postal data, as the United States Postal Service had already determined there was no guarantee on the quality of the data. True the Vote used this sleazy, shady practice to help facilitate more than 250,000 formal challenges. Voters received notifications questioning their right to vote simply because they used a convenience system designed to forward their mail. Imagine trying to cast a ballot and being singled out — pulled out of line — because your right to vote has been challenged. Or seeing your name posted publicly online with the accusation that you are ineligible to vote. And just in case the humiliation didn’t do the trick, True the Vote also discussed recruiting former Navy SEALs to monitor polling places. They even offered a $1 million bounty for reports of voter fraud. The sheer scale of these baseless challenges disrupted local election offices, burdened under-funded officials, created rampant confusion, and intimidated voters who had done nothing wrong. **Fair Fight has returned to federal court to take on True the Vote, oppose coordinated mass voter challenges, and end the ability of bad, cowardly actors to use this tactic to intimidate and overwhelm voters. ** **When necessary, Fair Fight takes its work to the courts. But they also work across communities and on campuses to slow or stop voter suppression efforts like mass challenges.** **And they invest in electing voting rights champions — such as Senators Raphael Warnock and Jon Ossoff in those 2021 elections — at the federal level as well as the state and local level, where key officials shape how elections are run.** [**The right to vote remains under constant attack, and the team at Fair Fight must be fully equipped to tackle new threats while pushing forward for free and fair elections. Will you make a donation of any amount to help fuel this work today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109687673/551907214/1069921273?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20250616_ff_SYATTVNOR_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMzRmOTM4Zi1jNDRhLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=W0iLWwYOnGZgBcfcyp67MXSIl9_--JHQHXIHvTBvRBQ=) Every eligible American should have the right to vote and have that vote counted. With that simple mission, Fair Fight has worked to stop the steady, methodical, cynical right-wing assaults on the bedrock of our shared values. And over the years, this work has only become more urgent. In March 2021, Georgia Governor Brian Kemp, a man with a reputation for being one of the nation’s most effective architects of voter suppression, opened the floodgates to even more mass voter challenges by signing SB 202 into law. That legislation allows unlimited voter challenges, which means that any person’s voter registration can be challenged as ineligible. Look: voter suppression isn’t new to America — or, sadly, to Georgia. And while both political parties have, at various times in history, treated those they considered undesirable voters as somehow criminal for exercising this fundamental constitutional right, in this century, **voter suppression is the strategy of choice for Republicans.** **True the Vote and GOP governors like Brian Kemp, Greg Abbott, and Ron DeSantis are the ideological descendants of those who have long opposed equal access to the ballot for all citizens, regardless of race or gender.** Across the country and now in the halls of Congress, Republicans are passing laws that make it harder for people to vote precisely because an engaged citizenry threatens their power. [**In the fight against tyranny and autocracy, we must defend the freedom to choose our leaders and vote our values. Fairness demands it. Make a donation now to fund and sustain that fight for our bedrock, pro-democracy ideals.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109687674/551907215/1069921273?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20250616_ff_SYATTVNOR_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMzRmOTM4Zi1jNDRhLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=W0iLWwYOnGZgBcfcyp67MXSIl9_--JHQHXIHvTBvRBQ=) Thank you, Stacey Abrams | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109687675/551907216/1069921273?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20250616_ff_SYATTVNOR_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMzRmOTM4Zi1jNDRhLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=W0iLWwYOnGZgBcfcyp67MXSIl9_--JHQHXIHvTBvRBQ=)

## _MANDATORY POLL:_

clean_body: Once polls close, people all across the country will be focused on our election. | = | Peter, tomorrow is Virginia's primary election. It's a major turning point for Abigail's campaign, and here's why: Once polls close, people all across the country will be focused on our election. They'll find out that Abigail is the only Democrat who can flip a Governor's seat in 2025. That our opponent Winsome-Earle Sears has stood in lockstep with Trump and wants to enact his MAGA extremist agenda, from banning abortion to cutting Virginia jobs. And that national experts rate our race a toss-up and consider it a bellwether for 2026 and beyond. For those reasons, Abigail is asking for your donation today to help lay the groundwork to win. = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, Team Spanberger * | | Paid for by Spanberger for Governor Spanberger for Governor P.O. Box 3121 Glen Allen, VA 23058 United States | = =

---
If you’ve been waiting for the perfect time to make your first donation to the Jane Fonda Climate PAC, this is it. Here’s why: | What if we told you that your donation helps us build a firewall of climate champions at every level of government — from school boards to state houses — to fight back against the GOP's egregious climate rollbacks happening right now in Washington?
---
Or that we're powered by grassroots donations, meaning the only way we'll build the people-powered movement needed to take on Big Oil is with supporters like you chipping in what you can, when you can?
---
Or that this fight now goes far beyond climate? We can no longer afford to sit on the sidelines while Donald Trump destroys our planet AND our democracy. Supporting movements like ours is crucial to stopping Trump's authoritarian agenda — and it takes serious resources to do that.
---
We can't compete with Big Oil's billions. But we don't need to. What we need is a grassroots movement of people who refuse to let Trump and his fossil fuel allies destroy everything we've fought for. **There are more of us than there are of them — we just need to show our strength.**
**[So we're asking you directly: Can we count on you to represent your community in Cresco on today’s donation report and chip in any amount you can afford before midnight? Every dollar goes toward electing bold leaders who believe in science and will fight like hell to protect our health and our planet.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109688708/551910086/2105508926?refcode=ea.c94099ee-c64a-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ms=ea.c94099ee-c64a-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImM5NDA5OWVlLWM2NGEtZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=epigzxkT2l6GlScYHSqAyiQcHvD59Vs4aNIutPgCUYc=)**

clean_body: We're running out of time to hit our daily goal. | If you’ve been waiting for the perfect time to make your first donation to the Jane Fonda Climate PAC, this is it. Here’s why: | What if we told you that your donation helps us build a firewall of climate champions at every level of government — from school boards to state houses — to fight back against the GOP's egregious climate rollbacks happening right now in Washington? Or that we're powered by grassroots donations, meaning the only way we'll build the people-powered movement needed to take on Big Oil is with supporters like you chipping in what you can, when you can? Or that this fight now goes far beyond climate? We can no longer afford to sit on the sidelines while Donald Trump destroys our planet AND our democracy. Supporting movements like ours is crucial to stopping Trump's authoritarian agenda — and it takes serious resources to do that. We can't compete with Big Oil's billions. But we don't need to. What we need is a grassroots movement of people who refuse to let Trump and his fossil fuel allies destroy everything we've fought for. There are more of us than there are of them — we just need to show our strength. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Time is running out, and we can't do this without you. Team JanePAC | = | = = Follow along: | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Jane Fonda Climate PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States

body:
Gabe Vasquez won the most competitive Democratic seat in Congress in 2022. He's running to be a champion for working families and build an economy that benefits everyone. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/lNYIdkhPikOBrh6RGc-KWg2?unsubscribedata=n0G9Y3yxxHxt57NZUJcyBoFbTHRELqDl5k48%2FQFm%2Ftg4nmnhUwS%2BcwI4eWBWQK%2BFWXcDjrDt%2B1%2BqdnjMQ8JF4GSrGALYB%2BEDwGvotRydMu3xGjK2ULg25fM%2FCN2vX30WvP8Weqn1fa8Rv5OVaC91hWl4YTwehfn7yaTI7PXeBCyo6qf%2BwzRVzFVM5WG43dDh8Owk6j5ZMrbnBD5wRkLo6Mo8AKSTNV1ZWDqVX2xJF3EJ%2FK%2F8y2wDqT66q2rz27Xiy38EHU55%2FjC64GrXjBib%2FnEQJNBSwm8H4oF6%2FExiIjQ04e6uann25tYnLq3hzVNAUbmwIlqbw6%2FYznWMLRTBI%2FAHvREjhJPrYNhd133dvPY9aCz6H2A5Ae%2FC%2FNYqW4T4sAdQQkWde9Owm1ZzArnVfnRrCy1EHbANPTk5uTCI28E%3D)

It's Gabe. I wish I had better news — but we didn’t hit our mid-month fundraising goal. We fell short this time, and the timing couldn’t be worse. Republicans know flipping NM-02 in 2026 could be the key to locking in their extreme agenda, which means: more attacks on our rights, more chaos in Congress and zero accountability for Donald Trump and his allies. We can’t afford to fall behind. This will be one of the most competitive races in the country, and GOP megadonors are watching our every move, especially with our second public-facing FEC deadline of the election cycle just over two weeks away. If they spot any sign of weakness in our numbers come July 1st, they’ll flood this district with even more dark money and attack ads filled with lies and misinformation. That’s why we need to start building a winning campaign now. We’ve gone toe-to-toe with them and won before, and I know we can do it again — but every second and every dollar from now until Election Day could make all the difference. [Can you chip in today to help us fight back and build the campaign we need to win in 2026?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109689512/551912706/1448278484?amount=10&source=SBD_GV_EM_FR_061625_MM4_60DO_D4_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NWY1MzFlNC1jODRhLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=47_W37czY-psS-havjWbZLhoNiDszpFWO3Qva6PL2tk=) | | [DONATE $10](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109689522/551912715/1448278484?amount=10&source=SBD_GV_EM_FR_061625_MM4_60DO_D4_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NWY1MzFlNC1jODRhLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=47_W37czY-psS-havjWbZLhoNiDszpFWO3Qva6PL2tk=)

— Gabe

name: Teichert in the Trenches
subject: Leadership Lesson - Responsiveness and Value
body:
You can tell a lot about an organization by how they respond...
---
| | | | | |
---
| | 🍔💥🔥**Keys to success – responsiveness and adding oversized value** 🔥💥🍔
---
You can tell a lot about an organization – a college, a company, a client, a church, or a club – by how they respond and what they provide. You should look elsewhere for admission, business, service, or fellowship whenever:
* They make you feel fortunate to be considered
* It regularly requires a follow-up email or phone call to get their attention
* They shield their leaders and decision makers from their customers
* Their systems and processes are opaque
* You get far less than you were promised or were led to believe
* You cannot quickly reach someone in customer service
* Their delays in getting back to you are excessive and consistent

Conversely, you have found something special whenever:
* They make you feel valued
* They are responsive and proactively follow up with you
* Their leaders and decision makers are accessible
* Their systems and processes are transparent and consistent
* You get far more from them than you expect
* You can always reach someone who can assist you
* They respond quickly and helpfully

Sadly, the former list has become standard. But, that means the latter list provides a unique competitive advantage. I shared the following example recently, and it provides a poignant illustration of the power of responsiveness and adding value.
My fiancé at the time (Melonie of course) came to visit me in the United Kingdom from California. On her way to the airport, she stopped by to get me an In-N-Out Burger (a Double-Double with no tomato and both grilled & regular onions). She threw it in container of dry-ice as a part of her carry-ons (pre-9/11), and I enjoyed it from the comfort of my British home. That’s real love!

I decided to write to the company to let them know of our geographically separated enjoyment of their amazing product. The items attached below are what I quickly received back from their Corporate Customer Service Manager and their Company President!

There are two things largely missing today that In-N-Out demonstrated brilliantly in this situation as a part of their unique culture. These characteristics should inform the leadership style of all of us:

* Responsiveness – how many times have you reached out to someone far less important than a Company President and they didn’t respond? Your customers and collaborators are human beings, and if you are too busy to respond then you should rethink your culture, reassess your sense of self-importance, and reconsider your ability to continue on in your position.

* Adding Oversized Value – Not only did these two leaders respond, but they added unexpected value – two free t-shirts and seven gift certificates. By adding value they increased their own value! (It’s a textbook example of the concepts by Bob Burg and John David Mann in one of my favorite books – “The Go-Giver”)

This type of culture and customer experience are part of the reason that I am a committed customer for life. In fact, my first stop after I landed in Los Angeles recently for a quick meeting was a world-class burger – a Double-Double protein style with no tomato and both grilled & regular onions! Lead Well – with responsiveness and value!
* John

| | | | **Teichert in the Trenches**
---
| Washington, DC
---
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com
---

---

As Trump collapses our economy, tramples on our civil rights and turns our nation into a global pariah, the convicted felon is fueling a civil conflict with the intention of declaring a national emergency, turning soldiers against citizens, suspending elections, and ruling with a tyrannical orange fist. Against the wishes of LAPD, LA’s mayor and California’s governor, the draft dodger who’s called soldiers “suckers” and “losers” ordered an unprecedented 4,000 National Guardsmen and 700 Marines into Los Angeles to stop people from exercising their First Amendment right. Trump says he plans to send troops everywhere. This is dangerous government overreach designed to dismantle our democracy! Trump is exploiting our military to carry out his dystopian agenda to destroy the very democracy they took an oath to protect! name: Team Miyares
subject: Would you sponsor a sign… or surrender the street?

body:
Every yard sign is a piece of turf we’re holding. A voter we’re activating. A family we’re protecting.| | | Friend, **Let's be blunt:** If we don’t fill Virginia’s neighborhoods with Jason Miyares signs now, we’ll be looking at a very different picture this fall.

name: Hillsdale College via American Action News
subject: Now Available: “Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer”
body:
I am excited to announce that Hillsdale’s online teaching series, “Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer,” is now available to own as a DVD box set.

This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0r3liefn624k4goi408upbip62st403ps8coe2g_rp22sh2s8i6epb0chg62p71chh2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zgfvpaqivelm0m4cicfj2ir3h972krmdc8s654v0_rp22sh2s8i6epb0chg62p71chh2bs) Dear Fellow American,

I am excited to announce that Hillsdale's online teaching series, ["Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer,"](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zh9rncdnobg79tgoid39ii3pu1gj53oc1162cvo8_rp22sh2s8i6epb0chg62p71chh2bs) is now available to own as a DVD box set.

In this series, you will discover how taxation, regulation, money, government spending, and trade influence our decisions and impact our lives. Joined by Steve Forbes, Stephen Moore, Larry Kudlow, Amity Shlaes, Brian Domitrovic, and Larry P. Arnn, Dr. Laffer explains how supply-side economics holds the key to unleashing American prosperity once again.

But we need the support of citizens like you to promote this series to millions of Americans along with our other nationwide outreach.

Will you partner with us to promote this free online teaching series from Hillsdale College and expand other educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty? Your tax-deductible donation will help us to enroll thousands of Americans in this series.

And for a donation of $100 or more, we will send you this beautiful DVD box set of "Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer."

**To help support this course and get your copy of "Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer" on DVD, click the link below:**

[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/supply-side-economics-support-dvd](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zfp78fb0l06am0g9vritv95hviobavofhl3s17g8_rp22sh2s8i6epb0chg62p71chh2bs)

I hope you enjoy this teaching series. Thank you for your support.

Warm Regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

Pop Acta Media | American Action News
---
_PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

body:
[](http://links.americabrigade.com/s/c/62vFCCpA4hiBM10d8iaFBNY48jagZE-niGA-YZeFeMHOV3cSFtTMj-fEaXdDfxJ3is-pMzstdBiXnkC8Nw_la5USvirfyv0N1cRyRlO_MXbS25-GLgO9rG0PXB4EmgPY1bH8CRfyxHBoCTLSJiUxH5-peuewuUDSYD9jW9kYNGKR3jFrFkT3EVkbUvnLL95yGF8rBFpjmT6f8vlDvDGPVOe17WH8nWSR-vUhg-4WK6uufxRWwCN-RtOMITJUVM2i244-7Euw2nyTSLWjpz8dcIFk8GWihpjZC9XVJM-7bElAwt79s1UJPcDyyBrGycz4YwyPoxYnxOVxNkCO_0uk30CPWVMb0pjKfzD6NlSnBo7Bq0G8KixY1et6zI39DLrhostWPIxkoZDwSOhCV6hMgqbG9KmYvOKpVGCmc8aJk8Yb3J4534_tGOvK2liCyV8jWquRGOKI5E7GL5JmyI5iFyXJLpqjN71cw95-ekZwj-wXZiwoJZKvmqVMmoZNs6-MluvJYT_w26KlWD37rUjhpnh2aqeEq4rmdUUpb1FlnHGkjrPqXaxdbp21bayUsFic36RX1TnLosMfkAaKAY9Em2LNvqZgbkT0BmMGKLIE_V5uJj2s7o5Ru7Gd7baNZ-TEOK6ace63A0Kln-b2rGpVTC1IXciZN43n4R3Tfo_NTavSsG0Y-A2aoeynvzQIww5Wxxv7uNQhqQ-z4MujZv0vHVHOMIPt9iNVpDLQxJKLE5xwJYCLqV20MVsow-wRKrNQVgmuoLimu-G8rcivtkDv_dWRxDue2E1GGx8iem8eW1asRdamzRwTS3B_83he9icFGvX2NDMzxeULv89q1pKquv1HGq-XZhLZng/tPD6GV0I3iIThUUjwryhix2z8n1gpTD7/10)I conceded my race. I lost.
It stings even writing this email.
I so badly wished the outcome was different... but you can dwell on the past or learn from it.
The Democrats played dirty. They dragged my name through the mud.
My opponent hired some nut job to churn out racist and sexist slurs against me-- just for being a MAGA Latina who loves Trump.
It was one of the nastiest smear campaigns in America. And in the end, I lost my race by a hair.
But I didn't turn to bitterness. I turned to Scripture:"Those who hope in the Lord will renew their strength. They will soar on wings like eagles..." -- Isaiah 40:31This is Mayra Flores-- and I believe God called me back to finish what we started. [I’m for Congress running again— in the #1 race in America. ](http://links.americabrigade.com/s/c/b9Lj182s6E2D2mFgEFTiR7GRhYd49uZVa0Ys2-eZQIOlf_jMEnKdz0n2IUuKx4si2LsiEqrjHP5uK5Rxdvi1bMwZJRQAWvPT2PRfC9sI5HAfuzxCzxJ8Rh9AinESOM7xJR5ZWbLlhuv0IFpEiy3sW79vESo4895B87rOiW5JzcDvNAiybEK5X8VOoCXKgT0PlhmLsmcflqQ-0CqRtYKZwovjcu91PCj40wrTjc-43giTVG5iqMzHavkGvLKjKaJWf-oFreNR45iK004BkcJky3ePQQMk85n46R3w3hgyvA5GIWFP_L0QLbUdiFsYOXgV-72vTnCMeJ_ni2bRkBlSUAO2kCPMcU5dfB7gKGp33axdii1QuLoGZbHXzKyETgrSkNz0WCevYV6XD4cLA3ofLJRPCNp082W8uRnqZi4asV6Wcg8-djWQNJ5t4_f7JIN_n6jHrFrsyHfGNHPgRm6w4trDYUob1s7P-EvyBdCwTwX_72RMRcWmd0V8qq5g-3QDsSz2Gt0e4oJFKRcODvoyw7lcLssf7Teuhmw6Mja9h4oRuWZF32gcbbuQT4FdrcBKvOo2uM58GHZFkxhbhXXDC_mmveU9pNC9ysQ9PburOkI4kCHUmqyB-UCtbyiwcLF3O8r7-ff_fKgLHDP42omGG32mUyMBNv-oLhpMRDcQB0oNjpe3oNVrDcrB1O9D6yucs28w1f8BA6ZbZmOu_siywf1tuEhacvyZQx9OJkX-9van4JLSduJN4elI2bwpZTiPWNDZJaSXx9HSInazh2_Bb3V6JWWJHJDB6RKKPXrJQ73uBAW72303ZGO4AS9rWSuqnZ52cMeD-gKwBqyqDyBcLgcUVBpe-SPJnw/eqakX2BQjdJVqZAOYQbJyd0KVs_g9DUZ/10)[Make a small donation to help Mayra win

In life. In campaigns. In this fight for our country.
But what matters most is how we respond-- and who we lean on when the road gets tough.
That's why I'm reaching out to you today. Because right now, I need someone to lean on.
If we don't see a surge of support this week, this campaign will never recover-- and Republicans will lose our best chance to flip a blue seat red in 2026.

# [Pete Hegseth needs to go NOW](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0b161787-83e1-4728-851f-5e5719b77d4a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

---
| | | Pete Hegseth was spectacularly unqualified when Trump nominated him, and he's proven himself to be an [unmitigated disaster as Secretary of Defense.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T65be9230-34f5-47e8-8edd-e5dbb93ee12d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) He has divulged critical military secrets via a public chat app, he has mismanaged the Pentagon into chaos, and he has told Congress that he will ignore judicial orders if he feels like it. **With America perilously close to war with Russia, Iran, and God only knows who else, we can't have a guy in charge of our armed forces who thinks if he just arches his eyebrow and talks like Clint Eastwood enemy armies will run away in terror.** We need someone who actually knows how to do the job, not just kiss Trump's ass. [**Add your name, and demand that Hegseth be removed and replaced NOW. **](https://default.salsalabs.org/T86fb23eb-0f2a-4095-8a6f-d489063d68aa/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

body:
Hobbs just vetoed a bill to block China from buying Arizona land.

[](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/YMpLa-UyN6XvA0EupKfKDw~~/AARclBA~/rvenWHUuvD80s3HJlDvdmii2ZSSRerO5oXSyW9Dj0KfEHJ9zUy2YDLO8jjq5UnqO1xfchMEoaH2qY0QzO1cIwoqDj_nILcCp9YsTlMhGqv1MslOC5eIYMk95EqrCaHoZvTcNewh3dUOgqhvuuSZifouCx-4Ywy1y1QBXb0wzTU3raxqgBjn7rsDl_IdV9qx_2_4bepyLBiC79FI_pEnqshcmrx-smf2EpZqOU2aaHrN_9bbuvAupWcMMTwEFgGQqbNXWvboEwVOu07osAh0NgC_fvMhVBsRE6JXvAOln5Do~ "Karrin for Arizona")

**

Patriot,

**
We should be putting America **FIRST**. **NOT** the Chinese Communist Party.

But Katie Hobbs? **She has other plans.**

🚨 [This week, Hobbs **VETOED** a common-sense bill that would've **BLOCKED** foreign adversaries like Communist China from **buying up** Arizona land.](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/YMpLa-UyN6XvA0EupKfKDw~~/AARclBA~/rvenWHUuvD80s3HJlDvdmii2ZSSRerO5oXSyW9Dj0KfEHJ9zUy2YDLO8jjq5UnqO1xfchMEoaH2qY0QzO1cIwoqDj_nILcCp9YsTlMhGqv1MslOC5eIYMk95EqrCaHoZvTcNewh3dUOgqhvuuSZifouCx-4Ywy1y1QBXb0wzTU3raxqgBjn7rsDl_IdV9qx_2_4bepyLBiC79FI_pEnqshcmrx-smf2EpZqOU2aaHrN_9bbuvAupWcMMTwEFgGQqbNXWvboEwVOu07osAh0NgC_fvMhVBsRE6JXvAOln5Do~)

**Let that sink in.**

➡ The CCP is circling our farmland.
➡ They're buying up land near military bases.
➡ And they're embedding themselves deeper into our state's economy.

And Hobbs just gave them the green light.

This isn't leadership. This is a total failure of priorities.

Patriot--national security is **NON-NEGOTIABLE.**

Yet time after time, Hobbs chooses her radical donors, foreign interests, and D.C. elites over Arizona families.

First, she **VETOED** crucial election integrity legislation.

Now, she's paving the way for the CCP to seize Arizona land.

I've had enough.

That's why I'm running--to finally deliver **STRONG** leadership that puts Arizona **FIRST**.

✅ Secure our border
✅ Protect Arizona's land from foreign adversaries
✅ Defend election integrity
✅ Grow jobs & rebuild our economy

But I cannot do this without YOU.

The Radical Left and their dark money allies have already poured **MILLIONS** into Arizona to keep Hobbs in power.

Now my primary is just around the corner, and the clock is ticking.

This is our moment to take Arizona back.

[**Will you stand with me and send a message that Arizona is NOT for sale?**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/YMpLa-UyN6XvA0EupKfKDw~~/AARclBA~/rvenWHUuvD80s3HJlDvdmii2ZSSRerO5oXSyW9Dj0KfEHJ9zUy2YDLO8jjq5UnqO1xfchMEoaH2qY0QzO1cIwoqDj_nILcCp9YsTlMhGqv1MslOC5eIYMk95EqrCaHoZvTcNewh3dUOgqhvuuSZifouCx-4Ywy1y1QBXb0wzTU3raxqgBjn7rsDl_IdV9qx_2_4bepyLBiC79FI_pEnqshcmrx-smf2EpZqOU2aaHrN_9bbuvAupWcMMTwEFgGQqbNXWvboEwVOu07osAh0NgC_fvMhVBsRE6JXvAOln5Do~)

[RUSH A DONATION & HELP DEFEAT HOBBS](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/YMpLa-UyN6XvA0EupKfKDw~~/AARclBA~/rvenWHUuvD80s3HJlDvdmii2ZSSRerO5oXSyW9Dj0KfEHJ9zUy2YDLO8jjq5UnqO1xfchMEoaH2qY0QzO1cIwoqDj_nILcCp9YsTlMhGqv1MslOC5eIYMk95EqrCaHoZvTcNewh3dUOgqhvuuSZifouCx-4Ywy1y1QBXb0wzTU3raxqgBjn7rsDl_IdV9qx_2_4bepyLBiC79FI_pEnqshcmrx-smf2EpZqOU2aaHrN_9bbuvAupWcMMTwEFgGQqbNXWvboEwVOu07osAh0NgC_fvMhVBsRE6JXvAOln5Do~)

Let's show the Left that Arizona belongs to Arizonans, not the CCP.

For America & Arizona,

Karrin Taylor Robson

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: I’m now forced to say it
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
........................

........................
| [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z5fbm0uuphbh1ek4jboh1jm5efpp5dlicjl90f18_rp22sh2s8i6epb0chg6ao76c9h2bs)
---
Friend,
---
All of my life, those closest to me – and even those who only knew me from politics – have known me to be a _helper_.
---
I helped take down the mob in New York...
---
I helped unify our city and our country as America’s mayor after tragedy struck on September 11th...
---
I helped keep our streets and our citizens safe... **
---
And I helped successfully defend President Trump from one of the Left’s most vicious witch hunts imaginable.
---
Those were the headlines that defined me to so many Americans like _YOU_.
---
But over the last year, I’ve instead woken up in the mornings to headlines like these:
---

**_“Giuliani losing his home amidst 2 indictments...”_**
_[MSNBC]_

**_“Giuliani bankruptcy case dismissed, opening door to creditors pursuing collection”_**
_[CNBC]_

**_“Giuliani Disbarred from the Practice of Law in New York” _**
_[New York Times]_

---
**And sadly, as I stare down the Democrats’ _FINAL_ sham indictment against me, I am now the one forced to ask _you_ to help _me_. **
---
That’s truly something I NEVER wanted to have to say, Friend...
---
_Asking for help as opposed to offering it unsettles me to my core._
---
But I hope you understand that you truly are my FINAL HOPE.
---
_**Right now in Arizona, the Democrat Attorney General is seeking to use a _state-level_ charge that President Trump cannot pardon in order to throw me in prison until I’m 100 years old!** _
---
My crime? Refusing to forsake the TRUTH and standing by the side of my dear friend and our 45th and 47th President – Donald J. Trump.
---
_And the punishment the Left wants in return? My personal, professional, and financial ruin along with me taking my last breath in a prison cell!_
---
Make no mistake, if we can’t beat this sham case here and now, if we fail to secure true justice and my ultimate vindication, then this scheme of the Left’s can be used against every last red-blooded patriot as the Deep State’s bulletproof measure to TAKE DOWN their political enemies.
---

clean_body: ........................ ........................ | Friend, All of my life, those closest to me – and even those who only knew me from politics – have known me to be a helper. I helped take down the mob in New York... I helped unify our city and our country as America’s mayor after tragedy struck on September 11th... I helped keep our streets and our citizens safe... And I helped successfully defend President Trump from one of the Left’s most vicious witch hunts imaginable. Those were the headlines that defined me to so many Americans like YOU. But over the last year, I’ve instead woken up in the mornings to headlines like these: “Giuliani losing his home amidst 2 indictments...” [MSNBC] “Giuliani bankruptcy case dismissed, opening door to creditors pursuing collection” [CNBC] “Giuliani Disbarred from the Practice of Law in New York” [New York Times] And sadly, as I stare down the Democrats’ FINAL sham indictment against me, I am now the one forced to ask you to help me. That’s truly something I NEVER wanted to have to say, Friend... Asking for help as opposed to offering it unsettles me to my core. But I hope you understand that you truly are my FINAL HOPE. Right now in Arizona, the Democrat Attorney General is seeking to use a state-level charge that President Trump cannot pardon in order to throw me in prison until I’m 100 years old! My crime? Refusing to forsake the TRUTH and standing by the side of my dear friend and our 45th and 47th President – Donald J. Trump. And the punishment the Left wants in return? My personal, professional, and financial ruin along with me taking my last breath in a prison cell! Make no mistake, if we can’t beat this sham case here and now, if we fail to secure true justice and my ultimate vindication, then this scheme of the Left’s can be used against every last red-blooded patriot as the Deep State’s bulletproof measure to TAKE DOWN their political enemies. And the ONLY way to defeat a regime like the Deep State is to NEVER,EVER SURRENDER to it. ...Just ask President Trump! The Democrats unjustly filed my MUGSHOT under booking # 2313757. So, to show these left-wing crooks that good and honest Americans like YOU will also never surrender as they destroy the life of an INNOCENT man, I’m humbly asking for your support to raise $231,375.70** for my Legal Defense Trust to win this last fight for my freedom and justice. https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ycfcemail [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ycfcemail]
Peter,
New polling just dropped, and Gabe Evans has a problem. Here’s the bottom line:
* 63% of voters in our district say they’re less likely to vote for someone who cuts Medicaid.
* Gabe Evans voted to cut Medicaid.
* His favorability is underwater, and he’s polling behind Donald Trump in Colorado’s 8th District.
As a pediatrician, I’ve seen what happens when families can’t afford healthcare. I’ve treated kids whose only lifeline was Medicaid, and I know how devastating these cuts would be.
That’s why I’m running – to fight like hell to protect the care our communities depend on. But I can’t do it alone. Will you donate right now, and help me win? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ycfcemail]

Thank you,
Yadira

name: Tim Kaine
subject: “a referendum on the Trump White House”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025]
Folks, the Virginia primary election is tomorrow — Tuesday, June 17th.
If you haven’t already voted, make a plan to cast your ballot before the end of the day Tuesday! Polls will be open from 6 AM to 7 PM. [https://iwillvote.com/locate/?state=VA]
These elections are a big deal. Here’s how Washington Post summarized our impact:
"The state’s elections are seen as a referendum on the Trump White House and a proving ground for next year’s congressional midterms."
In other words, this is a major opportunity for Democrats — and a big test of our party’s enthusiasm, motivation, and ability to win big.
If we can secure victories up and down the ticket from our great Democratic candidates in November, we’ll send a clear rebuke to the Trump Administration, and a meaningful preview of what the country can expect in the 2026 midterms.
I’m going to do everything I can to support Democratic victories, and I need you on my team, so I have to ask: Will you pitch in $35 to my Common Ground PAC before tomorrow's primary to help us get ready for the general election? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025]
I started Common Ground years ago because I felt strongly — and still do today — that there’s way too much focus on division and bickering, and not enough support for the kinds of leaders who will put people first and politics second.
We’re dedicated to helping elect leaders who will find common ground and who prioritize common sense — and we’ll be working hard in Virginia this year to do just that!
With your help, I know we can flip VA blue and show Donald Trump and the national GOP that Democrats are ready to win again. Will you make an online contribution of $35 or whatever you can before Election Day tomorrow? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025]
If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025?express_lane=true&amount=25]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025?express_lane=true&amount=50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025?express_lane=true&amount=100]
DONATE OTHER [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025]
Thank you for your support — I always know I can count on this team.
-Tim Kaine
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025]

1490-5A Quarterpath Road #272
Williamsburg, VA 23185

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: I’m now forced to say it
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
........................

........................
| [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z3q0unhuo1m79b4rb546bas1rsf61tba951s02f8_rp22sh2s8i6epb0chg6eor4c1h2bs)
---
Friend,
---
All of my life, those closest to me – and even those who only knew me from politics – have known me to be a _helper_.
---
I helped take down the mob in New York...
---
I helped unify our city and our country as America’s mayor after tragedy struck on September 11th...
---
I helped keep our streets and our citizens safe... **
---
And I helped successfully defend President Trump from one of the Left’s most vicious witch hunts imaginable.
---
Those were the headlines that defined me to so many Americans like _YOU_.
---
But over the last year, I’ve instead woken up in the mornings to headlines like these:
---

**_“Giuliani losing his home amidst 2 indictments...”_**
_[MSNBC]_

**_“Giuliani bankruptcy case dismissed, opening door to creditors pursuing collection”_**
_[CNBC]_

**_“Giuliani Disbarred from the Practice of Law in New York” _**
_[New York Times]_

---
**And sadly, as I stare down the Democrats’ _FINAL_ sham indictment against me, I am now the one forced to ask _you_ to help _me_. **
---
That’s truly something I NEVER wanted to have to say, Friend...
---
_Asking for help as opposed to offering it unsettles me to my core._
---
But I hope you understand that you truly are my FINAL HOPE.
---
_**Right now in Arizona, the Democrat Attorney General is seeking to use a _state-level_ charge that President Trump cannot pardon in order to throw me in prison until I’m 100 years old!** _
---
My crime? Refusing to forsake the TRUTH and standing by the side of my dear friend and our 45th and 47th President – Donald J. Trump.
---
_And the punishment the Left wants in return? My personal, professional, and financial ruin along with me taking my last breath in a prison cell!_
---
Make no mistake, if we can’t beat this sham case here and now, if we fail to secure true justice and my ultimate vindication, then this scheme of the Left’s can be used against every last red-blooded patriot as the Deep State’s bulletproof measure to TAKE DOWN their political enemies.
---
And the _ONLY_ way to defeat a regime like the Deep State is to **NEVER,_EVER_ SURRENDER** to it.
---
_...Just ask President Trump!_
---
The Democrats unjustly filed my MUGSHOT under **booking # 2313757.**
---
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zukgbl9upfc1g8ld388mm4ntamh5ij09lle974to_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t6ekr3asjl6ejn9ctiekoj79hnmmrq4tbh6jqqed5le6qb8ctkmmhj4t9l64rrbdd36lpr2dd7cji3cp1h6cq3f9r2c1h30pr0s8om9pr4ccq38p37kvin2tdnqoq3bc3k6irj7df2c1h6ao35c9h608104phiasblmvarac9kmlqrbp9lmgqb3cp5e5qrfljnmlp7cd9ls9blfkgj4lonbdum6upr2t9jm5qu0l0i46h22sh2s8i6epb0chg6eor4c1h2bs)
__
---
_So, to show these left-wing crooks that good and honest Americans like _YOU_ will also never surrender as they destroy the life of an INNOCENT man, I’m humbly asking for your support to raise **$231,375.70** for my Legal Defense Trust to win this last fight for my freedom and justice. _
---
[**Please make a contribution to the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund to help me WIN the FINAL BATTLE for my freedom and justice against the Deep State as they attempt to JAIL me for the rest of my life in Arizona.**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zd079uncjdll79l9pv1t5egg23j5cvf20gf3c710_rp22sh2s8i6epb0chg6eor4c1h2bs)
---

But over the last year, I’ve instead woken up in the mornings to headlines like these: “Giuliani losing his home amidst 2 indictments...” [MSNBC] “Giuliani bankruptcy case dismissed, opening door to creditors pursuing collection” [CNBC] “Giuliani Disbarred from the Practice of Law in New York” [New York Times] And sadly, as I stare down the Democrats’ FINAL sham indictment against me, I am now the one forced to ask you to help me. That’s truly something I NEVER wanted to have to say, Friend... Asking for help as opposed to offering it unsettles me to my core. But I hope you understand that you truly are my FINAL HOPE. Right now in Arizona, the Democrat Attorney General is seeking to use a state-level charge that President Trump cannot pardon in order to throw me in prison until I’m 100 years old! My crime? Refusing to forsake the TRUTH and standing by the side of my dear friend and our 45th and 47th President – Donald J. Trump. And the punishment the Left wants in return? My personal, professional, and financial ruin along with me taking my last breath in a prison cell! Make no mistake, if we can’t beat this sham case here and now, if we fail to secure true justice and my ultimate vindication, then this scheme of the Left’s can be used against every last red-blooded patriot as the Deep State’s bulletproof measure to TAKE DOWN their political enemies. And the ONLY way to defeat a regime like the Deep State is to NEVER,EVER SURRENDER to it. ...Just ask President Trump! The Democrats unjustly filed my MUGSHOT under booking # 2313757. So, to show these left-wing crooks that good and honest Americans like YOU will also never surrender as they destroy the life of an INNOCENT man, I’m humbly asking for your support to raise $231,375.70** for my Legal Defense Trust to win this last fight for my freedom and justice. Thank you and God bless you, Rudy Giuliani Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust Pop Acta Media | Your America PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

---
Dear Peter,
---
Rioting, violence, chaos in the streets—it’s what the media promotes. That’s why the slogan _“If it bleeds, it leads”_ has been a mainstay of journalism for over 100 years. Since the media won’t cover the amazing move of God in Spokane this past weekend, **I will!** Believers from all over the Pacific Northwest descended on Spokane for **JesusFest** , expectant for the Holy Spirit to move! Together, we prayed, worshiped, and shook the walls of heaven with calls for revival to sweep across America. It was a stark contrast to another gathering in Spokane, where a mass of unruly activists faced off with law enforcement. It was a chaotic scene—but typical of the ones erupting across America.

clean_body: | | | | | Dear Peter, Rioting, violence, chaos in the streets—it’s what the media promotes. That’s why the slogan “If it bleeds, it leads” has been a mainstay of journalism for over 100 years. Since the media won’t cover the amazing move of God in Spokane this past weekend, I will! Believers from all over the Pacific Northwest descended on Spokane for JesusFest , expectant for the Holy Spirit to move! Together, we prayed, worshiped, and shook the walls of heaven with calls for revival to sweep across America. It was a stark contrast to another gathering in Spokane, where a mass of unruly activists faced off with law enforcement. It was a chaotic scene—but typical of the ones erupting across America. | | | | One thing is clear—America needs Jesus! Join us as we continue to step up and step out in faith. We’re committed to bringing the Gospel to some of the most inhospitable places in the world—even if that happens to be our own nation! Till all hear, Sean | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- INTERNATIONAL DONORS— DONATE Donate by Check or Money Order Sean Feucht Ministries310 Third Street NEWashington, DC 20002 Contributions are tax-deductible. | | Email sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com by Let Us Worship - | |

**[That’s why we’re launching an urgent petition calling for full accountability for Donald Trump, no expectations, no delays. He led the impeachment efforts after January 6. He stood firm against lies, conspiracy, and corruption. And now, he’s calling on all of us to rise to the moment.

| | | Some folks write you emails pretending to be President Trump.

**I won 't do that to you. **

Some folks pretend donations will somehow fund DOGE.

**I prefer to be honest with you.**

This is Steve Scalise. As your House Majority Leader, I work hand and glove with President Trump, and I love what DOGE is doing for our country.

And when I ask you for support, I want to treat you with respect and be transparent about where your money is going.

You are not an ATM. You are a valued member of our MAGA movement. You deserve to be treated that way.

**_[So that's why I 'm dropping into your inbox right now:](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=cd8871b97bdc4bafa7e45115afa5f2c6&_e=66ibSUnJelfWCBU_g8orBjpJpB5LKyW8qklqLtn3pLvT40lAWjn_DendMeyB1ihMa8k15zttvbwp4NPTvwR8a2KoCBs-tcntGeKjK7hW3QI63M5uRwKwkiHh1TjecDXTK8MkvIPYT4Yzv1sJBe_7THHDEAkedWasT8_7IS2xuAqUumh-HvT-nye6Y55l7-gEQc0OP8yHQw5WCAIpGhEsW40ywPhVLzBmdxkIKZ0TOM3Q_k88SENIstoMFIpVXhbKdkSUR87kTRH7aOgUctSGDxos8pCdU2sQSa84Yj4rkDu9nfZKKYVtlIlWHAV4pDpLH0_koA1SGiwptn9dtt6ynfI5Mb2rAESd-1kIPOU-TllsQ61aM-kZhuJdGVBRUt6HojAyXXoB3tHCI0rKKJ4XIQ%3D%3D)_**

That's why they're mobilizing the courts, Deep State operatives, and Congressional Democrats to unleash a coordinated political hatchet job against the Trump Administration.

_Democrats are suing him. They 're pushing for partisan investigations. They're firing off hit piece after hit piece in the press. They're introducing legislation to block DOGE's access._

Cook Political Report just highlighted EIGHT toss-up districts that will determine who wins the House. If Democrats win even a few seats, it's over. They win the House.

That's why I'm tapping our entire grassroots movement for help.

_**[If you can afford to do so, I 'm imploring you to pitch in a few bucks to save our House Majority - and President Trump's entire legislative agenda along with it.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=cd8871b97bdc4bafa7e45115afa5f2c6&_e=66ibSUnJelfWCBU_g8orBjpJpB5LKyW8qklqLtn3pLvT40lAWjn_DendMeyB1ihMa8k15zttvbwp4NPTvwR8a2KoCBs-tcntGeKjK7hW3QI63M5uRwKwkiHh1TjecDXTK8MkvIPYT4Yzv1sJBe_7THHDEAkedWasT8_7IS2xuAqUumh-HvT-nye6Y55l7-gEQc0OP8yHQw5WCAIpGhEsW40ywPhVLzBmdxkIKZ0TOM3Q_k88SENIstoMFIpVXhbKNlgxkbdDUgXxfyssDocZjmboc81WM3QewNf7wR4W1fjmshNy_qvBXETWr6KHf77gIi40v0XX2b4qlLIqXIr3qtPTR0pemPJc8SfZRAtDJkeyLeY9spveevNYbQPZkNjDJKCYHFLVwh-_z2_n81eorQ%3D%3D)**___

clean_body: | | | Some folks write you emails pretending to be President Trump. I won 't do that to you. Some folks pretend donations will somehow fund DOGE. I prefer to be honest with you. This is Steve Scalise. As your House Majority Leader, I work hand and glove with President Trump, and I love what DOGE is doing for our country. And when I ask you for support, I want to treat you with respect and be transparent about where your money is going. You are not an ATM. You are a valued member of our MAGA movement. You deserve to be treated that way. The Democrat Machine is firing on all cylinders to undermine, stonewall, and sabotage everything President Trump and DOGE are doing to make our government more efficient and cut waste. Of course, the DC Swamp can't have that. That's why they're mobilizing the courts, Deep State operatives, and Congressional Democrats to unleash a coordinated political hatchet job against the Trump Administration. Democrats are suing him. They 're pushing for partisan investigations. They're firing off hit piece after hit piece in the press. They're introducing legislation to block DOGE's access. Their plan is simple: 1. Attack the Trump Administration 2. Drag them into court battles 3. Slow them down at every turn 4. Use the press to attack their work 5. Unload millions to win the Midterms 6. Block Trump's ENTIRE legislative agenda That 's where House Republicans - and most importantly, YOU - can make a major difference. Democrats have already pledged 50 million dollars to win the Midterm elections, take control of Congress, and exploit that power to sabotage EVERYTHING President Trump is doing to save the country. That includes the critical work of DOGE. Cook Political Report just highlighted EIGHT toss-up districts that will determine who wins the House. If Democrats win even a few seats, it's over. They win the House. That's why I'm tapping our entire grassroots movement for help. | Again, I'm NOT pretending this money is going to fund DOGE or anything these other groups are alluding to. This money will go directly to the most important battleground districts in the country so we can win the Midterms and keep delivering on President Trump's MAGA agenda. If you agree this is a noble cause to support, please consider pitching in right now. God bless you, - Steve STEVE SCALISE House Majority Leader A personal note from Majority Leader Steve Scalise: I'm humbled to announce that I am your new House Majority Leader. My first order of business is checking in with our best supporters, so I just launched my new MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY for that specific reason. name: Breaking News via RTP
subject: full blown authoritarian crisis - take action NOW, before it's too late
body:
Peter, we're facing a full-blown authoritarian crisis.
Trump is deploying military force against civilians, criminalizing dissent, and punishing leaders who dare to speak out. We CANNOT let this go unanswered.
We’re mobilizing immediately — but we need emergency grassroots funding to support Democrats on the front lines. Please rush a donation right now. Every second counts. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-fightback?refcode=061625_2]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-fightback?refcode=061625_2 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-fightback?refcode=061625_2]
Peter,
We are watching a real-time authoritarian takeover unfold in Los Angeles — and every moment we fail to act is a moment Trump tightens his grip.
Here’s what’s happening:
🔴 Trump ordered 700 U.S. Marines into L.A. — in addition to 4,000 National Guard troops already deployed
🔴 Peaceful protesters were met with curfews, batons, tear gas, and mass arrests
🔴 Neither Governor Newsom nor Mayor Bass approved the escalation
🔴 And now — Trump is calling for Newsom’s ARREST for speaking out
This isn’t leadership.
This is dictatorship.
And if we don’t organize and fund resistance right now, we risk normalizing the worst abuses of power we’ve seen in generations.
We’re building a war chest to support Democrats at the state and local level who are directly confronting this dangerous power grab — but we can’t do it without you. Can you rush a donation of $10, $25, or whatever you can to help us fight back? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-fightback?refcode=061625_2]

| [ ](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqv1STuy_axapI11rAiEMjCBP8MqJU5OU8RUGh4w-siT-5CAmuy-Tm9RRqJPqh9BSLXdYXHUhcA4ZvVsPhJLa7QCP_QZ5AY28kfoG8ilmCvnxHecaSlXIrXBdT3srLEXRO-w4ZrtEHpzKgoxkdITxOVA176r1sh0jiO1kXT5zcjthtRk-NF21GLJNwiLyKtVUX495xxZArNhb_2lVWZBdHb0we0A5_c9YPtm5OZr2pm50z9VqexQA10ZdBf0Rgpqyj5mvSOPvTfBi1FjP0ieSHeqw5600NUi0gRYONco0Xy0t6jPoOzFolaP8A8RT9ftI68ZcJta_RrIUMBwNf7Lln11/4he/yiuKW-PnQvuP3s7Gaszwtg/h1/h001.2uC0xyFPOL3L3_Znm33eYpaflhIxz57ZgfJfDFY9sLw)
---
Trump is handling this exactly how you would expect him to - _externalizing his insecurity and massively compensating._ In an unhinged rant on social media last night, he announced he is sending militarized ICE thugs to terrorize communities in more Democratic-run cities after being absolutely embarrassed this weekend:
---
| [ ](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqv1STuy_axapI11rAiEMjCBP8MqJU5OU8RUGh4w-siT-5CAmuy-Tm9RRqJPqh9BSLUTb1Y5HOCM-4bPH89LmSNNvUyE91XnzJkigk0vQ2305Lt3f_fxF52Q0Cd3eZFEG803_L_oCl4ErE_Sa_F8H9GwbFaBwvtnYnnXLC66bldB-nHmMt1gMVfUgIlnMAQp9u4il2weqmtGHi4TsjEmz3N-2PxhwF3C3kkS_MuRlt7I8wMBTvo_dbXSJU_powswZza0jB8W1trG1BQU_TLVNpYVqOxLJd3g_wv9yVbAFLZQShdfrE5VwF4NG_OLHJmuKeKXzn9VdBgGIxR4bBrfLM8v/4he/yiuKW-PnQvuP3s7Gaszwtg/h2/h001.8ckbOg19OIzkFhkWMKu2GOGzr3kw1whwK5fisgBIt3Q)
---
Trump can't handle opposition or criticism. He wants _so badly_ to be a "beloved" dictator who can do whatever he wants while the people begrudgingly praise him out of fear of government retaliation. Admiration is all he desires, he does not care about the constitution and rule of law or the wellbeing of America. Last week, a federal court ruled that Trump's seizure of the CA National Guard was illegal, giving command back to Governor Newsom. **Trump 's expansion of ICE operations is likely a ploy to provoke more chaos nationwide - pretext to invoke the Insurrection Act and the ability to deploy the US military in Democratic-run cities all across America using emergency powers.** _That way, he can force Democrats to praise him at gunpoint._ **The only thing stopping Trump from becoming a full-blown dictator are our courts.** That's why Defend Our Courts is working non-stop to help Dem supreme court justices in key swing states where Trump is attempting to replace them with MAGA loyalists who will let him act as a dictator and rig elections in his favor -__ like in the upcoming Pennsylvania 2025 supreme court retention election that we are preparing for. **[Will you help us fight back and defend our courts from Trump 's attempts to become a dictator?](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqv1STuy_axapI11rAiEMjCBP8MqJU5OU8RUGh4w-siT-5CAmuy-Tm9RRqJPqh9BSLU8Jv7zK6UIwCFK6KsXWPgitMtXw7b6mc-TvJ5pF6_hP1zqcUedQ5-aIWOvuP92ATGSSHA8iOkVlwAkhhH_wOtxQlboVJtaG034jNxOrHsyYihb8PS1eitpu3-D9o-FJeaXSeEpEbxdGarHwztSTcaW0CS8MmSLDtFDQDfxxtJHrqXvrOepN5wk8qP3YcEDtXc4wmFDkbcYLb3WlElKo_r6DrsFQouSesK5PwR_BEx6jU6nahhx6DL8zQvYbAwpB4VHVBoXAa-zUYJK398bLfTy/4he/yiuKW-PnQvuP3s7Gaszwtg/h3/h001.WpNqR5OteAFAKZoIe3C6Q943n0IWRekPrrJiI7MnhKg)**
