clean_body: He’s embarrassed - so he is sending ICE thugs to terrorize Democratic-run cities. | | Peter, This weekend, Donald Trump was humiliated: | Trump is handling this exactly how you would expect him to - externalizing his insecurity and massively compensating. In an unhinged rant on social media last night, he announced he is sending militarized ICE thugs to terrorize communities in more Democratic-run cities after being absolutely embarrassed this weekend: | Trump can't handle opposition or criticism. He wants so badly to be a "beloved" dictator who can do whatever he wants while the people begrudgingly praise him out of fear of government retaliation. Admiration is all he desires, he does not care about the constitution and rule of law or the wellbeing of America. Last week, a federal court ruled that Trump's seizure of the CA National Guard was illegal, giving command back to Governor Newsom. Trump 's expansion of ICE operations is likely a ploy to provoke more chaos nationwide - pretext to invoke the Insurrection Act and the ability to deploy the US military in Democratic-run cities all across America using emergency powers. That way, he can force Democrats to praise him at gunpoint. The only thing stopping Trump from becoming a full-blown dictator are our courts. That's why Defend Our Courts is working non-stop to help Dem supreme court justices in key swing states where Trump is attempting to replace them with MAGA loyalists who will let him act as a dictator and rig elections in his favor - like in the upcoming Pennsylvania 2025 supreme court retention election that we are preparing for. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: In solidarity, Team Defend our Courts | Mail checks to: Defend Our Courts P.O. Box 45569 Philadelphia, PA 19149 | | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Defend our Courts PAC, please .

subject: Will you stand with Senator Padilla?

## **10 YEARS OF MAGA!**

Friend,
Ten years ago today, I launched the MAGA movement and declared my candidacy for President of the United States.
It all started at the top of that Golden Escalator in Trump Tower.
After all the indictments, witch hunts, hoaxes, campaigns, assassination attempts, **I must say that I regret nothing!**
I had the audacity to say what others wouldn’t:
**AMERICA WAS GONE!**
Open Borders, Major Crime, Unsafe Cities, No More American Jobs... Obama spit in the face of Americans.
**I COULDN’T STAND BY WHILE OUR ONCE GREAT COUNTRY DISAPPEARED!**
So, when I descended the Golden Escalator and launched the great political movement in American history - **THE MAGA MOVEMENT** \- I did it because of you.
The forgotten men and women of America would be forgotten no longer.
_[I AM DONALD TRUMP, and I became, and still am, your voice! The farmers, the factory workers, the police, the moms and dads, our great TROOPS - I LOVE YOU!](https://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kcFu4yAURb8G74jggSFZeJHGsWZaqdPOjBRNNxYFHFMBRjZxlL8f2UqzvZz3uAdUSN51twrJJwTQOzMhAMT2CGD_Dqc_f-3RSkwJm7E62ufX5RQOd3SGBxy1ev8X9Ft5aj6m-PJy-kn48TrTB59vyT7o-60bG5TzSyrrwlSgt6B1YSsqS0J2JSOs6CvgHDSjXAq53WmlgQpO-Lbcbfmn4IQUrgICJRFUUMl4KTY7ZqQUphOflltFDeLk6uLGDFF585XHS0gbPYTCV33OaVorNQiayerLaDdXF0drFgJBs9I4quyWaayHEFzO1uKvTiNofMJ9h1cNTAm-WTVOeOhwUGeFWHPJoQ3WuEtArL7LiiWchsuoLWK1T61Pbd_dc61CUu4cEau_pdocdUvJunrolsV4pm3ftWbt1vr0PTvEbGNGrF5Ms0Ug2uidQax-fjpcVX2sf-zXcP1mVn_8_sUO9u11LsbKpKvz3k1CIk7OS9P1ieYK_gcAAP__Rbequw)_

name: Voter Verification Notice (2)
subject: 7 POINTS in the WRONG direction!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Peter,

This isn't any easy pill to swallow...

As recently as last month, we reached out to inform you of key polling that gave Republicans an 8-point lead over the Democrats for control of the House and Senate.

But now, a brand new poll gives the __DEMOCRATS__ a **1-POINT** edge. _That 's a full 9-point swing!_

Like we've always said, we can have the best polls and the highest enthusiasm, but without a complete and verified voter census from every state in the nation, we'll LOSE to the Democrats.

And with the margins now as tight as 1 point - well within the MARGIN OF ERROR - every GOP voter profile matters.

_In fact, we 've identified YOUR profile as the difference maker in your zip code._

As recently as last month, we reached out to inform you of key polling that gave Republicans an 8-point lead over the Democrats for control of the House and Senate. But now, a brand new poll gives the DEMOCRATS a 1-POINT edge. That 's a full 9-point swing! Like we've always said, we can have the best polls and the highest enthusiasm, but without a complete and verified voter census from every state in the nation, we'll LOSE to the Democrats. And with the margins now as tight as 1 point - well within the MARGIN OF ERROR - every GOP voter profile matters. In fact, we 've identified YOUR profile as the difference maker in your zip code. Which is why we were so disheartened to see that it was still Thank you, Voter Verification Questionnaire 2025 Polling Team From: Voter Verification Notice Date: Tue, May 6, 2025 Subject: Verification needed for your zip code Peter, Republicans now have an 8-POINT LEAD over Democrats for control of the House and Senate. But here's the thing... ... None of that matters unless EVERY Republican completes and verifies their Voter Profile for 2025. We can have the best polls and the highest enthusiasm, but without a complete and verified voter census from every state in the nation, we 'll lose to the Democrats. name: Jim Marchant
subject: President Trump Did the Right Thing
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marchant for Nevada
body:
When others stayed silent President Trump took action. I stand with him and always will.
| | | | | [](https://sb6nl6fbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001v4G_iefDdVwDHq_IiNgsYJdjScJbdFiGBeAvCwT41iRdDqcrPAgE32yGkFwhPnwDYVuMScO2ubseyORvIkD6KoNTMbEZRBE7I-6av0RnTM61DH2sZ1kAoxzEzsv_s-rprIyQoT0xS7lj9GBZTDGHh-VgBEJxWYD4&c=NS1d1PLtIify23t4HWppN02E26-NS5LtD7VNlynHqS5M9L_LrK7h7w==&ch=wS-2HHB_L9M1xhc0TfxxJkQm21Hoypx92qIoF9oR5m2ML3ObJ-Fa_g==)
---
| Peter,
---

What happened in California was a disgrace. The radical left was looking for chaos and violence. President Trump stepped up and made the call to keep Americans safe. That is exactly what a leader does. While weak politicians hid and made excuses President Trump took action. I back his decision one hundred percent. We need fighters in Washington who will stand with him when it counts. That is why I am running for Congress. The people of Nevada deserve someone who will not back down when our country is on the line.
I will always stand with President Trump and the America First movement. No excuses. No second-guessing.

---
For Nevada, for freedom, and for America,
Jim Marchant Republican Candidate for U.S. Congress - NV01 [JimMarchant.com](https://sb6nl6fbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001v4G_iefDdVwDHq_IiNgsYJdjScJbdFiGBeAvCwT41iRdDqcrPAgE32yGkFwhPnwDYVuMScO2ubseyORvIkD6KoNTMbEZRBE7I-6av0RnTM61DH2sZ1kAoxzEzsv_s-rprIyQoT0xS7kgmWV0A3zb9-PFOndpy8tk&c=NS1d1PLtIify23t4HWppN02E26-NS5LtD7VNlynHqS5M9L_LrK7h7w==&ch=wS-2HHB_L9M1xhc0TfxxJkQm21Hoypx92qIoF9oR5m2ML3ObJ-Fa_g==)

subject: Do the courts have the final say on the U.S. Constitution?
body:
CNN claims, “There are warnings that the U.S. is dangerously close to a constitutional crisis.”

| _Please see a special message from our sponsor. [](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/c/mkcOGGzPCqs0Cjch8bBFKIqLb6LmKTd6IUhDsDXrZWj_jgTevnxpj4ZAWBJzLtQDusyGoLLwUkM-NlmpkcSE4izfjY9paKl-nUNjbk2tody_s8tcjPVYVWJMubkXEQNJ0QeAzMIjl6ejhcU-1lLtKye7eqUuNk923Msk9h1GdGWy5flAbSQozPns31mgir8Pk_dgD2t0dptdB6LWDt6LD1HgBGyb9RTHMfmr6MYXrlNMrpZM03cHtGcJm7VAeN6n3elm2pKReLkhuq_jt31v7t2oiJYVOFsu5OcGVXN36Kg_PgGVaKWLqCpuXqUsEEY7zAWRqiMiSCfYRdKRYFBhngfwB787Y_ds8RwVwvNPHsCLvAoKXsLE9dKw05vyowzFOLKJ32lT1wUUh88nNqH6bW9bqhY9NzcLZ3LJNW2J3qAu_qnioJzAKeJSq8poVIMvMuWB79jJ4xIaYNoaJu7foaZ89Q5Pc_7YhaWaXbLcYhquexwmeTZ5NWpcnc1pTME8B-jsLIiPCqVGdcf6SqrulM-e7c7RRgZt-pUz8gsqrMWibMTFdeYImVpoGDIKcAJAw8iNXpAfW1s-ZtVGnv2FU6IVJuUOoVKHv0YfZ3HVdjzhKQUQA0ihC3bbH_MTUCtwvxhaklq-qsEIS05bJK3NBCKFLH3Fp2iz5dBhzCRRMG0DPOvCc5oRqSOkz245BhJ1t0rYFU5McnA2ofL1RAELn0YyG30CZiPUVYOi_PvbWFYGHKOkNDQ7hAw2fYEsVlCC1OF4GgWDsoP6qAVLZzwN/lUEh7DMaojdwMLZDMpoUUdMT4s5gfudo/10) Dear Friend, CNN claims, "There are warnings that the U.S. is dangerously close to a constitutional crisis."

There is a constitutional crisis, but it's not what CNN thinks it is.

**The far-Left wants the current administration to obey the dictates of federal district court judges rather than the will of a majority of the American people.**

But do federal judges control the executive branch? Does the judicial branch have the final say in determining what is or is not constitutional?

Because the far-Left has undermined informed patriotism by promoting a distorted view of our nation's history and Constitution--including the judicial branch--many Americans do not know the answers to these questions.

That's why your participation in Hillsdale College's [**National Survey on the U.S. Judicial Branch**](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/c/iljVSPuQKEjMWEQP7XvhFcwqaAOthVOyABmVXWPJ-wDET3q5knu6Ep6D8zq1Bwp4jtOXLooDjWDS_XoTkb9Cz8VaFbFSRZFnceoRTFxhKx8ZWRjGFbeTOiprrVzSIqsobUkQasavzDbBDygzj4sxkQKKqbesaPPt_p2QD1TKFxLpnFu4YTQ94edh-RMXBLC_gMfOyvHK9nsA80qF0Hagaonv0UGYeX_JzYgoPfBhUpd6-8jwfE0T4GlIrKCEpMc4-rJc1CyNzpF-1tg10A-e7BMs33Uzm-oTAbJl4nqmrIO0ScECIlhoeucdDMkihEn1fdGfejIgxWzd82Y6c3tEN8t584jR60aoaSMgpquxpM7rUxew-mL98yFW70pEkPvJ8zNOxQ0e2JGLyXU1jTnwSDUUlNDLfq_PlhauHbqujjheWilq_qozTyIb50bpBURsH16WpGZuxnYbT_K17eeABYtcdCbBkSKJPV5zpuE7ZQKWg8HLokA91qbcPL5NBneqTtpq1sRSGeuXwrTNLLhRRePvJ0yNkdu6-RL9Tw2PHUkrzWCAQVojoFFeHMCpy_xLKFFw_JbjGspzodxGWcTrjfsYPQAavfbj5AtpZtg6_91I95swaL5PM-loyY3cE0ZMbwwGtJg0PcXTaN0yEGe8nEwEOZFLAuKoScPkAEavuq12u-_n61araKFOEX7YzCYEAAoiPxFXzxLF4-sPKXkS5dgI0DPhZ4SfW-ij5wbGqKLEzOVWa6anW05lpRaLPaIaveLTjJa3ZqBUg18Rsd8w/RH-UCMMkHCJxLsl6gzf32oy8bYvChc-7/10) is urgently requested.

Your response will only take a few minutes, and the survey topic is crucial to the future of liberty and separation of powers in America.

You will help Hillsdale College form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the separation of powers and checks and balances--including the judiciary's proper role in our government.

You can easily complete your **National Survey on the U.S. Judicial Branch** using this secure link:

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/national-survey-on-the-us-judicial-branch**](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/c/_mEveiO_XYHElnb3DywqaZzNkCEvfvbYVUeTwmM-9yyO-yF7b8KO6OoxYRWa1Ixsd51bIMgpaG0KLSOogY2pIjfcbVw829U0YJxQjFRD13klMVupc4PaewsofaCAp_hMPxI62gAl9G4fE9uch9emVx00T1GtS7vNYlwfjy2qCTbpYRhM9oyHkuZc2vrDFNiotz4soQJxBLGbTLrAX2s-M8k_VIUpS4Nd2DB3eZOir2DqjHUauDrKLaM0WN7cG5hbjenbCD0_E-pyNelvVZyVlbocXKNcdJeRHhYdzWK4jK3QmxAMP_xT9Jv04azxqTzvLav-X3DPFM8EDU1lTDFdGECqLYKK1nUv527XOmNOAKw0dwrDg0GWarh9YmB_gRrxjoVAMwqdZ6vyK8zMdfJFBsRQNwPRGws18HvRQzrRN2PiiwdPS0T-CxIsajNrhw4EVRlQpxDFGof8Xv6-fVv2c1G8nsR7fJsCM6XSoSYAizI3iyMGw0wj6reTIDTCXHoi4dyMECHTq49ShfCNnlcBylg4EtDrub5D802gMMDBldO6rFknt-KT752qnIlsgUfxXqqb095vzFalLH2BL0KxItAGppj0jgRCv_V7_IvWq2D-6FAZzRhTHBlgOeIyXNGqAaFNMbuOG7KJhyDMMGT2DH8Dkvp6MerMClM2k1uwwJpNQA-MbWzKEVhRQem8-Q0BQG86H4PFbaQOpAMmXrvWiMtT_05g0VXDULnwC11RN4fsl2IdXKWvP3Y4HpHc9P7PzrJFgJaG0acZFyMpO_T8/6ifFaSeNhEl_EBF5kdQvnzXHKc7syxTG/10)

clean_body: CNN claims, “There are warnings that the U.S. is dangerously close to a constitutional crisis.” | Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this Dear Friend, CNN claims, "There are warnings that the U.S. is dangerously close to a constitutional crisis." There is a constitutional crisis, but it's not what CNN thinks it is. The far-Left wants the current administration to obey the dictates of federal district court judges rather than the will of a majority of the American people. But do federal judges control the executive branch? Does the judicial branch have the final say in determining what is or is not constitutional? Because the far-Left has undermined informed patriotism by promoting a distorted view of our nation's history and Constitution--including the judicial branch--many Americans do not know the answers to these questions. That's why your participation in Hillsdale College's is urgently requested. Your response will only take a few minutes, and the survey topic is crucial to the future of liberty and separation of powers in America. You will help Hillsdale College form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the separation of powers and checks and balances--including the judiciary's proper role in our government. You can easily complete your National Survey on the U.S. Judicial Branch using this secure link: Thank you for your time and attention--and for joining us in the defense of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 | .

We need your voice now

| Hi team,

**We wanted to follow up because the attacks on Social Security are not slowing down, and we can’t afford to stay silent.**

Donald Trump promised not to touch Social Security.

But once in office, he launched one of the most aggressive rollbacks in the program’s history — **slashing staff, closing offices, and making it harder for seniors and people with disabilities to access the benefits they’ve earned.**

This is a direct attack on some of the most vulnerable members of our communities. _That’s why we need your voice now._

**[Will you stand with us and sign the petition to defend Social Security before midnight?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109699771/551947437/840040074?refcode=NDCAF_20250616_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_NS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwN2MyZGZiYy1kYjRhLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yYjFNkwmnUhdnYaq8sYeCthjnC3sAj7xdKRiJV0nQQQ=&emci=9cafae26-cb4a-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=07c2dfbc-db4a-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=48524772)** | [ADD YOUR NAME TO DEFEND SOCIAL SECURITY »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109699772/551947439/840040074?refcode=NDCAF_20250616_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_NS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwN2MyZGZiYy1kYjRhLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yYjFNkwmnUhdnYaq8sYeCthjnC3sAj7xdKRiJV0nQQQ=&emci=9cafae26-cb4a-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=07c2dfbc-db4a-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=48524772)

**Since elected, Trump’s administration has:**

\- Cut the Social Security Administration’s staffing by 7,000 jobs – 12% of the workforce
\- Closed regional offices, cutting off access to rural and disabled Seniors
\- Created longer wait times for recipients to receive their benefits

**This is a de facto cut to a program millions of Americans rely on for financial security.**

_We need to fight back now_ – when it’s still possible for us to reverse course and prevent further harm to Social Security and Americans who rely on it for financial security.

body:
Voter Action Project [https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2?am=25.00&contactdata=DLkh9jhyRu6FU29QcuRk5OppCKau/sYwA4xgWaHPW7DLnmsZ5D3IgOr8ULwWqPRDYB+Qh836Xcbbtdth7HzbH6Lz6riUmGRshuxNegtGbQY=]
Bolts: Native Leaders Organize to Defend Alaska’s Ranked Choice Voting System [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/EA/EA007/1/89215/images/Bolts_RankedChoiceVoting.png]
Friend - "Ranked choice" voting is a popular tool in the push to make the voting process more democratic and enable citizens to have a greater voice when they go to the polls.
If you’ve never heard of it, the explanation is simple : the voter gets to rank the candidates in the order they prefer them, instead of just picking one. This helps empower a diverse slate of candidates and also acknowledges that, if your first choice didn’t win, you’d certainly prefer a second candidate who more closely resembles your beliefs rather than having the other main party win by default.
The use of ranked choice voting is still being discussed, including states like Alaska, where an effort is underway to get rid of it.
With the debate continuing, we need to know how interested you are in fighting for the implementation of ranked-choice voting.
Do you approve of ranked choice voting?
By clicking a response below your answer will be automatically recorded:

Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2?am=25.00&contactdata=DLkh9jhyRu6FU29QcuRk5OppCKau/sYwA4xgWaHPW7DLnmsZ5D3IgOr8ULwWqPRDYB+Qh836Xcbbtdth7HzbH6Lz6riUmGRshuxNegtGbQY=]

We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. name: Cole at The Flyover
subject: A Note from Cole
body:
| | |

| | |
# Monday, June 16, 2025
---|---
Hello!
Let me tell you a quick story about one of my favorite _Flyover_ sponsors--**[LMNT.](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJysj7FywyAQRL9GdNYAQidRUKRR57QpGaw7LBIEHnxjT_4-I6fID6TefW92P87-HFJO5foednIcq0fCtAYm9IWe90zM1HwolSm2uq81k9dSjycJJwU-74X_CCXQRSJNgyCnplFKOw2zFZvTCLhaO5h1vmAYEcmGcZ402AhoLlEkd1glKFCztGbuIxkJZgBEGNUEU2ckYeLa-s-aCm8U83d9UOvXuovsNuZbN7x1eun0gi2Vr2PaEXZ6WX6rojm8PVPO6f7yXfeQ8ovnf7j-cPonAAD___1-cBA)**
My wife and I bought a house a few years ago. It came with one feature we did not like--a backyard full of river rock.
Sure, they're good for the water bill. What they're _not_ good for is four-year-old boys who love to throw rocks, like my son. Instead of constantly replacing my windows and apologizing to the neighbors for missiles flying over the fence, I decided to replace the rock with grass.
It was a hot, sweaty landscaping project under the summertime sun, [and I needed electrolytes in a major way.](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJysj7FywyAQRL9GdNYAQidRUKRR57QpGaw7LBIEHnxjT_4-I6fID6TefW92P87-HFJO5foednIcq0fCtAYm9IWe90zM1HwolSm2uq81k9dSjycJJwU-74X_CCXQRSJNgyCnplFKOw2zFZvTCLhaO5h1vmAYEcmGcZ402AhoLlEkd1glKFCztGbuIxkJZgBEGNUEU2ckYeLa-s-aCm8U83d9UOvXuovsNuZbN7x1eun0gi2Vr2PaEXZ6WX6rojm8PVPO6f7yXfeQ8ovnf7j-cPonAAD___1-cBA)
Luckily, [LMNT had just sent me a sample pack of its hydration mix.](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJysj7FywyAQRL9GdNYAQidRUKRR57QpGaw7LBIEHnxjT_4-I6fID6TefW92P87-HFJO5foednIcq0fCtAYm9IWe90zM1HwolSm2uq81k9dSjycJJwU-74X_CCXQRSJNgyCnplFKOw2zFZvTCLhaO5h1vmAYEcmGcZ402AhoLlEkd1glKFCztGbuIxkJZgBEGNUEU2ckYeLa-s-aCm8U83d9UOvXuovsNuZbN7x1eun0gi2Vr2PaEXZ6WX6rojm8PVPO6f7yXfeQ8ovnf7j-cPonAAD___1-cBA)
It did the trick. [LMNT has a blend of sodium, potassium, and magnesium](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJysj7FywyAQRL9GdNYAQidRUKRR57QpGaw7LBIEHnxjT_4-I6fID6TefW92P87-HFJO5foednIcq0fCtAYm9IWe90zM1HwolSm2uq81k9dSjycJJwU-74X_CCXQRSJNgyCnplFKOw2zFZvTCLhaO5h1vmAYEcmGcZ402AhoLlEkd1glKFCztGbuIxkJZgBEGNUEU2ckYeLa-s-aCm8U83d9UOvXuovsNuZbN7x1eun0gi2Vr2PaEXZ6WX6rojm8PVPO6f7yXfeQ8ovnf7j-cPonAAD___1-cBA) that defies outdated government recommendations and gives you the salt intake that recent science says you _actually_ need to stay hydrated.
[**I couldn 't recommend LMNT more.**](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJysj7FywyAQRL9GdNYAQidRUKRR57QpGaw7LBIEHnxjT_4-I6fID6TefW92P87-HFJO5foednIcq0fCtAYm9IWe90zM1HwolSm2uq81k9dSjycJJwU-74X_CCXQRSJNgyCnplFKOw2zFZvTCLhaO5h1vmAYEcmGcZ402AhoLlEkd1glKFCztGbuIxkJZgBEGNUEU2ckYeLa-s-aCm8U83d9UOvXuovsNuZbN7x1eun0gi2Vr2PaEXZ6WX6rojm8PVPO6f7yXfeQ8ovnf7j-cPonAAD___1-cBA) Even if you don't have a manual labor project on your hands, you still need to be hydrated!
And with temps rising across the country, staying on top of hydration is more important than ever. [Our friends at LMNT can help--_The Flyover_ readers get **a free sample pack** with any order.](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJysj7FywyAQRL9GdNYAQidRUKRR57QpGaw7LBIEHnxjT_4-I6fID6TefW92P87-HFJO5foednIcq0fCtAYm9IWe90zM1HwolSm2uq81k9dSjycJJwU-74X_CCXQRSJNgyCnplFKOw2zFZvTCLhaO5h1vmAYEcmGcZ402AhoLlEkd1glKFCztGbuIxkJZgBEGNUEU2ckYeLa-s-aCm8U83d9UOvXuovsNuZbN7x1eun0gi2Vr2PaEXZ6WX6rojm8PVPO6f7yXfeQ8ovnf7j-cPonAAD___1-cBA) Eight flavors, including exclusives, on the house.
**Try it now and stay ahead of the summer heat.**
Stay salty, -- Cole, _CEO_ | | [Unsubscribe from promotional offers, but continue to receive _The Flyover_](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJys0L9uwyAQx_GngS0RHAbHA0OlyFvasSPizxFTYRMBSdS3r5IOXTJ2_37upN_nyZxsymk7v9sVdY_FBAzJ247BbHhvGXvHauxWOsZaVl8yGmAgd0ztuDJ53fqf4DToiAgoKGo-SsamURwmumjpPPdSShAOcBJeqNEFBdbbgU3CO5r04ypTXPEDm4bDPuLA1CBUCEryUY1kYBhSL3X_VdLWF4z5u9yw7n1ZadZL75dGxBuBmcBcYsTaXpQE5uvWrq75mhw-YjE7Io4fT0BAIRHHcLmnnFN7Pj2vNuVfquKFiCMBuQZpFtsWApJW_Tqn_R_mvGn4CQAA___EGIqx) [Unsubscribe from all _The Flyover_ emails](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyskLuOqzAYhJ_G7hL5gi8ULo6E6JL2lJbBv4NXBiP4SZS3X2VX2m1Sbv_NN5r5f_GXkEtebtcwg8NUfYSYx4AQ_QKPvQAibD4sFSFtdR5rAS-YUCemT1z7Mi_4m-A0ugQgQFJw3CjGWiNtSyenB2MDM9aYJgqR7GisanQrZZA8JCNodi8r01xzy9rGnhM0TDdSx6gVN9qQhkHMWLfzR80LTpDKs95hO491psVNiOtO5D8ieiL6umI98A1JRH8s-zHs45YHeMGyH4jsupDL83T9WUyEBiK7uD5yKXn_qr_NIZdviU4rkR0Rao7KT2GfiFB0c-9xin9w7N2JzwAAAP__traN8Q) [ ](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJys0D9vwyAUBPBPY7ZEgPnngaFLtnTtiIh52K_CYOGXRP32VbN06dj97nfSfVzDNWLBurzHDTzlFhIknCNBChWeRwEi6CHWRpB72-ZWIEgu9YmbkzChbJV-G4IlnwEkjAy8sJrzyY5uYqt3M5dOKmFBO825tjdQyYwq6Si0nRJD_6NyI4xwfFLunEFxo0aTktHCGjsoDgmp9fNnw0or5PLVHtDPc9tY8SvRfgzj2yAvg7zc63G_HXPHG_wRH-RlbRUXansWrPu0P7EUPF4jyxaxvFD6hz8eXn4HAAD__7G_dy4)

subject: Pete Hegseth tears up in shocking new statement as Marines deploy to Los Angeles.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GOD, FAMILY, COUNTRY PAC
body:
Please take 1 second to read.

| | | | | "Due to increased threats to federal law enforcement officers and federal buildings, approximately 700 active-duty U.S. Marines from Camp Pendleton are being deployed to Los Angeles to restore order." "We have an obligation to defend federal law enforcement officers - even if Gavin Newsom will not." \- Pete Hegseth
---

[](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/u5jd-wrAieWYFzkCpmJ_IA~~/AARclBA~/aPt-PhgsT5GMvRdu5GX_GNgHze9Ljcianq7amISvOee9dIMbrJfYtcc-GrtlqNq-IeupDl94aps0t1UXBBlJdk660MW08Uu0O0Q26zqTid3LaE3EUtHsSGhNCoGyski9S2aMQlj4irbdYxVk8mEG0UYxVmAAj52ZMMrZ8WJHnMbQG5m4xiZ5KbpeokU6Dje9FgXiwOk_zyLLdD6KJf3YfVOyb_hfAeijdPxHB5YiyHRTnACFTnJc7luYQPWSoTjKahcycg_IsAOA8qKCq7YlX_FryI9rnviZUsDgkeADAKJYHC7vkZBXRUvJJjSzQ02B93Cdybm6PrbqhNCHkGOlIMEIaPfJYEx8q3z06C-eaDg~)

**While Gavin Newsom lets California burn and innocent Americans suffer, President Trump and Pete Hegseth are doing all that they can to stop it.** **The sad truth is** : Democrats don't give a damn about the consequences of their own actions. They've let illegal immigrants run wild, major cities collapse, and now American taxpayers are footing the bill. The only thing standing in their way are active duty Marines, who have been deployed to stop the chaos. **But as you 're reading this message, the city of LA and the Democrats who run it are violently opposing Marine presence.** **Violent protests are everywhere, spitting in the faces of our men in uniform and disrespecting the American flag.** [It is with a heavy heart that we ask you to stand with the Marines - your voice of support will fuel them in the fight for our country.](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/u5jd-wrAieWYFzkCpmJ_IA~~/AARclBA~/aPt-PhgsT5GMvRdu5GX_GNgHze9Ljcianq7amISvOee9dIMbrJfYtcc-GrtlqNq-IeupDl94aps0t1UXBBlJdk660MW08Uu0O0Q26zqTid3LaE3EUtHsSGhNCoGyski9S2aMQlj4irbdYxVk8mEG0UYxVmAAj52ZMMrZ8WJHnMbQG5m4xiZ5KbpeokU6Dje9FgXiwOk_zyLLdD6KJf3YfVOyb_hfAeijdPxHB5YiyHRTnACFTnJc7luYQPWSoTjKahcycg_IsAOA8qKCq7YlX_FryI9rnviZUsDgkeADAKJYHC7vkZBXRUvJJjSzQ02B93Cdybm6PrbqhNCHkGOlIMEIaPfJYEx8q3z06C-eaDg~)

[SUPPORT THE MARINES](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/u5jd-wrAieWYFzkCpmJ_IA~~/AARclBA~/aPt-PhgsT5GMvRdu5GX_GNgHze9Ljcianq7amISvOee9dIMbrJfYtcc-GrtlqNq-IeupDl94aps0t1UXBBlJdk660MW08Uu0O0Q26zqTid3LaE3EUtHsSGhNCoGyski9S2aMQlj4irbdYxVk8mEG0UYxVmAAj52ZMMrZ8WJHnMbQG5m4xiZ5KbpeokU6Dje9FgXiwOk_zyLLdD6KJf3YfVOyb_hfAeijdPxHB5YiyHRTnACFTnJc7luYQPWSoTjKahcycg_IsAOA8qKCq7YlX_FryI9rnviZUsDgkeADAKJYHC7vkZBXRUvJJjSzQ02B93Cdybm6PrbqhNCHkGOlIMEIaPfJYEx8q3z06C-eaDg~)

subject: Wesley just delivered $8 million for St. Louis.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BELL FOR MISSOURI
body:
Peter,

In case you missed it: **Wesley secured $8 million in federal funding for St. Louis Lambert International Airport!**

_Why does this matter?_

Because investments like this aren’t just about airports — _they’re about:_

✅ Creating good-paying, union jobs for working families;

✅ Upgrading the infrastructure St. Louisians depend on;

✅ Boosting economic opportunity across our region;

✅ Making sure St. Louis gets its fair share of federal dollars.

Peter, for too long, our communities have been overlooked while career politicians focus on petty politics.

Wesley made it clear — _**he’s in Congress to deliver for St. Louis, and he’s proving what’s possible when you put people first.**_

_But we can’t slow down now._

[**Our mid-month fundraising deadline for June is just around the corner, and we need your help to keep this momentum going. body:
[](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/FrJFY30MWwzgA8CwNypNGvXzcuTS3hBZvWqBoHBEGL4SDtWnmp4BwABVlOPT4xRn0xCMXcNO0XyDcVqKLn7jXiU-jrlslDmrYBQDmiPg4xyplxH8AnBAxEOPmR4rDlcDNgg2ULWZiorIh95qJsGsFgUaguLc1hTM7vJyn7I2HBcYW5cPd7ZrIU3QetgIZYo5XoDYo_XSeUSwoTuva3ivkeOWyAwjf0PhXMaLTzY4RIAvsfI0YFQWEaFL0NCHE-lRsq_bfcapzdtQUnocHX4sVJfuODo4gl2QjCRd2qa5gULgu0MTbvFmxJfH_sIkuvyjXyF03XEiEbbezV2GKn87-sNlBj8BlBAsFpLyYu_eF3LPzbRDuCTvbf3RZL9diLHOzyiiuAXK_QgWFvI2ExdWAbNCV53ivZtAAYYSb7vu90UunvOvF6fpcciNSC-HmKqqYa_rtr6NeOneVBXPQ_wbnnlFPIkfQ-b8GKlByxQ4Az9RWPvR0eaecAaZyqD76HpjC4HWUuZIukmKGE1_btcSxtHNo8XAwcJymx1aBNun3S4-bqSG4Jyt4DI3-AtqYxtfqEmPqDXjbO30ThF3BDD-zW2_BRgl9qPYnlu2vjrk3TkBrXB7lsjYRSN6NmdejEoziWAyha8u4eaqFPwgygFSQQ1HWrj7fYIyEDj6wUlR0TeYMxM4GO6P_dyvHS3XgKlCQ_RXQc2JjSzHfyxgpk7W6vdFzhTCmDDlQuM5ufMB1cncsD_tXspDOfYH1euqV1OVORTQOG_1wR9LfRlsKUiBX6blj_l4YTjI9PX9biLQU6NqgkooXvruGVGaD82EhP1qH-0lKegNpDmMxQ_7Wrp-rt-AJA/9JuyIM3VCQYZ4EN2i7I_uuRALtz66Gj4/10)Peter,
President Trump is DONE playing nice.
He's calling to lock up the dregs of society--the criminals, the anarchists, the thugs--on ALCATRAZ. Yes, THE Alcatraz.
And now, the House GOP is watching to see if America is ready to get tough again.

name: Sarah Huckabee Sanders
subject: I really think you're going to want to be a part of this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Huck PAC, Inc
body:
Are we really going to hand power back over to the Democrats by walking into the same trap we walked into in 2018?| | |
#
---
---
# __[_GOV.__Sarah Huckabee Sanders_](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=0b3fb51d80f440a389b1d2d36ace7b8d&_e=8Ct03LxqYiztc95q5d8nXMw_F2fKRuN7qO7_A3I7iqJnnNsca7rVpuevYytzzFjEPysL_hovepv17UN2ZyQRgpH4D6HQLI1u5VTs-pdOZbulyaGEdGmiTTKRzKHDdr3Hy3CDQ5mYD7pXb8TQ5eLd2HaVWLmMENa1Js0B-x59CT_5x2gfarZ16md5WNDSsna79sHToREH3L0iaFnJszH8mivTLGo-F33oz6mSHBxnrAe-0xRG0Q41mIKVYa7yN_uX) __
---
ForHUCK PAC for America
---
| | Dear Peter,Are we really going to do this? Are we really going to hand power back over to the Democrats by walking into the same trap we walked into in 2018?2 years before that happened the last time, in 2016, President Trump had just won a shocking victory against Hillary Clinton...We held the House and Senate...The wall was being built... The word “inflation” was nowhere to be heard...And America was starting to get back on track.Then -- a little less than 2 years before the last mid-term election in 2018 -- we took our eye off the ball...Republicans stopped giving...Stopped showing up for special elections... And in 2018 we handed the U.S. House of Representatives over to Nancy Pelosi, Adam Schiff, the “squad” and the rest of the America-last Radicals who turned the second half of President Trump’s administration into a circus.Now look at 2025...just weeks into President Trump’s second term...WE LOST THE FIRST FIVE SPECIAL ELECTIONS IN A ROW
---
\-- Republicans are not showing up...
---
THE DEMOCRATS ARE ALREADY OUTRAISING US BY A MILE
---
\-- Republicans are not giving...
---
I spent the first 2 years of my term as Governor trying to un-do what Biden was doing, so I could lead my state forward. I was thrilled when President Trump won because I don’t want to go back to Joe Biden’s America. Let me be clear: that is where we are going if Democrats regain control of Congress. If we want things to go differently this time -- if we want President Trump to get a chance to FINISH the good work that he has started -- we need to come together as Conservatives to build a hedge of protection around our razor-thin majority in the U.S. House of Representatives. That’s not something you get started on in the final months and weeks leading up to an election -- **[It’s time for action -- NOW](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=0b3fb51d80f440a389b1d2d36ace7b8d&_e=8Ct03LxqYiztc95q5d8nXMw_F2fKRuN7qO7_A3I7iqJnnNsca7rVpuevYytzzFjEPysL_hovepv17UN2ZyQRgpH4D6HQLI1u5VTs-pdOZbtdAhTzaogkNziY-eKtgoq-si4dzCD1YGBibXAGeXpPsuTfvH1sLvsvPTfHIhQ1R68SfTOH_k0w11yPJUIV1TlNMhUL6srLhJ84zJfT1tHq609VldqB70tddWS7-pY4VxFzhWnI0qXKuG6b8yHR1oKV)**
---
This brings me to why I wrote to you today and why I need your help. Huck PAC for America was my dad’s vision to fight smarter against the Democrats.Before President Trump asked him to serve as Ambassador to Israel, Dad served and campaigned at just about every level of American politics -- so he’s seen firsthand how the Democrats have for years tried to outwork, outraise and outsmart us.For 17 years, Huck PAC for America has changed the game in American politics.Dad’s vision has since grown into one of the most influential political action committees in the country -- donating more than 8 MILLION DOLLARS to committed Conservatives since 2020._Huck PAC for America_ has reached more than 18 million voters... In 2024, they helped flip 10 Democrat seats to Republican -- I have very little confidence that there would be a Republican Majority to protect this time around if Huck PAC wouldn’t have been there, My Friend...And I’m worried we won’t be able to save it if we don’t get started now.
---
That’s why I can write to you today without reservation to tell you that **[your one-time gift of $35 to Huck PAC for America today](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=0b3fb51d80f440a389b1d2d36ace7b8d&_e=8Ct03LxqYiztc95q5d8nXMw_F2fKRuN7qO7_A3I7iqJnnNsca7rVpuevYytzzFjEPysL_hovepv17UN2ZyQRgpH4D6HQLI1u5VTs-pdOZbs48aNHDYGNa-8Uxv3KME8cx_2mt7UY4rA34kh9AqihaQdFs1AvMw6cXPYy-095YTWMNpN0jfQoGUBbcAog1boeiprfQ05pp2VmsB3pbqgn6fT3m5epHz7aiKYou1lTdpzudPK6KIAyUIx2-MjQeHzH)** can make an exponential impact on whether we walk into the same trap we did in 2018... ...or if we wake up the day after the 2026 mid-terms to another 2 years of President Trump working side-by-side with Committed, Conservative Legislators to COMPLETE the work the American People sent him to Washington to finally get done.
---
If you do decide to join the work of Huck PAC for America today, then we are well on our way to holding off the Democrat assault on our thin majority in the House of Representatives. I can’t promise you we will win -- **[but I can promise your $35 will be put to work right away](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=0b3fb51d80f440a389b1d2d36ace7b8d&_e=8Ct03LxqYiztc95q5d8nXMw_F2fKRuN7qO7_A3I7iqJnnNsca7rVpuevYytzzFjEPysL_hovepv17UN2ZyQRgpH4D6HQLI1u5VTs-pdOZbsoZDgaSbyxOSrm25DIjPo4mNDa9CzkuxZMeD9TW47HGyJLoahA4Hk2RmOD9h964hqatPrFlPi2rGFyScpi1Xxkzi8ekCsScSnkzYucCYlJ-dVXGVMoTr0586FrU25SPk9vFdvi4R8xa_TLnRxWgDDa)** \-- invested in the most critical races that will ultimately decide who runs Washington after the 2026 mid-terms. I spent the first 2 years of my term as Governor doing everything I could to protect Arkansans from the economic nonsense and national security disasters coming out of Washington... With President Trump and a Republican House and Senate at the helm in Washington, I and my fellow Republican governors can fully concentrate on delivering on the things our constituents deserve -- it’s amazing what you can accomplish when Washington isn’t working AGAINST the American People!With your help, Huck PAC for America can make sure the work of the American People continues across the country -- please join us.
---
[ **JOIN US TODAY** ](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=0b3fb51d80f440a389b1d2d36ace7b8d&_e=8Ct03LxqYiztc95q5d8nXMw_F2fKRuN7qO7_A3I7iqJnnNsca7rVpuevYytzzFjEPysL_hovepv17UN2ZyQRgpH4D6HQLI1u5VTs-pdOZbsMdwMEdttA2JV1jH8WZU1VWK3S5guzRP2MjL4sGApyC3vGOc-vP1AkWsCP5hrP51Y0SAp2hhiuPQ_lwgFQyuExseXzbI-1p8ehJvPXFLanbbDxRLQcDKyQ0z15L5-n0WNcIk5jP2vR217yiq2kHOtO)
---
I am so thankful my dad had the good sense to turn his vision into a place where we can come together and pitch in our resources to make a difference. Please consider doing just that today, My Friend._**[_**Please rush back your one-time gift of $35, $50, $100, $250, $500 or even $1,000 or more to Huck PAC for America.**_](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=0b3fb51d80f440a389b1d2d36ace7b8d&_e=8Ct03LxqYiztc95q5d8nXMw_F2fKRuN7qO7_A3I7iqJnnNsca7rVpuevYytzzFjEPysL_hovepv17UN2ZyQRgpH4D6HQLI1u5VTs-pdOZbuYRIAtoy21woj9URsLs7Wso6tBgQsYsI9GOH3kRRVJ1dvKLybMLu7hCZUSqam51DH-1uvNa-ESXHzIDbrudHFj7KkI9IfQ8n3_pBYW1hxoXXnOBsU2OLpdOEAFkZ7EHZe7lMWASKcDEn4UnOnrB3uh)**_
---
God bless you,
---
| |
---
Governor Sarah Huckabee Sanders
---
| [](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=0b3fb51d80f440a389b1d2d36ace7b8d&_e=8Ct03LxqYiztc95q5d8nXMw_F2fKRuN7qO7_A3I7iqJnnNsca7rVpuevYytzzFjEPysL_hovepv17UN2ZyQRgpH4D6HQLI1u5VTs-pdOZbupDSTPEBKulyh76CGYx45tLq1gSnq6ku1vp4xSddiBt4XLLE7EGjqBkBAw1C3rUYoRNmheyllCWyL_U2hIErdL0UOXhHX6ci-gnSNaY903bEKgechLLcmXK1IBy0rReaXv9mGEICPkuaXA9bX__85w)

---

name: BPR daily PM

# Governor Mike Braun: Leading Indiana with Wellness, Innovation, and Integrity
---
| | [](http://links.email.in-gop.com/s/c/6B0ZbX58a64gFlfj6WkWBwZXvrSp_ropUPRCb8YAGso1IlP6Hnn_rxMGjG8pEyUyXOaz7JL-A7TZm8324cjBCshObopC6c3Ta1zayczRzON4Na8Yzine21lhczZU7w2smNuZc2hD8RGiRDvAdFv0TjzVzk6WCO4EmhxMFdY49r72QfpOhzya3IXgbJpVYWnwvAc1_4AhMqlY0KjrRbVKgsXigX97X397-DiDLCvSZ1QH1jkxDveYQccTPYUvbU0xFlT4jZDmwpy_frfaLnC4gfaNRaqY9zVy_1Om84dNXsHzB4sqPC8U5j-ISEWp8WU_IKm5g-RGCraM3RO1dpjJjxSOVHAgDaEgd44Je6A8oKXy/65iwCqaNuJCRz3pnaPfvH4wmh-mwYDsg/10)
---
America First Policy Institute Sarah Frey June 12, 2025
https://www.americafirstpolicy.com/issues/governor-mike-braun-leading-indiana-with-wellness-innovation-and-integrity [Click Here To Read Full Story](http://links.email.in-gop.com/s/c/OIeKylDD2LwvVVTF_1v1WKWG9JN5jpst84xYhhmgVc1_TjBxIqgQBqjKCIxFIQfEHELVOQN_cuml74TPCpduup4MYfTVqnBf53pmVpKAhAljUzdj9Ir19_BrVGFKExli4VuAiyXqhb0jP7GiSS5pKUKLLJCBsnNQNLbwTC3V_ctgqoV2rA1qS1q6FlAHGSdSjJEmBh5G6i6JuNDAS0nyZ0kohXmd8N9BRIbkaTQIQ3GMSoIzaCU8suC_dx1xBU_yjm4fbgAcxVEQJ4OEln3mj81ewdrwAGtvPiKhVPcwYiwHdnSXEGFhFNndfuR27KupLMZHyOFcf6qyMGIzN653NFgwpUPcvSkk79XGzAZYek3ztrGDKA5GYgG5RDYln7CtzYCnC3Rm4VBe-Fq0yoDSNbCvf9kNBMrddDGBxFVWXQhtJMsVja25_chZh5fkRTgHCfxyQ8nONQ1fdHtAbqhDeLsLsIkIRa3tU45h--PZyePMn_pqTSz4dXmdzbLEmaKthQaO_ivsIHcT0uEBCFIjlyaJsXgpGlV_NH6EJts9EZikd76jFkIu-K8tfZvyFdYH9KbZ7XcboG8YpbcShHz_l2RyGaWZ/J0yvEsRTncjTpuGlR5YODAiChJXKwYAB/10) Governor Mike Braun’s journey from entrepreneurial grit to national leadership paints a picture of principled conservatism rooted in real-world results. In a recent sit-down with entrepreneur and agricultural leader Sarah Frey, the Indiana Governor shared how his lived experience—building a business, raising a family, and serving in the U.S. Senate—informs his health care and agricultural reforms across the Hoosier State. **From Businessman to Statesman** Governor Braun didn’t arrive in Washington from the marble halls of academia but from the tree rows of his family farm and the grind of private enterprise. Having launched his own logistics business in 1981, Braun understood firsthand the struggles American employers face—particularly the burdens of rising health care costs. In 2008, he transformed his company’s health plan by self-insuring and focusing on wellness and prevention, not just expensive treatment. Seventeen years later, he’s proud to say there’s been **no premium increase for his employees** —a feat unheard of in the business world. **Pioneering Health Reform in the Senate** While serving on the Senate Health, Education, Labor, and Pensions Committee, Braun pushed for transparency in health care pricing, even garnering rare bipartisan support from Senator Bernie Sanders. His efforts spotlighted how broken the system is—and why real reform must come from states, not Washington bureaucrats. **SNAP Waivers and Nutritional Independence** Now as Governor, Braun has wasted no time turning bold policy into tangible change. Indiana is one of the earliest states to receive a **SNAP nutritional waiver** , empowering low-income residents to access healthier food options. Governor Braun emphasizes that **nutrition must be the cornerstone** of any meaningful food assistance program, noting, “Wholesome food is where our taxpayer dollars should go.” **Executive Orders for Farm-to-Table Innovation** Earlier this year, Braun signed executive orders aimed at revolutionizing how fresh produce reaches Indiana tables. His administration is assembling task forces to explore local food infrastructure, reduce reliance on ultra-processed products, and foster **farm diversification**. He sees a future where year-round hydroponic farming, not just seasonal farm stands, supplies Indiana families with fresh fruits and vegetables. **An Entrepreneurial Approach to Governance** Braun’s philosophy as Governor is simple: empower citizens and cut red tape. He likens good governance to entrepreneurship—**thinking outside the box, taking calculated risks, and ensuring growth**. In agriculture, that means supporting farmers not just as producers but as innovators. His work on the **Growing Climate Solutions Act** as a Senator paved the way for rewarding environmental stewardship without regulatory overreach. **Partnership with Secretary Rollins and USDA** The Governor also praised Secretary Rollins’ leadership at the USDA, celebrating a productive day in Washington where states aligned on strategies to improve food systems and public health. Braun noted the enthusiasm in the room, saying “Now we’ve got an administration that’s going to be behind innovation.” It was a stark contrast to his Senate years, where progress often stalled in the gridlock of the Capitol. **Indiana: A State Poised for Growth** With ample water, fertile soil, and a governor focused on maximizing both, Indiana is becoming a beacon for food innovation and health-first policies. “We live within our means,” Braun remarked, contrasting Indiana’s fiscal responsibility with federal dysfunction. His goal is nothing short of transformational: a state where farmers thrive, families flourish, and health care empowers rather than burdens. **Final Thoughts** Governor Mike Braun’s leadership exemplifies what happens when conservative principles meet real-world application. From challenging Big Insurance to championing food sovereignty, he’s proving that **states led by patriots with courage and clarity** can chart a new path for the nation. Stay tuned for more conversations with America’s conservative leaders who are fighting every day to put **America First** —in our fields, our families, and our future. [Click Here To Read Full Story](http://links.email.in-gop.com/s/c/M1bnolOcSKaIpyeL5TsQux1IqiiV_fviuPvHDR92vqa3Ffx_TxWi0yN730Jn2P3Bplp98NbVS_6yP66YutfU30FRoDSLhNOXqThMeMHmTU81luvdYflsntP9NjNwV9ZY7OyFsCMj2FGzKe9Wx8j0AAVm8PXfYg3eVkJ8PsIIejuaKgt5cnrlgRGV84VvuarC2xm8Dca3E2yqoZlc246HweJMejAKNCLWbLl5CcUG_XCZA4u1o9LWpxCZ10zthfBekHIRaP2zUdbiNfrBWEkHbWcBRLfcDTYjGcUr41eaUd7xUCtYPnjBjVJwjaR88ljWn07cZv7orzYJOE8MvlFC_tEk5aY1YlKa2Y63DkgV9QbP0g3SMtSgA_5vbLTs6i8Homff9WN0hR3IqJ_4wyX18g9X5WV5ufaV_vv3y7mTHJtNEDGZcTu-sHXAvJWWzXUFKkjqg9UT4_Xfk19eaJR5lwpboIh8U7bDxIh3eroRAgz307gkc3ci467j_dP1lvzWsoMoRIKOdInvpy0_6--wH33EDWMl7btldLThu9nk9zhGD2a4F-bNgB7vToWSKHrYfZ4xm5Lb6CjrpEb8GJpYAJHlJfKB/csP15fySVxKJJSvsFxuBo1_phji2hf48/10)

In a recent sit-down with entrepreneur and agricultural leader Sarah Frey, the Indiana Governor shared how his lived experience—building a business, raising a family, and serving in the U.S. Senate—informs his health care and agricultural reforms across the Hoosier State. From Businessman to Statesman Governor Braun didn’t arrive in Washington from the marble halls of academia but from the tree rows of his family farm and the grind of private enterprise. Having launched his own logistics business in 1981, Braun understood firsthand the struggles American employers face—particularly the burdens of rising health care costs. In 2008, he transformed his company’s health plan by self-insuring and focusing on wellness and prevention, not just expensive treatment. Seventeen years later, he’s proud to say there’s been no premium increase for his employees —a feat unheard of in the business world. Pioneering Health Reform in the Senate While serving on the Senate Health, Education, Labor, and Pensions Committee, Braun pushed for transparency in health care pricing, even garnering rare bipartisan support from Senator Bernie Sanders. His efforts spotlighted how broken the system is—and why real reform must come from states, not Washington bureaucrats. SNAP Waivers and Nutritional Independence Now as Governor, Braun has wasted no time turning bold policy into tangible change. Indiana is one of the earliest states to receive a SNAP nutritional waiver , empowering low-income residents to access healthier food options. Governor Braun emphasizes that nutrition must be the cornerstone of any meaningful food assistance program, noting, “Wholesome food is where our taxpayer dollars should go.” Executive Orders for Farm-to-Table Innovation Earlier this year, Braun signed executive orders aimed at revolutionizing how fresh produce reaches Indiana tables. His administration is assembling task forces to explore local food infrastructure, reduce reliance on ultra-processed products, and foster farm diversification. He sees a future where year-round hydroponic farming, not just seasonal farm stands, supplies Indiana families with fresh fruits and vegetables. An Entrepreneurial Approach to Governance Braun’s philosophy as Governor is simple: empower citizens and cut red tape. He likens good governance to entrepreneurship—thinking outside the box, taking calculated risks, and ensuring growth. In agriculture, that means supporting farmers not just as producers but as innovators. His work on the Growing Climate Solutions Act as a Senator paved the way for rewarding environmental stewardship without regulatory overreach. Partnership with Secretary Rollins and USDA The Governor also praised Secretary Rollins’ leadership at the USDA, celebrating a productive day in Washington where states aligned on strategies to improve food systems and public health. Braun noted the enthusiasm in the room, saying “Now we’ve got an administration that’s going to be behind innovation.” It was a stark contrast to his Senate years, where progress often stalled in the gridlock of the Capitol. Indiana: A State Poised for Growth With ample water, fertile soil, and a governor focused on maximizing both, Indiana is becoming a beacon for food innovation and health-first policies. “We live within our means,” Braun remarked, contrasting Indiana’s fiscal responsibility with federal dysfunction. His goal is nothing short of transformational: a state where farmers thrive, families flourish, and health care empowers rather than burdens. Final Thoughts Governor Mike Braun’s leadership exemplifies what happens when conservative principles meet real-world application. From challenging Big Insurance to championing food sovereignty, he’s proving that states led by patriots with courage and clarity can chart a new path for the nation. Stay tuned for more conversations with America’s conservative leaders who are fighting every day to put America First —in our fields, our families, and our future. | | | | | | PAID FOR BY THE INDIANA REPUBLICAN STATE COMMITTEE. | | NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. subject: He’s trying to scare us. We won’t let that happen.

body:
https://maxinefororegon.com/ [https://maxinefororegon.com/]
Peter,
Right now, Oregon is under the Trump administration’s microscope.
That’s a good thing. They’re scared of us.
Portland is a sanctuary city within a sanctuary state. That means Oregon safeguards undocumented residents by limiting how much local law enforcement cooperates with federal immigration officials.
We work to create a culture in Oregon where our neighbors can live without fear. Because if one person can be picked up off the street without due process, it can happen to anyone.
But now, Trump and his cronies are coming after sanctuary cities and threatening to withhold federal money if we don’t bend to their will.
The Trump administration is sending our economy into a downward spiral, straining critical foreign alliances, and trying to push millions of people off their healthcare. But instead of addressing that, they’re focused on attacking Oregon.
If the Trump administration can detain one person illegally, it can happen to anyone. If one person is unsafe, that means everyone is threatened.
He’s trying to scare us. We won’t let that happen.
We need to build a coalition of grassroots support to win the House, Senate, and Oval Office. Will you support Maxine’s people-powered campaign by chipping in now? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_med_email-25q2?refcode=X_250616_microscope_actrs]

name: Eric Swalwell
subject: Kristi Noem needs to resign yesterday.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Swalwell For Congress
body:
Her ICE agents are running around masked like 1800s bandits. It has to stop. |
---
_Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District. _
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109702462/551956420/-1590518309?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNzI3OWM1NC1lMTRhLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EPRjDWj176kQQyuo7krWP7JfOMRclemtAzVMTl9aJxQ=&emci=facd31e2-d54a-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=37279c54-e14a-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=7878003)
My dad and two brothers are cops. I am and always will be proud to stand with our law enforcement. But the way DHS Secretary Kristi Noem is running ICE is _unconscionable_. Agents are masked like 1800s bandits, unlawfully terrorizing our communities, and deporting _innocent citizens._ **What’s worse: When members of Congress demanded access to ICE’s federally funded detainment facilities after detaining a U.S. Marshal and deporting a 4 year-old citizen with cancer, ICE denied us entry. It’s a consciousness of guilt, friend.** **Under Kristi Noem’s direction, ICE agents are shirking the law to deny both Congress _and_ the American people the truth about their unconstitutional mass deportation operation.** [**While the American people continue peacefully protesting ICE and the Trump administration’s unlawful actions, I’m leading the charge to demand Kristi Noem’s resignation and launch a congressional investigation into ICE’s unlawful actions. body:
the truth about the so-called “big beautiful bill”
#
Peter — **the so-called “big beautiful bill” making its way through Congress right now would be _the largest upward transfer of wealth in American history._**
If that’s enough to make you want to fight back, **[please consider adding a donation of any amount right now. We’re building a grassroots movement to elect leaders who will stand up for real people like YOU — not the billionaires and corporate elites corrupting our politics — and even just $5 today could make a big impact.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/89921?refcode=em20250616-9018&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9018%2E614464%2En036Ak)**
**[FIGHT BACK: ADD A DONATION](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/89921?refcode=em20250616-9018&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9018%2E614464%2En036Ak)**
Working families across the country are already struggling to afford basic necessities. Rent, groceries, healthcare — just about everything keeps getting more and more expensive.
**But instead of doing anything to make the lives of these families any easier, too many politicians in Congress are working to make it _even harder_ for them to access resources like Medicaid and SNAP.** Right now, the “big beautiful bill” they’re considering would cut BILLIONS of dollars from these programs — threatening health coverage, food security, and economic stability for MILLIONS of Americans.
And what’s worse? **While this bill threatens all those critical resources for families who need them, it’s giving MASSIVE tax breaks to the wealthiest people in our country.**
Now more than ever, we need leaders who understand what it takes to live as an everyday American. We need politicians who are committed to representing real people like YOU, not the billionaires and corporate elites responsible for stripping our communities for parts.
That’s what we’re fighting for, Peter, but we need your help to do it.
**[So please, will you send in a donation of $10 or whatever you can right now to support candidates who will actually stand up for working families?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/89921?refcode=em20250616-9018&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=9018%2E614464%2En036Ak)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/89922?refcode=em20250616-9018&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=4&akid=9018%2E614464%2En036Ak) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/89922?refcode=em20250616-9018&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=5&akid=9018%2E614464%2En036Ak) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/89922?refcode=em20250616-9018&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=6&akid=9018%2E614464%2En036Ak) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/89922?refcode=em20250616-9018&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=7&akid=9018%2E614464%2En036Ak) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/89922?refcode=em20250616-9018&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=8&akid=9018%2E614464%2En036Ak) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/89922?refcode=em20250616-9018&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=9&akid=9018%2E614464%2En036Ak) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/89921?refcode=em20250616-9018&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=10&akid=9018%2E614464%2En036Ak)

name: Donald Trump Jr.
subject: Don Jr. here. I need your help.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cloud for Congress
body:
[https://secure.winred.com/michaelcloud/20250603_cloud_flex7902_w_eml_donjr2?utm_campaign=034000000060020&utm_medium=email&xuno=464c455837393032&recurring=true&utm_term=lrm-active]

Friend, this is Don Jr.

Thank you so much for supporting my father, PRESIDENT TRUMP throughout
the years.

From the phony impeachments, to the crooked indictments, to the
assassination attempt, we are so lucky to have the support of THE MOST
LOYAL BASE IN AMERICAN HISTORY.

But today's not about me, and quite frankly, it’s not about my
father. Today is about one of the strongest MAGA warriors who
doesn’t always crack the headlines, but causes a BIG STIR IN THE
SWAMP.

His name is MICHAEL CLOUD. He is currently serving the people of
Texas, but the fight he brings to Congress is for ALL Americans.

Congressman Michael Cloud has been a LOYAL ALLY of President Trump and
his administration from the very beginning.

In fact, he showed up to Mar A Lago right after the unlawful FBI RAID
to show his support for the President and his family.

This is what my father, PRESIDENT TRUMP had to say about him:

_"Congressman Michael Cloud is doing a phenomenal job serving the
incredible people of Texas. _

_He fights hard to support our Farmers and Vets, secure our Border,
defend our Second Amendment, and hold Joe Biden and the Radical Left
accountable._

_ Michael is a strong supporter of our America First agenda, and has
my Complete and Total Endorsement!"_

HE HAS NEVER LET MY FATHER DOWN.

Michael Cloud is currently serving on the DOGE Committee, working
tirelessly to hold the left accountable for the WORLD'S LARGEST MONEY
LAUNDERING SCHEME IN HISTORY!

He always fights for America First:

👉Close the border

👉Defend the Second Amendment

👉END taxpayer-funded abortion

We are so honored by the ENORMOUS EFFORT by the MAGA movement to elect
not only President Trump, but also a majority in Congress.

However, the fight isn’t over yet. My father NEEDS Michael Cloud to
keep his seat in Congress after the midterm elections.

The Democrat machine is willing to do WHATEVER IT TAKES to end the
Trump Agenda.

From PHONY IMPEACHMENTS to ASSASSINATION ATTEMPTS, they aren’t
afraid to GET THEIR HANDS DIRTY!

That’s why I am asking you to do something for me today.

Congressman Cloud asked me to send this to you for him since he
thought you’d read it coming from me.

I’m asking Trump’s most loyal Patriots to PLEASE click this button
to read his message to you.

READ HERE NOW
[https://secure.winred.com/michaelcloud/20250603_cloud_flex7902_w_eml_donjr2?utm_campaign=034000000060020&utm_medium=email&xuno=464c455837393032&recurring=true&utm_term=lrm-active]

God Bless America,
Donald Trump Jr.

READ HERE NOW
[https://secure.winred.com/michaelcloud/20250603_cloud_flex7902_w_eml_donjr2?utm_campaign=034000000060020&utm_medium=email&xuno=464c455837393032&recurring=true&utm_term=lrm-active]

Paid for by Cloud for Congress

P.O. Box 7027
Victoria, TX 77903

Unsubscribe: https://app.vbout.com/index.php?r=Email/OptoutConfirmationForm&messageid=296027&trkid=744675612&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com

215 N Payne Street, Alexandria, VA 22314

Friend, In the early hours of Saturday morning an anti-abortion extremist dressed as a police officer, driving an authentic fake police car, showed up at the doors of two Minnesota democratic lawmakers and shot them, killing state Senator Melissa Hortman and her husband, and wounding State Senator John Hoffman and his wife. In the attacks aftermath, the Senate moved to increase security for Democratic Minnesota US Senators Amy Klobuchar and Tina Smith. However, according to reporting by Axios, pleas for additional protection for additional protection of members of the House of Representatives **were denied by House Republican Leadership** :
---
| [ ](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvUWHo9tkdcudztgboR-91DX1V6zutSxCjOoN0IP-RGAbHV36H2KOsZNhbw9EPXfmtzi3apsJkVv6rP1OVgi83jBRt6q_176NOBg8k26B2Bw0eReHV5g2fahj-pG9rpgYExoCrHXeMKGCSq4XlHXmcxzwNISSvfwMe-aY7TSDA871k22ZQzmNT_rCGVYd9M6X9YPr36Y8kHkltvZG1YGwKIQhn5LlATCpxNCR8UGExfNEyMBO_QH92Rri0_1jxtp_clQ2_S-YBkzuXGUvrJ3ThQzwrOXhJ7xpt0g-BjhKp9rfCSKKD36loUyG2Jb0nEyygxqm4GBbTUijhJc12bQJa5fpna8galunJJlph-Ok4CCjIW_fDDISr50zn0OpPrWYnBqJjoUb870jY3flqc73Os/4he/6KX75E1eRGWqEGBVtb-O3A/h1/h001.CAOE63fbEP9uJ75kBiKK6kssAPwN1YQIojdJ_s2ocUA)

Targeted political violence has emerged as a new lever of power for the extreme-right used to terrorize their enemies in the Democratic party and ensure that Republicans don't break ranks on key votes or criticize the President. Republicans in both the Senate and House have told reporters that they refrain from criticizing or voting against Trump out of concerns of physical violence against them and their families from his supporters.
---
| [ ](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvUWHo9tkdcudztgboR-91DX1V6zutSxCjOoN0IP-RGAbHV36H2KOsZNhbw9EPXfmvlCdpqNfkKRfY3AUpvI_KyRs6aHmkbpDq6s16nmrPmOWq9S2ihthVZVHdjzceWiiEbBG44TdUsIdKOjCHdLGotg-QWuZa_8fAK690yYxUHElgJKvhp3Kppu0Oumn6BS3ndgRh_prRpfWpS4AkJfBPaoBIivzcwZEzuhZFwD2MFeLjdky9i3T8G-gTD3pAHjlyKW4M8xv8PkBGzxoGI_1e_ddqJPZqLfKL6DsyCEt1q8QrA9bv-FRluolQtge907yVrcHLBWFJef6FgZCX3qLMDttxDgjqTIHuyxL2v_LW-Y7hQqoCsrWfAH3tuWOpRZPmnKEye2rTdR_toQ10J1m_e/4he/6KX75E1eRGWqEGBVtb-O3A/h2/h001.fRPa3g_YDJ-_qSCe2oBmZkhR6yCCSSsxnXVYCHn1LtY)

Our elected officials should not have to determine their decisions on whether or not they will face violent retribution for them. clean_body: Speaker Johnson is blocking additional protection for members of Congress in the wake of the Minnesota assassinations. | | Friend, In the early hours of Saturday morning an anti-abortion extremist dressed as a police officer, driving an authentic fake police car, showed up at the doors of two Minnesota democratic lawmakers and shot them, killing state Senator Melissa Hortman and her husband, and wounding State Senator John Hoffman and his wife. In the attacks aftermath, the Senate moved to increase security for Democratic Minnesota US Senators Amy Klobuchar and Tina Smith. However, according to reporting by Axios, pleas for additional protection for additional protection of members of the House of Representatives were denied by House Republican Leadership : | Targeted political violence has emerged as a new lever of power for the extreme-right used to terrorize their enemies in the Democratic party and ensure that Republicans don't break ranks on key votes or criticize the President. Republicans in both the Senate and House have told reporters that they refrain from criticizing or voting against Trump out of concerns of physical violence against them and their families from his supporters. | Our elected officials should not have to determine their decisions on whether or not they will face violent retribution for them. GOP Leadership needs to protect Democratic and Republican lawmakers alike from violence. No Dem Left Behind is leading the charge to push House Speaker Mike Johnson to provide members of Congress with protection. It is impossible to have a functioning democracy when violent retaliation looms over the heads of our elected officials. We hope you will stand with us and make your voice heard on this literal matter of life or death. Team No Dem Left Behind | | Mail checks to: No Dem Left Behind P.O. Box 15320 Washington, D.C. 2003 | Paid for by No Dem Left Behind PAC Not Authorized by Any Federal Candidate or Candidate's Committee. | | Sent via . Some elected officials can't take a joke.

And unfortunately, they think they have the power to do something about it.

After the governor of California saw a video parody of a politician, he responded by saying the video should be "illegal." Then the California legislature fast-tracked and passed two bills, banning certain political speech.

_The Babylon Bee_ and other plaintiffs filed a lawsuit against California officials because the bills censor free speech and punish people for posting certain political content online, including political memes and parodies of politicians.

Where do you stand on the issue of free speech and humor?

Punishing out of control inflation. Wide open borders. Chaos on the world stage...

President Trump and our Republican majorities are getting big things done to get our nation back on track - and we're just getting started.

Today, I have one important question for you:

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: We need to guarantee postpartum coverage under Medicaid and CHIP
body:
The year after giving birth is one of the most vulnerable times in a woman’s life. In Arizona, 1 in 7 women reported symptoms of postpartum depression, and there’s significant risk of it going undiagnosed and untreated without proper post-natal care..
#

I hear a lot of talk from my colleagues across the aisle about being pro-family. Their actions speak differently.
Let me explain what I mean by that.
The year after giving birth is one of the most vulnerable times in a woman’s life. In Arizona, 1 in 7 women reported symptoms of postpartum depression, and there’s significant risk of it going undiagnosed and untreated without proper post-natal care.
Most states have extended postpartum Medicaid coverage to one year, but that coverage is at risk. It’s one of the first programs states would cut if the GOP gets their way and pushes through hundreds of billions of dollars in cuts to Medicaid in this disaster of a budget.
Look, my wife just gave birth. She and our new son are doing great, but I cannot imagine if we did not have access to post-natal checkups over the next year. New moms on Medicaid and CHIP deserve that certainty. Republicans in Congress want to take it away.
I just introduced the _Postpartum Lifeline Act_ to require 12 months of full postpartum health coverage under Medicaid and the Children’s Health Insurance Program.
This shouldn’t be political. It’s common sense. We want to encourage people to have families — and we should show up for them and provide the care moms desperately need after they give birth.
[**If you think that every mom on Medicaid and CHIP deserves 12 months of postpartum health coverage, add your name to this petition and say so. I’d love to have you with me here.** [ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/signup/250616_pet_em_postpartum/?source=em250616-1-160&akid=3892%2E734936%2E5TGjyy) Thank you for the help, Ruben

If you would like to support Ruben's campaign for Senate, please consider [making a donation today.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruben-em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=3&refcode2=3892_734936_5TGjyy&akid=3892%2E734936%2E5TGjyy)
clean_body: The year after giving birth is one of the most vulnerable times in a woman’s life. In Arizona, 1 in 7 women reported symptoms of postpartum depression, and there’s significant risk of it going undiagnosed and untreated without proper post-natal care.. I hear a lot of talk from my colleagues across the aisle about being pro-family. Their actions speak differently. Let me explain what I mean by that. The year after giving birth is one of the most vulnerable times in a woman’s life. In Arizona, 1 in 7 women reported symptoms of postpartum depression, and there’s significant risk of it going undiagnosed and untreated without proper post-natal care. Most states have extended postpartum Medicaid coverage to one year, but that coverage is at risk. It’s one of the first programs states would cut if the GOP gets their way and pushes through hundreds of billions of dollars in cuts to Medicaid in this disaster of a budget. Look, my wife just gave birth. She and our new son are doing great, but I cannot imagine if we did not have access to post-natal checkups over the next year. New moms on Medicaid and CHIP deserve that certainty. Republicans in Congress want to take it away. I just introduced the Postpartum Lifeline Act to require 12 months of full postpartum health coverage under Medicaid and the Children’s Health Insurance Program. This shouldn’t be political. It’s common sense. We want to encourage people to have families — and we should show up for them and provide the care moms desperately need after they give birth. Thank you for the help, Ruben Paid For By Gallego for Arizona Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense. Peter,

You don’t call law enforcement Nazis unless you’ve decided you don’t believe in laws. That’s what Tim Walz did. He compared ICE agents—Americans who risk their lives enforcing the law—to the Gestapo.

_**Let that sink in.
**_
**These aren’t slip-ups. This is the modern Left’s playbook:**
* Undermine the rule of law.

* Demonize law enforcement.

* Accuse ordinary Americans of extremism for wanting basic security.

_**And then they call you a radical.**_

I’m Adam Schwarze. **I’m a former Navy SEAL and Marine who deployed nine times, including in Iraq and Africa, and I’m running for U.S. Senate to stop this madness. I didn’t spend 21 years defending this country just to come home and be called a Nazi by politicians who couldn’t even defend their own cities.**

While Minneapolis was burning in the summer of 2020,**Tim Walz’s lieutenant governor, my opponent in the Minnesota Senate race** , was working on a lawsuit against the police. That tells you everything you need to know. **Democrats hide behind lawsuits and frivolous social media posts; Republicans rally behind the American flag and the men and women serving our communities in uniform.**

What they did to our cities was shameful. What they’re doing to our border is dangerous. And what they’re saying about veterans, police officers, and law-abiding citizens is disgusting.

So here’s the truth:
* Enforcing immigration law is not fascism. **It’s federal law.**

* Wanting to deport criminals who prey on Americans is not bigotry. **It’s basic decency.**

* Demanding accountability from a government that lets cities burn is not extreme. **It’s patriotism.**

If you're as outraged as I am, I need your help now. **[Pitch in $5, $10, or $25 to help me take this fight to the U.S. Senate.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=40d392de09064fc99a280619b601102d&_e=4cdYcP6h3gb9B-jlm0gpH_DZelAHTMMMDyXqHnMjyCUkQWQQ0hshKdNlA1mYGGRO2L1jEJ8C0HLwOoGQadxaz0IDbDi92_P7o5XVjDKKny2spcrP9y-4WBksVPKTlHt6nic6n8HVi1yNuq5Ld88tHky3GO0qmizDPZVcliTRh4etSSftIA2yGLJxca0GA5MWEumHajXG-hFQM3i8hY9x_cxNRkb5KFE8kuWwjT-1IlMTWj5XuZmk1LtpDPOSorPyBeWrKgo1EPRE14LM_aVXtegw2qmFPEHltDFj6pIX7Lqf0XzylhuV6o0jSe11RKhYkB6Z_Iom8nrZp2yFpJb5xX48Ql5P-NclY8MNqOK-cA9-07SVcrcVoPYhEk1s25ssP-fDlHKLDGPO2O5hiMRrQQTBMbd3_Rn65Wi_5aUX_zcthwpjl6Bwi-foBgZuSetU) **

I'm starting out this race with no money and little name recognition - what I do have is a deep love of this country, and an exemplarily military record. _**I would be humbled if you could spare a few dollars today to ensure my campaign for the U.S. Senate gets off the ground.**_

[**SEND A SEAL TO THE SENATE**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=40d392de09064fc99a280619b601102d&_e=4cdYcP6h3gb9B-jlm0gpH_DZelAHTMMMDyXqHnMjyCUkQWQQ0hshKdNlA1mYGGRO2L1jEJ8C0HLwOoGQadxaz0IDbDi92_P7o5XVjDKKny2spcrP9y-4WBksVPKTlHt6nic6n8HVi1yNuq5Ld88tHky3GO0qmizDPZVcliTRh4etSSftIA2yGLJxca0GA5MWEumHajXG-hFQM3i8hY9x_cxNRkb5KFE8kuWwjT-1IlMTWj5XuZmk1LtpDPOSorPyBeWrKgo1EPRE14LM_aVXtc9Y-PV5C6fQnyg2iL0JWHZ7TPg8FDQBSelj_q8n0jouPT8xMPyHNIa4mWN6K1FhphUmtiVhj-5VC7weBCGQOWImq-7jrMGwnOv-LpYjCk_BvE4ouvSURLYYzffDPdN1PW3pJOV81zKxR-UYCJsFZ8fFd6jmyuoJoE24A16XWk_B) **_
_** [](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=40d392de09064fc99a280619b601102d&_e=4cdYcP6h3gb9B-jlm0gpH_DZelAHTMMMDyXqHnMjyCUkQWQQ0hshKdNlA1mYGGRO2L1jEJ8C0HLwOoGQadxaz0IDbDi92_P7o5XVjDKKny2spcrP9y-4WBksVPKTlHt6nic6n8HVi1yNuq5Ld88tHky3GO0qmizDPZVcliTRh4etSSftIA2yGLJxca0GA5MWEumHajXG-hFQM3i8hY9x_cxNRkb5KFE8kuWwjT-1IlMTWj5XuZmk1LtpDPOSorPyBeWrKgo1EPRE14LM_aVXtVXRJm2GyJLfqg6zBB7TM9fw9kQpmaB_KX9lGCUMEJmODe1IXn2QAlkiHyJazppt1w3HzgkPknfLhBYl8WugmilYB2C2iZ1Vg8vcAyJN2Q1H_d71pSL5AErLsW02OWahuEwslFKSLV2gs_jRmCyffpxlLU8tRTnqr5YtCUH7vXcw)
**This is the battle. Right here. Right now.**

Tim Walz and his radical, militant left-wing lieutenant governor think they can shame us into silence. They think they can call us names until we stop pushing back. They are wrong.

I didn’t come from wealth. I wasn’t groomed for politics. **I earned everything** —from my SEAL trident to my Harvard and Johns Hopkins degrees—through service and sacrifice. And I’m bringing that same grit to this pivotal U.S. Senate race.

But I need reinforcements. And that starts with you, Peter.

If you’re tired of watching cities fall apart, borders erased, and law enforcement demonized. And if you’re tired of being told that loving your country makes you a villain, **[then join me.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=40d392de09064fc99a280619b601102d&_e=4cdYcP6h3gb9B-jlm0gpH_DZelAHTMMMDyXqHnMjyCUkQWQQ0hshKdNlA1mYGGRO2L1jEJ8C0HLwOoGQadxaz0IDbDi92_P7o5XVjDKKny2spcrP9y-4WBksVPKTlHt6nic6n8HVi1yNuq5Ld88tHky3GO0qmizDPZVcliTRh4etSSftIA2yGLJxca0GA5MWEumHajXG-hFQM3i8hY9x_cxNRkb5KFE8kuWwjT-1IlMTWj5XuZmk1LtpDPOSorPyBeWrKgo1EPRE14LM_aVXtSk2u1bHu3LlJiLOf53xm3dioEj_hnOqi5UzTDRmigy6xpdGeWwjTEUig1bg04R2dn6xVow47S-U0p-7R1zu4z6ULHYjW2cx55Ml-feYoOsRo_uFrOufosFRv71Nr7JKDWsaEjQl5LvKkZgykgOpgJ-pPuZpnKKau8iLReIGPySF)**

Because we’re not the extremists. We’re the ones standing between America and collapse.

[**DONATE TODAY. FIGHT BACK. name: (5) Missed Messages
subject: So many Senators have reached out to you
body:
Please see a special message from our sponsor:

Unsubscribe
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xul=2qq8ny363wdaxf3eu1ztoj2053v9wwrmrkyu5cfe3ymkwez46tufgaq4u2rni01czwrt32pjmb3btzp84ho5zkpca9n0nm20npto3r59g&__stmp=sxys8y&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh

Please see a special message from our sponsor:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sxys8y&__onlt=t

Dear Fellow American,

I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution.

That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection.

By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders.

You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=17x64w94u6jf90ar86csr2a0h80ecpljzxrhf2gfpehnlaa2vnhl5yzxbdx9zj3p8n2o7pq0spw3dlrnw2bd0navpybbs0nu3q9fh6epjodldo9fm65mrtv4ifaf8ly3jga193ar53dh47nb0wibw5os8nsnjp&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sxys8y&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sxys8y&__onlt=t

Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?

YES
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sxys8y&__onlt=t

NO
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sxys8y&__onlt=t

For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government.

But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.

This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty.

Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states.

These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:

Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"

Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis, Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;

Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;

Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and

Restoring excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College.

And this is especially important in this critical time for America's future.

So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time.

You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=17x64w94u6jf90ar86csr2a0h80ecpljzxbuhv2xnzz974p8il2ndttirbntn39iaf8hn2gxhrs0gnrgljeqgz0z3tugvhk4p4kca5bo8oacy74nmetcslg2y0ccoy93w4okv158aa44fw45zwdd9gg5nyq0p5&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sxys8y&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sxys8y&__onlt=t

And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work.

Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn

President, Hillsdale College

Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

body:
And Kristi Noem just set it off.
| | | I have a 7-year-old, a 6-year-old, and a 3-year-old at home, Peter. So believe me when I say this: _I’ve seen this routine before._
---
You get caught. You know you’re caught. And you _still_ try to deflect and lie your way out of it – badly.
That was Kristi Noem testifying before Congress. When presented with a clearly doctored image – one that she and Trump used to justify deporting Abrego Garcia – Noem pulled the oldest trick in the book. **She wouldn’t even look at it.**
**When I asked her five times if the photo was real or fake, she deflected._When we walked the image over to her, she stared straight ahead like a kid trying not to get grounded._**
I called it what it was: a _lie._
**[I’ve done it before, and I will keep doing it every time MAGA Republicans lie, deflect, and put people in danger to score points with their Liar-in-Chief. If you’re tired of GOP lies and ready to fight back with the truth, will you split a donation between me and Letitia James to help me expose these clowns?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109705325/551966582/-1499373941?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2001-partner-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNTQ0YTM2Yi1lYTRhLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EpbwPO2j0Qa6oQ0NVz8lQ26uEmP-4-iuUuUdcQwsrr0=)**

This isn’t about a single image. _It’s about a pattern_. The GOP is trying to rewrite reality and pass it off as “national security” – deporting people by mistake, pushing fake gang connections, and turning federal agencies into culture war battlegrounds.

clean_body: | | | Peter, We need to send the rioters straight to JAIL and DEPORT any illegal immigrants. _ The Mexican president has called for her citizens to MOBILIZE against our country. She’s encouraging protests against federal agents who are carrying out deportation orders, like we’re now seeing in Los Angeles. Don’t think this chaos is limited to crazy states like California, Peter. Don’t blink, because it’s coming straight to YOU. Far-Left activists are holding protests in Texas, and the Left is pouring MILLIONS into Texas to defeat me and flip our state blue. So I’m asking for your help. Congress has a chance to support President Trump. We need to jail and deport the rioters, tax the money immigrants make here, and put AMERICANS FIRST. Thank you, Chip Roy | | Paid for by Chip Roy for Congress | | 6705 W. Highway 290, Ste. 50295 Austin, Texas 78735
