name: Angie Craig
subject: Will you help me make history?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
It wasn’t that long ago that being an out lesbian would make it almost impossible to run for office.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250616-1?refcode=em20250616-2106&refcode2=2106_21716_HSyPHN&akid=2106%2E21716%2EHSyPHN)
Happy Pride Month! 🏳️🌈
I’m Angie Craig. I’m a Minnesotan, a wife, a mom and Mimi (grandmother), a WNBA fan and a beer-lover.
**I’d also be the first lesbian mom elected to the U.S. Senate.**
It wasn’t that long ago that being an out lesbian would make it almost impossible to run for office. Growing up as a teenager in the 1980s, I never could have imagined that I’d be elected to Congress (let alone be a candidate for Senate!).
Donald Trump wants to take us back to those times. _**Like hell he will, if I have anything to say about it.**_
So I’m coming to you with an important request: [**Will you celebrate Pride Month by splitting $5 between Sarah McBride and my historic campaign for U.S. Senate and defeat the GOP opposition that aims to strip away our rights?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250616-1?refcode=em20250616-2106&amount=5&refcode2=2106_21716_HSyPHN&akid=2106%2E21716%2EHSyPHN)
**[Donate Now »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250616-1?refcode=em20250616-2106&refcode2=2106_21716_HSyPHN&akid=2106%2E21716%2EHSyPHN)**
Pride has always been a special time for me and my family.
My wife Cheryl and I love marching in our local Pride parade each year — but Pride is more than just a celebration. It’s a time to reflect on the strides we’ve made to be able to live freely and authentically — and to demand _more_ from our leaders.
The first Pride — following the Stonewall riots of 1969 — was a _**protest**_ in response to the government’s anti-LGBTQ+ policies. We should never lose sight of that.
Right now, our community is facing one attack after another from the Trump administration and his Republican majority. Lord knows we need to stand up for our rights now more than ever.
I’m running for U.S. Senate to be a fierce defender of LGBTQ+ folks and to fight against the GOP’s harmful policies — from targeting marriage equality to passing bathroom bills and book bans.
[**If you’re with me, will you split $5 between Sarah McBride and my campaign to help me make history as the first lesbian mom elected to the U.S. Senate?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250616-1?refcode=em20250616-2106&amount=5&refcode2=2106_21716_HSyPHN&akid=2106%2E21716%2EHSyPHN)
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250616-1?amount=5&refcode=em20250616-2106&refcode2=2106_21716_HSyPHN&akid=2106%2E21716%2EHSyPHN)**
Thanks for standing with me,
Angie
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-footer?refcode=em20250616-1&t=1&refcode2=2106_21716_HSyPHN&akid=2106%2E21716%2EHSyPHN)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/receive_fewer_emails/?t=2&akid=2106%2E21716%2EHSyPHN)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/update_your_information/?t=3&akid=2106%2E21716%2EHSyPHN)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=2106%2E21716%2EHSyPHN)

Email us: [info@sarahmcbride.com](mailto:info@sarahmcbride.com)

name: Eric H. Holder, Jr.
subject: You are the cavalry
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
Chip in to be part of the fight
|
---

Peter,
I do not say this lightly, but what is happening right now in the United States — this is how you get authoritarianism.
And from attempts to disenfranchise voters, to efforts to overturn free and fair elections, to ruthlessly gerrymandered maps — we are facing a relentless attack on the very foundations of our democracy.
**If we don’t fight now, it’s going to be too late. The time is now to fight back.**
It’s clear that we cannot be onlookers. If we want to stop the rise of authoritarianism, we must make the choice to take action — commit our time, our voice, and our dollars. We can't wait for things to get worse or expect the cavalry to come rescue our democracy — we are the cavalry.
**[That’s why I’m personally asking you to make a donation to All On The Line right now.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109706477/551970722/302038796?refcode=don_aotl_tier1_email_AGMayMM_email_20250616-AOTL-Tier1-AGMayMM-EHH_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250616-AOTL-Tier1-AGMayMM-EHH_&utm_campaign=AGMayMM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjc2MjVkZjgwLWVjNGEtZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ywdgJDBLYlnnU1tiJoJVRVHnZrzXaCgP7n-uBwyl79c=) Every contribution helps mobilize grassroots activists to end gerrymandering and build a truly representative democracy — despite the best efforts of so many to undermine it.**

I know we are in a difficult moment right now, and the odds may seem stacked against us as Trump and his enablers rampage through our government.
**But remember: Our movement has never been confined by a single election result.** Instead, it is a relentless march towards a higher ideal where every voter is empowered, transparency is non-negotiable, and electoral maps accurately reflect the will of the people.
And while extremists try to take us backwards on the federal stage, we can still make progress at the state level across the country — where the impacts of our work supporting fair maps are making a meaningful and lasting difference.
[**But to do so, we need you with us every step of the way. Will you make a donation to All On The Line right now and recommit to the fight for our democracy?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109706484/551970729/302038796?refcode=don_aotl_tier1_email_AGMayMM_email_20250616-AOTL-Tier1-AGMayMM-EHH_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250616-AOTL-Tier1-AGMayMM-EHH_&utm_campaign=AGMayMM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjc2MjVkZjgwLWVjNGEtZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ywdgJDBLYlnnU1tiJoJVRVHnZrzXaCgP7n-uBwyl79c=)
Thank you,
Eric H. Holder, Jr.
82nd Attorney General of the United States

Instead, it is a relentless march towards a higher ideal where every voter is empowered, transparency is non-negotiable, and electoral maps accurately reflect the will of the people. And while extremists try to take us backwards on the federal stage, we can still make progress at the state level across the country — where the impacts of our work supporting fair maps are making a meaningful and lasting difference. = Thank you, Eric H. name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: “And this bastard is taking it away.”
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE
body:
[1]Powered By People

I’ve been traveling Texas recruiting volunteers, meeting with people in
the fight and holding town hall conversations everywhere we can, places
like Mansfield, Fort Bend, Wichita Falls, Denton, Amarillo, Rice, Garland,
Humble.

There’s real power in people coming together. You don’t feel so all alone
or hopeless when you look around the room and see a thousand people just
like you — willing to take a chance in showing up, willing to work for
something better.

So many people are sick of reading the news, left cold by social media and
disappointed not just by the people in the White House and the majority in
Congress, but by the leaders of what could be the opposition party... who
seem stunned, lost, listless, maybe waiting for things to sort themselves
out.

And then they come to a town hall and get to listen both to what people
are going through AND importantly what people are willing to do about it.
People who aren’t waiting for party leaders to wake up and give them
orders, people taking the future in their hands and moving with it.
Choosing to run for office, or volunteering to register voters, or
organizing protests, marches, town halls or other ways that give us a shot
at breaking through.

What I like most about these meetings is that people speak like people...
not scripted, focus group tested, polled, consulted or researched. Just
people talking and listening to other people.

Sometimes the way representatives and pundits talk about Medicaid cuts or
the consequences of Trump’s budget bill can just seem like more politics,
more talking points, more numbers and hypotheticals. When we talk about
fighting back, what does it mean? Who are we fighting for?

Meet Gail. She stood up in Humble, Texas to tell us about her husband who
has Parkinson’s:

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/65216?t=1001&akid=240155%2E444211%2E6OQqwm ][IMG]

“I’m his only care taker. I make just enough money that as long as I can
keep him home, we’re good. But I’m 72 and my best case scenario is I
outlive him. If I don’t, where will he go? Because when that money runs
out, there’s not going to be a medicaid there to take care of him. He’ll
be alone.

And those research dollars that Trump is cutting?

It affects everyone here. If it gives us just one more day or one more
year with a loved one, it’s worth it.

If you know someone with cancer, that affects you. If you know someone
who has Alzheimer's, that affects you. If you know someone with a
neurodegenerative condition, that affects you.

And this bastard is taking it away.”

Fighting back means listening to the people around us who will lose their
loved ones, their friends, their very lives.

It means sharing their stories so that those who hear it can no longer
look away or pretend it doesn’t matter.

It means taking this energy to the streets, to the members of Congress, to
the President, protesting, marching, meeting, stepping up to do the work
necessary to win elections in 2026 — like registering voters and talking
to the people with the power to decide the outcome NOW instead of waiting
until 2026.

Giving this everything we can, all the time, everywhere... with the broadest
possible coalition, fighting on every front.

Thank you for reading,

Beto

Together, we are fighting for the future of Texas and our country.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20250616.xTjJSY&refcode=ema20250616-240155&t=1002&akid=240155%2E444211%2E6OQqwm ]Will you donate $3 today to help keep Beto on the road,
hosting town halls and building community?

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1003&akid=240155%2E444211%2E6OQqwm

PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE

name: Yassamin Ansari
subject: Mid-month update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Yassamin Ansari for Congress
body:
|
---
Hi Peter, I hope this message finds you well. I want you to know that I’m deeply grateful for your support, and I don’t take it for granted. The past few weeks in Congress have been challenging and full of important work. It’s already been an incredibly hectic month, but my team and I are staying focused on the issues that affect our communities every day. Recently, I spoke out against the Trump administration’s decision to reinstate a discriminatory travel ban that unfairly targets families and communities like ours. I’ve stood in opposition to the GOP’s disastrous budget plan that would strip health care and nutrition assistance from millions to benefit the wealthiest few. And this Pride Month, I’ve reaffirmed my commitment to fighting for the rights and dignity of LGBTQ+ Arizonans. I am proud of the work we’ve done so far, but this week has also reminded me of the obstacles that surely lie ahead. Our work to flip the House and elect leaders who put people over special interests will require major grassroots support. That’s why I’m reaching out today. Any amount you can chip in will make a difference. **You can conveniently make your donation here:** [**secure.actblue.com/donate/ya-em-jun25**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109706606/551971226/92389444?refcode=AU_YA_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250616_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOTc1NGRlMi1lZDRhLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xqk8OsGAOAtyulyQSZPFziujYcq7BcYHwd8C1kBBIIc=) Thank you for standing with me and believing in a future where everyone has a chance to thrive. With gratitude, Yassamin

name: OFFER FROM TRUMP
subject: Would you like a job for the White House?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump National Committee JFC, Inc

name: Gabby Giffords
subject: An assassination in Minnesota
body:
Fourteen years ago, I was a congresswoman from Arizona, hosting an event to meet with my constituents outside of a Safeway in Tucson.
# [](https://act.kamalaharris.com/go/2780?t=1&akid=652%2E2563979%2EoNAFj4)

[](https://act.kamalaharris.com/go/2977?t=2&akid=652%2E2563979%2EoNAFj4)
---
As you have heard, over the weekend Minnesota State Representative Melissa Hortman and her husband Mark were assassinated in their home by a gunman impersonating a police officer.
The gunman also shot State Senator John Hoffman and his wife, who are thankfully awake and recovering in the hospital.
Melissa was a champion for gun safety who I worked with to pass lifesaving background checks and extreme risk protection laws. She was a true public servant and a dedicated leader. Minnesota is safer today because of her leadership.
I am heartbroken. But we will never be intimidated.
Peter: My family and I know the horror of a targeted shooting all too well.
Fourteen years ago, I was a congresswoman from Arizona, hosting an event to meet with my constituents outside of a Safeway in Tucson.
A gunman, filled with hatred, tried to assassinate me. Eighteen people were shot, and six died. Our lives changed forever, and I vowed to save others from experiencing what my family -- and Tucson -- did that day.
An attack against lawmakers is an attack on American democracy itself, and political violence has become far too common in the United States.
When there is a threat of violence in the halls of our government buildings or against our elected officials, it jeopardizes our democracy -- the soul of our nation. We cannot accept political violence as normal or excusable in our society.
At GIFFORDS, we are committed to keeping up our work to fight back against political violence and uphold our democracy.
At the same time, the Democratic Party is working tirelessly to save some of the progress we made to make our communities safer from gun violence under the Biden/Harris administration.
That is why I am asking:
[**Can you please split a $5 contribution between the Democratic National Committee and my organization, GIFFORDS PAC, to help elect a Congress that will make our communities safer from gun violence?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-giffords-dnc?refcode=em250616&refcode2=652_2563979_oNAFj4&akid=652%2E2563979%2EoNAFj4)
_If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your split contribution between GIFFORDS PAC and the Democratic National Committee instantly:_

name: Lt. Col. David Flippo
subject: I Stand with President Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by David Flippo for Nevada]( "Paid for by David Flippo for Nevada")
body:
I watched what happened in California and I fully support President Trump’s decision to step in. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/9afeb1cf5ab4/welcome-to-team-flippo-10338496?e=273c9a71fb)
---
| | [ ](https://electdavidflippo.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9aba26b775663b53df718fc1a&id=d41684d91e&e=273c9a71fb)
---
| | **Friend,** **I watched what happened in California and it was clear the radical left was ready to tear that place apart. If President Trump did not call for backup it would have been a disaster.** **I fully support President Trump’s decision. He stood up for law and order and kept people safe while weak politicians stood by.** **I may not be able to prevent what happens in other states but I will always back President Trump’s decisions to protect Americans and restore order.** **This is about standing up when it matters most. That is the kind of leadership we need in Washington.** **I will always put America First and I will always back President Trump.**
---
| **Onward to victory,**

David Flippo
_Republican Candidate for U.S. Congress_
Nevada’s 4th Congressional District
_**[www.Flippo4NV.com](https://electdavidflippo.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9aba26b775663b53df718fc1a&id=54f83d0631&e=273c9a71fb)**_

body:
He needs every Democrat in his corner.
| **🚨 BERNIE SANDERS JUST DROPPED THE MIC! 🚨** [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/91183?t=6&akid=20241%2E878179%2EpGygsN) **Trump is already plotting his revenge, so we’re sending Sen. Bernie Sanders a MASSIVE letter thanking him for all his amazing work!**

[**You’ve been PERSONALLY selected to sign, so please don’t let us down: Add your name to thank Senator Sanders now!**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/91183?t=7&akid=20241%2E878179%2EpGygsN) | [**Donate $3 to sign the letter now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/91183?t=8&akid=20241%2E878179%2EpGygsN)

TO: Sen. Bernie Sanders
FROM: A grateful Democrat
Subject: Thank you. **Dear Senator Bernie Sanders,**

__Thank you for all your hard work leading the Anti-Trump resistance!__

It’s easy to feel helpless with MAGA Republicans in charge of the House, Senate, and White House, but you keep us hopeful that we can fight back.

**I know it isn’t easy fighting off Trump and the GOP’s escalating threats to take you down, so please know that Democrats _across the country_ stand with you.**

Your leadership is absolutely critical right now, and we hope more Democrats follow your lead.

[**I can’t thank you enough for all of your work to stop Donald Trump and save our Democracy! So I’m signing this letter and chipping in $3 to the Voter Protection Project to show my gratitude and to keep electing incredible Democrats who will save our democracy from MAGA extremists like Donald Trump. »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/91183?t=9&akid=20241%2E878179%2EpGygsN) | [**Donate $3 to sign now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/91183?t=10&akid=20241%2E878179%2EpGygsN)

**_X A grateful Democrat_**
—The Voter Protection Project
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=20241%2E878179%2EpGygsN). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=20241%2E878179%2EpGygsN).**

name: Mark Warner
subject: A Monday update:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
|
---

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109707640/551975055/1422805341?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_Townhall_250616_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYWRjZTA4My1mMjRhLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2bplGqJmpDxxlNSy3eQtGdz14HyhQaNoHL_B3WAczyY=) Derek –

Over the weekend, I held two town halls and got to talk to hundreds of constituents from Charlottesville and Winchester. | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109707641/551975056/1422805341?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_Townhall_250616_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYWRjZTA4My1mMjRhLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2bplGqJmpDxxlNSy3eQtGdz14HyhQaNoHL_B3WAczyY=) | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109707642/551975057/1422805341?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_Townhall_250616_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYWRjZTA4My1mMjRhLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2bplGqJmpDxxlNSy3eQtGdz14HyhQaNoHL_B3WAczyY=)
---|---
I also had the opportunity to join protesters at a No Kings Rally in Fairfax county. It was great to see so many Virginians make their voices heard and send a clear message: in America, we honor the Constitution, not any president.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109707643/551975058/1422805341?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_Townhall_250616_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYWRjZTA4My1mMjRhLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2bplGqJmpDxxlNSy3eQtGdz14HyhQaNoHL_B3WAczyY=)
This weekend, I heard from a lot of folks who are deeply concerned about Trump’s politicization of our military, our standing with our allies around the world, and the economic turmoil from Trump’s tariffs. And the constituents I spoke to are pretty pissed off about this big, ugly bill and its cruel cuts to Medicaid and food assistance to offset huge tax cuts for wealthy Americans.

**Candidly, I’m pissed off too. This is just about the most frightening piece of legislation I’ve ever seen.**

I’m working to hold the Trump administration accountable and urging my Republican friends to vote against this ugly bill.

But here’s the reality: I can’t rely on my Republican colleagues to stand up to Trump. We must win back control of the Senate and keep Virginia blue to rein in his harmful agenda.

That’s why I need your help to hold my seat in the Senate next year and flip the Senate. You can use my personal link to donate to my reelection campaign:

[**_https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mw-email-250616-townhall_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109707644/551975059/1422805341?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_Townhall_250616_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYWRjZTA4My1mMjRhLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2bplGqJmpDxxlNSy3eQtGdz14HyhQaNoHL_B3WAczyY=)

I’ll be honest. These are hard times – probably the hardest times since I’ve been involved in politics. But we live in the greatest country in the world and I, for one, am not going to give in.

I’ll keep speaking out and pushing back when Trump and Congressional Republicans threaten your safety, your bank account, or your freedom.

And I’ll continue that fight at the ballot box – to hold my seat, keep Virginia blue, and help Democrats take back the Senate.

If you’re able to join me in this work and contribute to my reelection campaign, here’s that link to give one more time:

[**_https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mw-email-250616-townhall_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109707645/551975060/1422805341?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_Townhall_250616_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYWRjZTA4My1mMjRhLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2bplGqJmpDxxlNSy3eQtGdz14HyhQaNoHL_B3WAczyY=)

Thank you for making your voice heard and taking action to continue this fight in the midterms.

More soon,

Mark

clean_body: | | | = Derek – Over the weekend, I held two town halls and got to talk to hundreds of constituents from Charlottesville and Winchester. | = | = ---|--- I also had the opportunity to join protesters at a No Kings Rally in Fairfax county. It was great to see so many Virginians make their voices heard and send a clear message: in America, we honor the Constitution, not any president. = This weekend, I heard from a lot of folks who are deeply concerned about Trump’s politicization of our military, our standing with our allies around the world, and the economic turmoil from Trump’s tariffs. And the constituents I spoke to are pretty pissed off about this big, ugly bill and its cruel cuts to Medicaid and food assistance to offset huge tax cuts for wealthy Americans. Candidly, I’m pissed off too. This is just about the most frightening piece of legislation I’ve ever seen. I’m working to hold the Trump administration accountable and urging my Republican friends to vote against this ugly bill. But here’s the reality: I can’t rely on my Republican colleagues to stand up to Trump. We must win back control of the Senate and keep Virginia blue to rein in his harmful agenda. That’s why I need your help to hold my seat in the Senate next year and flip the Senate. You can use my personal link to donate to my reelection campaign: = I’ll be honest. These are hard times – probably the hardest times since I’ve been involved in politics. But we live in the greatest country in the world and I, for one, am not going to give in. I’ll keep speaking out and pushing back when Trump and Congressional Republicans threaten your safety, your bank account, or your freedom. And I’ll continue that fight at the ballot box – to hold my seat, keep Virginia blue, and help Democrats take back the Senate. If you’re able to join me in this work and contribute to my reelection campaign, here’s that link to give one more time: = Thank you for making your voice heard and taking action to continue this fight in the midterms. More soon, Mark **= | | Friends of Mark Warner 1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213 Williamsburg, VA 23185 United States | Click here to . | Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner

## June Statewide call
Join us Tonight, June 16th at 8pm for our Monthly Statewide call. We'll be talking about recent events and partners we're working with. name: Ilhan Omar for Congress
subject: This is the problem.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
This is a lot of pressure, and we’re sorry for putting it on you.
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=1669%2E791427%2EloO0zr)

Team,
If everyone who received this email and is reading it like you are right now made their first online contribution of $5 today, we would absolutely destroy our FEC fundraising goals.
We’d have the resources we need to scare off any primary challenges and secure the Democratic nomination once again. We’d have enough to fight off AIPAC, the far-right, and the billionaires, and win in the general, too. We could push back against the Trump administration with full force.
We could win this race with ease. Really.
But that’s the problem. Not everyone contributes. That makes it especially important that YOU, make a contribution before we hit our FEC filing deadline.
Whether Ilhan has the resources to stand against her opponents is up to you. Whether this campaign can fight back is up to you. Whether we win... really, it’s up to people like you chipping in.
This is a lot of pressure, and we’re sorry for putting it on you. But the good news is, a lot of other people are sharing that burden with you. And they’re contributing what they can, right now.
**[Now is your moment. Please make your first $5 contribution to Ilhan’s reelection campaign today. Do it before our FEC deadline is over and the final numbers are tallied.**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-june25.Nm0oDJ&refcode=em250616-1-210&t=2&akid=1669%2E791427%2EloO0zr)

name: Katie Hobbs
subject: Every person reading this can make a difference
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
#

Hey friend, it’s Mark Kelly. My friend Katie Hobbs is running for Governor in Arizona and needs our help. I hope you’ll read the message below from her team, and [**rush a split donation between Katie's campaign and mine.**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-hobbs.0syrPb&refcode=em250616-1-90&t=1&akid=6096%2E6688874%2EmlSG7n)
---
Team, it’s Katie Hobbs.
I just wrapped up a meeting with my campaign team, and they told me that our fundraising has hit a slump.
**We can’t afford to fall short on _any_ of our fundraising goals right now, and I’ll tell you why: **
I have two Trump-endorsed GOP opponents running campaigns to unseat me. One of them is already spending **millions of dollars** on TV ads.
The attacks against me have already begun, and more are sure to come as folks begin tuning into this race.
If everyone reading this chipped in $5 or whatever they can spare, it will go a long way in helping us reach our fundraising goals — goals that we _need_ to reach so we have the resources to respond to attacks.
**So before you log off, will you rush in a donation of any amount, split between my campaign and Mark Kelly? Here’s a personal link to donate:[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-hobbs?refcode=win**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-hobbs.0syrPb&refcode=em250616-1-90&t=2&akid=6096%2E6688874%2EmlSG7n)
This race is going to be a marathon, not a sprint — so I appreciate you for standing with me.
— Katie

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=6096%2E6688874%2EmlSG7n).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or Department of Defense and reference to NASA does not imply endorsement by the National Aeronautics and Space Administration.

name: Rep. LaMonica McIver
subject: I was just indicted for standing up to Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Team — it’s LaMonica McIver. Last month, the Trump administration brought
charges against me because I was doing my job as a member of Congress.
Now, I’ve been officially indicted.

Let me be clear: under the law, members of Congress are explicitly
authorized to conduct oversight at ICE facilities. I was there to do my
job and make sure that this administration isn’t abusing people’s rights.
And I was charged and now indicted. The administration’s attacks are
baseless and the facts are on my side, but that’s not stopping them from
going after me. [ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250616-1?refcode=em20250616-5153&amount=3&refcode2=5153_420207_PH4u6j&akid=5153%2E420207%2EPH4u6j ]So I need you on my side, today.

These charges hold no factual merit. But there’s a reason they brought
them: the Trump administration thinks they can intimidate me and scare me
out of doing the job I was elected to do. They’re wrong.

I need your help to send an unmistakable message: Americans won’t stand
for this.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250616-1?refcode=em20250616-5153&amount=3&refcode2=5153_420207_PH4u6j&akid=5153%2E420207%2EPH4u6j ]Will you contribute a split donation between me and Pramila Jayapal to
stand against the Trump administration's unjust political intimidation?

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250616-1?amount=3&refcode=em20250616-5153&refcode2=5153_420207_PH4u6j&akid=5153%2E420207%2EPH4u6j ]Contribute

We set a goal of 5,000 new grassroots donors to stand with us before our
11:59pm deadline TONIGHT.

If we stand together we can amass the resources to mount a legal defense
against this baseless indictment and show the Trump administration that
the people who oppose his cruel agenda won’t be intimidated into silence.

This is far bigger than one person. The rule of law is under attack, and
what we do next matters.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250616-1?refcode=em20250616-5153&amount=3&refcode2=5153_420207_PH4u6j&akid=5153%2E420207%2EPH4u6j ]Can we count on you to donate now and stand up against the Trump
administration’s attacks on oversight, decency, and all who dare to speak
up for what’s right?

We’re in this together,

Rep. LaMonica McIver

Contribute to Pramila Jayapal: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20250616-5153-footer&t=1001&refcode2=5153_420207_PH4u6j&akid=5153%2E420207%2EPH4u6j

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.pramilaforcongress.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=5153%2E420207%2EPH4u6j

Paid for by Pramila for Congress.

name: Save NPR + PBS Alert via Our Revolution
subject: Urgent: NPR and PBS under attack
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/29454?t=1011&refcode=email-20230616_v&akid=8871%2E5885482%2E_Gqk02 ]Our Revolution logo

Peter Willis,

🚨🚨 This is URGENT: the House just passed an extreme request from Trump to
strip $1.1 billion from public media – money Congress already pledged to
keep NPR, PBS, and local stations broadcasting. 🚨🚨

Now, the bill must pass the Senate. And we are NOT going to let it happen.
Some Republican Senators like Maine's Susan Collins have already raised
doubts about their support for this reckless attempt to clawback funding:

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/29455?source=email-20230616&t=1061&akid=8871%2E5885482%2E_Gqk02 ]Headline:Sen. Collins signals oppostition to Trump administration for
cuts

Our Revolution has been preparing for exactly this scenario – scaling up
our grassroots presence and mobilization in key states like Maine, where
Senator Collins could cast a decisive vote.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/29454?t=1057&amount=22&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&refcode=email-20230616nd&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=8871%2E5885482%2E_Gqk02 ]We're pressuring Senators and mounting a massive push to save public
media. But this effort hinges entirely on support from grassroots donors –
will you step up today and chip in a contribution to fuel Our Revolution's
urgent work to protect public media?

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation to Our Revolution will process immediately.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/29454?t=1042&express_lane=true&amount=9&refcode=email-20230616nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=8871%2E5885482%2E_Gqk02 ]CHIP IN $9 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/29454?t=1043&express_lane=true&amount=22&refcode=email-20230616nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=8871%2E5885482%2E_Gqk02 ]CHIP IN $22

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/29454?t=1047&express_lane=true&amount=66&refcode=email-20230616nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=8871%2E5885482%2E_Gqk02 ]CHIP IN $66 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/29454?t=1048&amount=9&refcode=email-20230616nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=8871%2E5885482%2E_Gqk02 ]CHIP IN OTHER AMOUNT

This quest to kill public media is straight out of Trump's authoritarian
playbook: limit independent journalism, restrict the flow of accurate
information, and weaken our democracy. Which is why Trump has tried again
and again to defund NPR and PBS – because the truth is inconvenient to his
dangerous agenda.

Let's be clear about what's at stake: the heads of PBS and NPR have warned
that defunding public media will force stations off the air.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/29455?source=email-20230616&t=1060&akid=8871%2E5885482%2E_Gqk02 ]Headline:PBS head warns 'stations will be gone' if defunded'

Outlets like PBS and NPR aren't luxuries – they're lifelines, especially
in rural areas and underserved communities. Which is why Our Revolution is
urgently scaling up right now, unleashing tactics like targeted campaigns
in critical battlegrounds, flooding Senators' offices with letters from
constituents, and showing up in the Hill to put lawmakers on the spot
face-to-face.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/29454?t=1054&amount=22&refcode=email-20230616nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=8871%2E5885482%2E_Gqk02 ]The clock is ticking on this Senate vote. Your contribution today will be
used immediately to scale up our work in key states like Maine that will
decide whether we win or lose this battle. Can we count on you to stand
with us today to keep public media alive?

When we organize, we win.

name: The Real Texas PAC
subject: all eyes on GEORGIA - and now, the stakes could NOT be higher
body:
BREAKING OUT OF GEORGIA:
Gov. Brian Kemp is making quiet moves to hand the GOP a Senate seat on a silver platter.
According to new reports, he’s planning a secret visit to the White House to coordinate with Trump’s inner circle — and their goal is clear:
Flip Georgia red.
This isn’t just about one race. It’s about control of the Senate, and whether Trump and his allies can bulldoze their way back to unchecked power.
Georgia has been one of the only things standing between Trump and total dominance. It’s a crucial swing state — and Republicans know that if they flip it, their path to a permanent Senate majority becomes a whole lot easier.
We set a goal to raise $60,000 by the end of this month to power organizing in Georgia and defend other vulnerable Senate seats. But we’re still $13,638 behind, and the deadline is in just TWO DAYS. Will you rush a donation of any amount so we can help keep Georgia blue? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-georgia?refcode=052825_2]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to The Real Texas PAC will go through immediately: DONATE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-georgia?express_lane=true&refcode=052825_2&amount=5]
DONATE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-georgia?express_lane=true&refcode=052825_2&amount=10]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-georgia?express_lane=true&refcode=052825_2&amount=50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-georgia?express_lane=true&refcode=052825_2&amount=100]
DONATE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-georgia?express_lane=true&refcode=052825_2&amount=250]
Other Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-georgia?refcode=052825_2&amount=25]
If we don’t raise the resources to fight back now, we’re handing Georgia — and the Senate — to Trump on a silver platter.
Don’t let that happen. Pitch in whatever you can today to keep Georgia blue and block the MAGA agenda in its tracks:
👉 Donate now to help defend Georgia [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-georgia?refcode=052825_2]

body:

clean_body: | | | Peter, Millions of people took to the streets in protest on Saturday to send a clear message: Power belongs to the people.Our country accepts no kings. San Francisco, CA (Tayfun Coskun / Anadolu / Getty) The world has watched for months as Trump abuses his office to line his own pockets, attack our civil rights, and even throw himself a $100 million birthday parade with our tax money. But the sight of working people from all walks of life joining together — in big cities and small towns, in red states and blue states, in rain and shine — to say NO MORE is a source of inspiration, energy, and hope for us all. So we’ve been rounding up some of our favorite pictures from Saturday’s protests nationwide! Check them out: St. Paul, Minnesota (Stephen Maturen / Getty) New York City, NY (Dean Moses / AMNY) Atlanta, GA (Elijah Nouvelage / AFP / Getty) Louisville, KY (Jon Cherry / AP) Des Moines, IA (Fritz Nordengren / ZUMA Press Wire / Reuters) If you’re feeling as motivated as we are to build a country that puts the people over the powerful, or In solidarity, Team WFP Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. ## Democrats ‘Left Me’ and Working-Class Voters
New York City Mayor Eric Adams defended his record and positioned himself as the working-class candidate in this year’s mayoral race during a Fox News interview Monday. Adams, a former Democrat-turned-independent candidate, called out his former party of ahead of the Democrats’ June 24 primary. Dear Friend,
Our country stands at a pivotal moment. Congressman Scott Fitzgerald has taken bold action in 2025 defending communities and reinforcing national security, cutting wasteful spending, and boosting U.S. energy. We need your support to continue his critical work in Congress. In just the first half of 2025, Scott has taken these decisive actions: Voted “YES” on the Preventing Violence Against Women by Illegal Aliens Act- Protecting vulnerable Americans from violence by illegal immigrants.
Voted “YES” on the Safeguard American Voter Eligibility (SAVE) Act - Ensuring election integrity by requiring states to obtain proof of citizenship. Voted “YES” on the Protection of Women and Girls in Sports Act- Safeguarding fair competition and opportunities for female athletes nationwide. **** Voted “YES” to repeal several harmful Biden Administration Green New Deal rules, DEI initiatives, and ESG actions.******** Voted “YES” on several bills to codify President Trump's executive orders, such as the American Entrepreneurs First Act, the Save SBA from Sanctuary Cities Act, and the Fix Our Forests Act
Voted “YES” on the Laken Riley Act- Providing law enforcement with the tools they need to stop violent illegal immigrants. Voted “YES” on the No Rogue Rulings Act - preventing lawless judges from unilaterally halting the President's agenda.
Here is what that means: Scott Fitzgerald is a guardian of American values, standing up for safety, fairness, accountability, and national defense. But the challenges ahead are real. To maintain this momentum, Scott needs resources to reach every voter in Wisconsin's 5th District. Will you stand with Scott today and ensure he remains a voice for our shared principles? [Please contribute $5, $25, $100](https://scottfitzgeraldforcongress.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c59bc0db5e945d61b14749b2b&id=dc55bad3fe&e=561a28864e) or whatever you can afford now to fuel our grassroots outreach. Every dollar you give sends our message further, louder, and stronger. Let’s keep Scott fighting for YOU. Thank you for your support and patriotic spirit.
Sincerely,Team Fitzgerald
P.S. In 2025, Scott’s leadership has already made a difference. Let’s ensure his voice never goes unheard. [Please pitch in with a contribution of $5, $25, $100 or more today!](https://scottfitzgeraldforcongress.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c59bc0db5e945d61b14749b2b&id=45faca1622&e=561a28864e)

name: Lizzie Fletcher
subject: We must reject political violence
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS
body:
ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/82676/images/Non-Re-Elect%20Logo.png]
This weekend, we saw something terrifying—an attack on public servants and their families in Minnesota. Representative Melissa Hortman, a former Speaker of the Minnesota House, and her husband, were killed in their own home. Senator John Hoffman and his wife were also shot in their home. My heart breaks for their families, their communities, for the people of Minnesota, and for all Americans as we mourn and seek answers.
What happened in Minnesota is part of a deeply troubling pattern we are seeing across the country: political violence fueled by division, anger, and dangerous rhetoric.
In a democracy, debate and disagreement are essential. But when political disagreements turn into threats, intimidation, or violence, we all lose. No one should fear participating in civic life—whether attending a town hall, speaking out on issues, casting a vote, or running for office. The very fabric of our democracy depends on the safety and freedom of every person to engage without fear.
At a time when some seek to inflame divisions for political gain, we must all speak clearly: this is unacceptable. We each have a responsibility—especially those of us in public office—to reject language that dehumanizes, demonizes, or divides. Our words matter. Our actions matter.
I remain committed to doing my part to foster a politics grounded in respect, dialogue, and shared purpose—even when we disagree.
Thank you for standing with me in this work. Together, we can build a stronger, safer democracy for everyone.
Together, we can do anything,
Lizzie Signature [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/82676/images/lizzie_signature-1.png]

clean_body: Peter, June is a big month—and we knew we’d need this amazing team to step up. Thanks to your support, we reached our mid-month fundraising goal—and that puts us on track to finish June strong and ready for the challenges ahead. I'm so grateful to have you in this fight with me. These deadlines aren’t just about numbers on a screen...they help us build the foundation we need to organize, communicate, and compete, no matter what obstacles are placed in our way. The second half of this month will only get tougher, but with you by my side, I know we have the power in us! Thanks again for all that you do to support both me and this campaign. —Kim P.S. Our end-of-quarter deadline is June 30, and we’re aiming to raise $30,000 so we can post the strongest number possible. = Rep. Kim Schrier is a doctor, scientist, and mom, fighting for Washington's 8th District in Congress. This is one of the most competitive districts in the country, so we need your help to keep Kim in Congress. Chip in now to help protect Kim's seat. | = Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress Contributions or gifts to Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress are not tax deductible. name: AOC
subject: Our future will not be different until we make a different choice.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
We can change the page.
#
For so long, we have had political leadership — including in the Democratic Party — that has just wanted to play it safe.
That has just wanted to be neutral. Where so many people are motivated by their own individual political careers.
We have to have a politics of _integrity_ , not a politics of cowardice anymore.
We have to stand up for what is right in this country. **We can change the page**.
We will never get past Donald Trump if we continue to elect the same people and make the same decisions that got us here in the first place.
It does not matter your positions, your content, your ideas, how experienced you are. It doesn’t matter how much you work with them — they will _still_ choose their old friends and an old generation _every single time_.
**Our future will not be different until we make a different choice.**
People across the country are standing up to demand better of their leaders.
And we're meeting them at town halls on the road — in red, blue, and purple districts — **to build our progressive movement that is fighting from the bottom up for working class Americans**.
[Help us continue the fight with a grassroots contribution today.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250616.636s8r&refcode=em20250616-9106-P_FND_EGR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9106%2E2526796%2ErWU-wr)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250616.636s8r&refcode=em20250616-9106-P_FND_EGR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=9106%2E2526796%2ErWU-wr)**
In solidarity,
Alexandria

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20250616?refcode=em20250616-9106-P_FND_EGR_GRM&t=21&refcode2=9106_2526796_rWU-wr&akid=9106%2E2526796%2ErWU-wr)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20250616-9106-P_FND_EGR_GRM&t=22&akid=9106%2E2526796%2ErWU-wr)**

subject: The fight is not over, Peter.

body:
Trump and MAGA loyalists are trying to destroy our democracy. But, your $5 can help end the MAGA agenda. | | If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3-gP0Xd1LL-Lub7Gk22PHy9fFQlbRB0jPW5604PWnuQJaR4bfPizem0Sa1et7Ho3LTF_rw06tgY4oACZgnDTqfgPfalK4vZYT0oz5fhY5A5cHAo1pAgA55moTMBXLiVhryMcT6XdOLx42GmVguH0B22ps3uL-ym0pXIgLM6zCkpUnG9x3V4Zl-EQJJVZGBw6hBbtZzP-frQS8EwQlSRWBe5VhzOfLmRnFDrtC2NEDUq_HIhtm3nA5uE-7SOLFJr66ePVdjxOJ2YXDCNZHK_HYvXy_T4I9nBOx6m9XwkZRQ7HRYZrfx3sj6JfSZRZnAkaK27aDWoQNZYajiW4SRHZJ-vXpChaTdnv65nT7fTDjQ9RQVeYLp_p-k5NjpPW4JnyJjs4fAXqAlibPHk8H7ukIB3wvnn6Fdr7kLlR74PT3LXcbEi2HtVE_rGHBmEtqPGwdol1-jZ7Fm3Y5v6jFQTnqpe9wXSZVIQhwGN73ObSbr2Lw/4he/tqoczx_ZTUGqihRYF9LRNw/h0/h001.u1f0VL4iDZaSgtz-qfs1oXn0yX0-HdqVZOSdt9qsSYg).

| | Hey Peter,

My campaign's critical deadline is just 24 hours away. While we’re fighting to build a more just and equitable future, Trump and his MAGA allies are working to dismantle our fundamental rights and freedoms.

Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene let **[Democrat Governor of New York Kathy Hochul have it](https://substack.com/redirect/d8a1e775-8650-4cf8-8ccb-f20f378501f6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** during a fiery congress clash on the destructiveness of sanctuary policies in her state.
[Click To Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/d8a1e775-8650-4cf8-8ccb-f20f378501f6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/d8a1e775-8650-4cf8-8ccb-f20f378501f6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"Gov. Hochul you stated that you are a 'proud registered Democrat?'" Greene started to ask the governor.
**["Yes is that illegal now too in your country?!"](https://substack.com/redirect/d8a1e775-8650-4cf8-8ccb-f20f378501f6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** Hochul fired back sarcastically.
"Gov. Hochul, this is not a laughing matter," Greene responded before evoking the mother of Laken Riley, a young nursing student who was murdered by an illegal immigrant in Georgia. "Because of your state's policies of paying for flights of illegal aliens, we ended up with Jose Ibarra in our state of Georgia,... you and I are both mothers and there is one mother who I wish could be here today and could talk to you instead of me and that's Allyson Phillips, that's Laken Riley's mother,..."
**["I gotta tell you though, it's so much bullshit](https://substack.com/redirect/d8a1e775-8650-4cf8-8ccb-f20f378501f6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** when it comes down to the fact that this little girl fought for 17 minutes at the end of her 22 year old life!" Greene lost it at Hochul. "As a registered Democrat, I don't know how you can uphold laws that protect and give aid and comfort to monsters!!"
Watch the tense moment here:
[Click To Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/d8a1e775-8650-4cf8-8ccb-f20f378501f6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

# Iran wants to negotiate after devastating Israeli strike
Iran is **[reportedly seeking peace negotiations](https://substack.com/redirect/e8f861ba-296d-41b9-860f-91d535fdc38d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** after Israel's devastating missile strike targeting the regime's nuclear facilities this past weekend.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/e8f861ba-296d-41b9-860f-91d535fdc38d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Requests for United States Remaining Uninvolved** : Iran has approached Arab intermediaries to convey its willingness to engage in talks, contingent upon the United States refraining from direct involvement in the conflict. "We're not involved in it," President Trump told ABC News. "It's possible we could get involved. But we are not at this moment involved."
* **Market Reactions** : Reports of Iran's interest in negotiations have led to a surge in global financial markets, with the Dow Jones Industrial Average rising by over 300 points. Oil prices also fell by approximately 3%, indicating investor optimism about potential de-escalation.
* **Ongoing Hostilities** : Despite diplomatic overtures, hostilities continue, with Iran launching additional missile attacks on June 16, resulting in civilian casualties and damage to infrastructure in Israel.

* * *
# Nearly 1 million illegal migrants have self-deported and wages have risen?!
President Donald Trump's deportation strategy is two-fold, and **[the part no one is talking about is actually the most effective one.](https://substack.com/redirect/57a8ce94-9053-4499-962c-eb0ac1f15697?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
* **Voluntary Departures Initiative** : The Trump administration has implemented a two-track immigration enforcement strategy. One track focuses on arresting and deporting primarily criminal aliens, while the second encourages voluntary departures. This approach includes mandatory federal registration for all aliens and a public campaign urging illegal migrants to exit voluntarily, possibly with future re-entry opportunities.
* **Financial Incentives** : To facilitate self-deportation, the Department of Homeland Security (DHS) rebranded Biden's CBP One app to allow migrants to declare their intent to leave. Additionally, a $1,000 stipend is offered to incentivize voluntary departure, a cost-effective alternative to the average $17,100 expense per individual for physical deportation.
* **US Economic Impact** : Reports indicate that nearly one million foreign-born workers have exited the U.S. labor force since March 2025. This reduction has led to a rise in average hourly wages, which increased by 0.4% in May, reaching $36.24. The decrease in the immigrant workforce has compelled businesses to offer higher wages to attract workers.
* **Historical Context** : Voluntary departures have historically outpaced arrests. For instance, during President Dwight Eisenhower's 1954 deportation roundup, nearly 10 individuals left voluntarily for each one arrested. Similarly, a post-9/11 registration program also drove self-deportations.

* * *
# Violent attacker SLASHES NYC officers after charging into Manhattan courtroom
An assailant was arrested after charging into a Lower Manhattan courthouse earlier today and violently **[attacking New York City officers with a knife.](https://substack.com/redirect/e0bf6b96-db2a-4f95-876e-7233a5a51f50?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/e0bf6b96-db2a-4f95-876e-7233a5a51f50?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Violent Attack at Manhattan Courthouse** : On June 16, 2025, Jonathan Wohl, 37, from Queens, entered the Manhattan Criminal Court around 9:30 a.m. and attacked two court officers with a knife--one in the face and the other in the neck. He also shoved a third officer into a barrier. Surveillance footage confirmed the targeted nature of the assault. Wohl was quickly subdued and disarmed by other officers near the building's security screening area.
* **Suspect's Background** : Wohl has a history of 18 prior arrests, primarily related to drug offenses, and has been known to harass court officers. He had no scheduled court appearance on the day of the attack.
* **Injuries and Response** : The injured officers were hospitalized and are in stable condition.
* **Security Concerns Raised** : The incident has highlighted concerns about severe understaffing in New York City's court system. Patrick Cullen, president of the New York State Supreme Court Officers Association, emphasized the dangers posed by insufficient security personnel and urged immediate action to protect court staff and the public.

Marjorie Taylor Greene let during a fiery congress clash on the destructiveness of sanctuary policies in her state. "Gov. Hochul you stated that you are a 'proud registered Democrat?'" Greene started to ask the governor. Hochul fired back sarcastically. "Gov. Hochul, this is not a laughing matter," Greene responded before evoking the mother of Laken Riley, a young nursing student who was murdered by an illegal immigrant in Georgia. "Because of your state's policies of paying for flights of illegal aliens, we ended up with Jose Ibarra in our state of Georgia,... you and I are both mothers and there is one mother who I wish could be here today and could talk to you instead of me and that's Allyson Phillips, that's Laken Riley's mother,..." when it comes down to the fact that this little girl fought for 17 minutes at the end of her 22 year old life!" Greene lost it at Hochul. "As a registered Democrat, I don't know how you can uphold laws that protect and give aid and comfort to monsters!!" Watch the tense moment here: | | ---|---|--- What we are seeing right now is truly historic. President Trump has been pushing the limits on what is possible. I haven't seen anything like this since President Ronald Reagan. But with this unbelievable push for an American First agenda, comes a few problems. Well, as President Trump said in a recent interview I had with him... "There could be a little disruption. What we're doing is building a foundation for the future." If you want to learn more about , go ahead read this that just went up. It's filled with some valuable information about what's in store for America, and what we could potentially be up against. Yours Truly, SEAN HANNITY | | ---|---|--- Iran wants to negotiate after devastating Israeli strike Iran is after Israel's devastating missile strike targeting the regime's nuclear facilities this past weekend. | | ---|---|--- Requests for United States Remaining Uninvolved : Iran has approached Arab intermediaries to convey its willingness to engage in talks, contingent upon the United States refraining from direct involvement in the conflict. "We're not involved in it," President Trump told ABC News. "It's possible we could get involved. But we are not at this moment involved." Market Reactions : Reports of Iran's interest in negotiations have led to a surge in global financial markets, with the Dow Jones Industrial Average rising by over 300 points. Oil prices also fell by approximately 3%, indicating investor optimism about potential de-escalation. Ongoing Hostilities : Despite diplomatic overtures, hostilities continue, with Iran launching additional missile attacks on June 16, resulting in civilian casualties and damage to infrastructure in Israel. Nearly 1 million illegal migrants have self-deported and wages have risen?! President Donald Trump's deportation strategy is two-fold, and Voluntary Departures Initiative : The Trump administration has implemented a two-track immigration enforcement strategy. One track focuses on arresting and deporting primarily criminal aliens, while the second encourages voluntary departures. This approach includes mandatory federal registration for all aliens and a public campaign urging illegal migrants to exit voluntarily, possibly with future re-entry opportunities. Financial Incentives : To facilitate self-deportation, the Department of Homeland Security (DHS) rebranded Biden's CBP One app to allow migrants to declare their intent to leave. Additionally, a $1,000 stipend is offered to incentivize voluntary departure, a cost-effective alternative to the average $17,100 expense per individual for physical deportation. US Economic Impact : Reports indicate that nearly one million foreign-born workers have exited the U.S. labor force since March 2025. This reduction has led to a rise in average hourly wages, which increased by 0.4% in May, reaching $36.24. The decrease in the immigrant workforce has compelled businesses to offer higher wages to attract workers. Historical Context : Voluntary departures have historically outpaced arrests. For instance, during President Dwight Eisenhower's 1954 deportation roundup, nearly 10 individuals left voluntarily for each one arrested. Similarly, a post-9/11 registration program also drove self-deportations. Violent attacker SLASHES NYC officers after charging into Manhattan courtroom An assailant was arrested after charging into a Lower Manhattan courthouse earlier today and violently | | ---|---|--- Violent Attack at Manhattan Courthouse : On June 16, 2025, Jonathan Wohl, 37, from Queens, entered the Manhattan Criminal Court around 9:30 a.m. and attacked two court officers with a knife--one in the face and the other in the neck. He also shoved a third officer into a barrier. Surveillance footage confirmed the targeted nature of the assault. Wohl was quickly subdued and disarmed by other officers near the building's security screening area. Suspect's Background : Wohl has a history of 18 prior arrests, primarily related to drug offenses, and has been known to harass court officers. He had no scheduled court appearance on the day of the attack. Injuries and Response : The injured officers were hospitalized and are in stable condition. Security Concerns Raised : The incident has highlighted concerns about severe understaffing in New York City's court system. Patrick Cullen, president of the New York State Supreme Court Officers Association, emphasized the dangers posed by insufficient security personnel and urged immediate action to protect court staff and the public. | | POLL Should the U.S. join Israel and wipe out Iran or try to reach peace through negotiations? | ? ? ? * PolitiBrawl is a reader-supported publication. Meet Royce White:

**Born and raised in the Twin Cities, Royce White was the son of a single mother and started playing sports at the age of 5 years old. Living in various neighborhoods growing up, much of his family remained in the Rondo community, where he spent much of his time and received schooling. White excelled at basketball and recieved a scholarship to play basketball at the University of Minnesota, and later transferred to Iowa State. He would go on to make Dean's List while receiving All Big-12 first-team honors and many other basketball awards.

_After being selected 16th overall by The Houston Rockets in the NBA draft, White began to voice concerns about the NBA 's collective bargaining agreement (CBA), specifically regarding mental health policy, which at the time did not exist. Eventually, his concerns became a public dispute between White and the NBA. This resulted in White demanding that the NBA, as a representative of the global corporate community, take up the responsibility of spearheading the mental health conversation - not just posturing through press statements, but through policy._

Royce then went on to win two championships in Canada before moving over to play Big 3 Basketball. White appeared at a game in a t-shirt that read "Free The Uyghurs." After a game-winning basket, White did a post-game interview on CBS, where he called for 2 Million Uyghurs to be freed and released from concentration camps. As the season went on, White would touch on taboo topics such as Gain of Function Research, The Federal Reserve, Julian Assange, Edward Snowden, Larry Hoover, Jeff Fort, Muammar Gaddafi, The Great Reset, Ivermectin, Me Too, etc.

Now, Royce White is running for Senate in Minnesota to take down the Radical Left. Republicans have not seen recent success in Minnesota, but Royce's campaign is different: a grassroots movement that's sick of the Radical Agenda pushed by Far Left Democrats Tina Smith and Ilhan Omar. Royce needs your help to pull off a fourth quarter comeback victory and FLIP Minnesota Red for Republicans.

They've got media, money, and deep state machinery. We've got the truth--and we've got you. Are you in? God. Country. Courage. Let's go. Royce White America First. Forever. Meet Royce White: Born and raised in the Twin Cities, Royce White was the son of a single mother and started playing sports at the age of 5 years old. Living in various neighborhoods growing up, much of his family remained in the Rondo community, where he spent much of his time and received schooling. White excelled at basketball and recieved a scholarship to play basketball at the University of Minnesota, and later transferred to Iowa State. He would go on to make Dean's List while receiving All Big-12 first-team honors and many other basketball awards. After being selected 16th overall by The Houston Rockets in the NBA draft, White began to voice concerns about the NBA 's collective bargaining agreement (CBA), specifically regarding mental health policy, which at the time did not exist. Eventually, his concerns became a public dispute between White and the NBA. This resulted in White demanding that the NBA, as a representative of the global corporate community, take up the responsibility of spearheading the mental health conversation - not just posturing through press statements, but through policy. Royce then went on to win two championships in Canada before moving over to play Big 3 Basketball. White appeared at a game in a t-shirt that read "Free The Uyghurs." After a game-winning basket, White did a post-game interview on CBS, where he called for 2 Million Uyghurs to be freed and released from concentration camps. As the season went on, White would touch on taboo topics such as Gain of Function Research, The Federal Reserve, Julian Assange, Edward Snowden, Larry Hoover, Jeff Fort, Muammar Gaddafi, The Great Reset, Ivermectin, Me Too, etc. Now, Royce White is running for Senate in Minnesota to take down the Radical Left. Republicans have not seen recent success in Minnesota, but Royce's campaign is different: a grassroots movement that's sick of the Radical Agenda pushed by Far Left Democrats Tina Smith and Ilhan Omar. Royce needs your help to pull off a fourth quarter comeback victory and FLIP Minnesota Red for Republicans. PAID FOR BY ROYCE WHITE FOR SENATE P.O. Box 5473 Hopkins, MN 55343 Copyright (C) 2025 Royce White For Senate, All rights reserved.

name: Patty Murray
subject: Our greatest national treasure is on the line
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
| | |
---
Peter – America's national parks, monuments, and other pristinely preserved public lands and waters are national treasures.

(Few more so, in my opinion, than the iconic Mount Rainier, Olympic, and North Cascades National Parks in Washington state.)

As such, I'd hate to someday have to tell future generations:
_"See that river of sludge? It**used** to be clear and chock-full of salmon."

"See that charred mountainside? It **used** to be an old-growth forest with campgrounds and hiking trails."_

"_See that smokestack?**It used to be a national park.** "_
And that's why the Department of the Interior (DOI) exists in the first place. Per its founding statute, the agency is legally obligated to conserve our national parks and public lands for the next generation so we don't have to tell them how it used to be. But since Trump picked Doug Burgum as the department's secretary, things have been headed in the wrong direction.

**Because one of the first things on his to-do list was to illegally freeze grants and lay off thousands of national park rangers and staff** – **including Mount Rainier's only plumber** – **shortchanging our public lands while Trump fights to make sure billionaires like him and Doug Burgum get even more tax breaks**
So at Burgum's Senate Appropriation Committee hearing, I asked how many more workers were on the chopping block and how the cuts would ever improve efficiency, protect our natural resources, or keep visitors safe.
It was no surprise when he dodged them all – **so while I had his ear, I made sure he got the message loud and clear: **
**1.** Our public lands are **NOT** for sale.
**2.** Protecting our wilderness, supporting tribal nations, and keeping our communities safe is nonnegotiable.
**3.** Pushing out critical staff will leave our parks, visitors, rangers, firefighters, EMTs, and other critical staff in _**dire jeopardy.**_
**4. **Our national parks are **too vast and too wild** to be safely managed by a skeleton crew. The job _literally_ cannot be done without the people.
**5. **We MUST keep our public lands in the public's hands – so** ** I say** NO WAY **to Trump’s budget cuts.
And NOW, Republicans have slipped a provision into their Big, Ugly Betrayal of a bill that would allow them to SELL OFF public lands. NO WAY. One of the best ways we can try to stop billionaires like Trump and his millionaire cronies like Burgum from destroying _America the Beautiful_ is to show my Senate Republican colleagues that **if they back budget cuts to our public lands or try to sell off our public lands, then the public will wash our hands of them at the ballot box.**
**[Peter, you can help me prove it by making my fundraising numbers the cold, hard proof that MAGA Republicans are on thin ice. Will you please help me build a SURGE of grassroots support toward saving America's natural wonders by rushing $5 or more today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109709772/551983075/-1711732667?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk516-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNzg5ZDIyZS1mYjRhLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bHP4sCJKJvj4ruq6y5iHZA4W8sl3rv-H63NNgkZoJZw=)**

name: Jane Fonda
subject: This is what climate leadership looks like
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Elizabeth Guzman
body:
| | | Hi Friend,
Jane Fonda here. There’s a lot of noise in politics these days — but when you find someone like Elizabeth Guzmán,_you pay attention._
**Elizabeth is exactly the kind of leader I had in mind when I launched the Jane Fonda Climate PAC: someone who listens to their community, stands up to powerful polluters, and puts people over profits.[That’s why I hope you’ll join me in contributing whatever amount makes sense for you today.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtlD_sLtn7jElHJoP9AHBoiVoJ1gvvgDIeQFa3BP71OUwzK56PMl5s8qa2nvLanbZJYg2UHoukqbXNCcY9PcdWP7K5gS1cdOEr0PmfYI-M1HiCwrEXlpFx_XNAdliIfTCHop6KlQZvLgJ6bTACHuSgoNf3Zjc_vur0mMQkuyi-hk7v6oHV2gG8_x6P7az82mKsyydXU3dajoOic6CdB7C-Hju2eNQFMHwDotSj91XkzJqOg3FLZ8RbchPSRx-bRPUi3hH61fBkpMcLuz1AIi-7-KdvncYD5PNqb3CO3AafyGzeIOWZdcN-SlwJW40U6hd86nLwGsmQSD4GTn15CoLsHmUjeOhuJEHao73u37PT1eyTxK49TvxFeDNzVRI74eRM/4he/2qX5kvx5RXCiAMRAADJkbA/h0/h001.eD6VXemIb28rnWazd-LU3gfLRYkXB93cLB5wn7ZBP0g)**
Elizabeth Guzmán is a mom, a social worker, a union member who immigrated from Peru with $300 to her name, worked three minimum wage jobs to support her family, and made history as one of the first Latinas elected to Virginia’s General Assembly.
And it’s no surprise why. Her platform is rooted in justice, equity, and real solutions to the climate crisis and she is fully committed to making sure Virginia’s future is powered by people, not corporate greed.
She’s fought to protect our waterways from toxic gold mining, pushed to hold polluters accountable and knows it’s well past time to declare climate change an emergency.
She knows that climate change hits frontline families first and hardest. That’s why she championed clean energy investments in working-class communities across the state.
**If we want to win the fight for our future and resist the dangerous agenda of Donald Trump and MAGA Republicans everywhere, we need to support candidates like Elizabeth, especially in critical down-ballot races like this.**
******[Will you chip in what you can to help power Elizabeth’s campaign?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtlD_sLtn7jElHJoP9AHBoiVoJ1gvvgDIeQFa3BP71OUwzK56PMl5s8qa2nvLanbZLO8IRfS8dDmSOZt5UX48eowd2gQmD3ZnV91Q_EZWZhW_4Kqdya-OVuJXA84yRaqukiZcpCqbX6mxLqTTPOrqF3iLqwyKPV6xg9zgxdWoTn7fynwgLyXex8ajwmN_jNsPuAEBbZl-4IU4nRCfTdRC9XzEZnxC-jw7HP2TlPIwCrVpH7NIV7g6a0uAzZHBlyJmUDNtN1ArfpZwyISIpUbCmmVQFtV3ytc9WKyAsZm4isOz0UTcT-84G8wr2og85oZSH7qvoI9Xylv6adE-2Wl-ll5PQI8MonDzdncw7aWa-g6ljhHQIO852Z1qZ7dAXcfow/4he/2qX5kvx5RXCiAMRAADJkbA/h1/h001.BGDvfYalyothWX-Nt423t9dA7zJz5LuxXhQTozJpRC4)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately._ [Donate $10

name: David Hogg
subject: Infuriating.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
This is no joke, Peter.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20250616-1&t=1&akid=2269%2E587540%2EI6Im9W)
Peter, it is fucking infuriating to watch the Trump administration wreak havoc on our government and enact their dangerous, destructive agenda.
We need to be taking pages out of Mitch McConnell’s playbook that he used for years to stop Obama, to stop Biden, and prevent Democrats from passing our agenda. Everything has to be on the table to stop and slow Trump.
On top of that, we need to be organizing against vulnerable Republicans and turning the screws on them. We have to make their lives as painful as possible and line up the incentives for them to oppose Trump.
And finally we have to look ahead to upcoming elections and get behind people that are filled with rage over Trump’s actions and have a burning fire within them to stop Trump and fight aggressively for a vision of this country that allows us to have more affordable housing, better healthcare, and provides some real economic opportunity and security.
That’s where we come in.
**[Can you pitch in $5 to power our mission to elect the next generation of leaders?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250616_1_infuriating?refcode=em20250616-2269&amount=5&refcode2=2269_587540_I6Im9W&akid=2269%2E587540%2EI6Im9W)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250616_1_infuriating?amount=5&refcode=em20250616-2269&refcode2=2269_587540_I6Im9W&akid=2269%2E587540%2EI6Im9W)**
This is no joke. _Every single day counts in the fight ahead._ If we fall short of this goal, we’ll be at a serious disadvantage going into the critical battles to come.
**Here’s the truth:** The GOP is already gearing up for the next fight. If we don’t keep our fundraising on track, the billionaires and corporate elite will keep pouring money into the Republican right-wing agenda while Democrats and progressives are left scrambling.
**But we’re not going to let that happen.** We may not have the special interests on our side, but I know that the grassroots can be even more powerful.
**We need leaders who fight for working families, voting rights, and climate justice. Leaders who will not back down when things get tough.**
That’s exactly why Leaders We Deserve exists. Now, we need your help to make sure we can keep electing the young, progressive leaders we deserve.
**[Can you chip in $5 right now to help power our game-changing work?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250616_1_infuriating?refcode=em20250616-2269&amount=5&refcode2=2269_587540_I6Im9W&akid=2269%2E587540%2EI6Im9W)**

clean_body: This is no joke, Peter. Peter, it is fucking infuriating to watch the Trump administration wreak havoc on our government and enact their dangerous, destructive agenda. We need to be taking pages out of Mitch McConnell’s playbook that he used for years to stop Obama, to stop Biden, and prevent Democrats from passing our agenda. Everything has to be on the table to stop and slow Trump. On top of that, we need to be organizing against vulnerable Republicans and turning the screws on them. We have to make their lives as painful as possible and line up the incentives for them to oppose Trump. And finally we have to look ahead to upcoming elections and get behind people that are filled with rage over Trump’s actions and have a burning fire within them to stop Trump and fight aggressively for a vision of this country that allows us to have more affordable housing, better healthcare, and provides some real economic opportunity and security. That’s where we come in. This is no joke. Every single day counts in the fight ahead. If we fall short of this goal, we’ll be at a serious disadvantage going into the critical battles to come. Here’s the truth: The GOP is already gearing up for the next fight. If we don’t keep our fundraising on track, the billionaires and corporate elite will keep pouring money into the Republican right-wing agenda while Democrats and progressives are left scrambling. But we’re not going to let that happen. We may not have the special interests on our side, but I know that the grassroots can be even more powerful. We need leaders who fight for working families, voting rights, and climate justice. Leaders who will not back down when things get tough. That’s exactly why Leaders We Deserve exists. Now, we need your help to make sure we can keep electing the young, progressive leaders we deserve. Thank you for being part of this movement, David Hogg Leaders We Deserve

body:

Team, tomorrow is the big day – Election Day! Have you made your plan to vote?
Virginia’s future will be decided by what happens during these primaries, team. We need to use this moment to elect leaders like Jay Jones, who will fight for working families across the Commonwealth.
