name: Jeff Merkley
subject: Fighting authoritarianism
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon
body:
Over the weekend, millions of people took to the streets at No Kings rallies, united in one message.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109710311/551985145/150430950?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZWU3NTU4Ny1mZDRhLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EgwkHl0JaxmI6UDpWZyrdkJk7H8lurpd_PebXhKsqh0=&emci=9ce75587-fd4a-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=9ee75587-fd4a-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=7731215)
---

| | Over the weekend, millions of people took to the streets at No Kings rallies, united in one message: **"No Kings, No Tyrants, No Dictators."** Across the country, Americans showed up to speak out against Trump's authoritarianism. In the last week, we've seen too many examples of Trump and his administration doing everything in their power to harm our communities, demoralize us, and silence our voices, including shoving California Senator Alex Padilla to the ground and forcibly handcuffing him. Let's be clear: the treatment of Senator Padilla wasn't an isolated incident. It was a power move meant to crush dissent and democratic resistance. **But once again, it backfired. We won't stop raising our voices and showing them we won't sleepwalk into authoritarianism.** Make no mistake: We are facing a rising authoritarian threat, and what we do next matters more than ever. **Protest is powerful, but so is building long-term political power.** What does that mean? clean_body: Over the weekend, millions of people took to the streets at No Kings rallies, united in one message. | | | | Over the weekend, millions of people took to the streets at No Kings rallies, united in one message: "No Kings, No Tyrants, No Dictators." Across the country, Americans showed up to speak out against Trump's authoritarianism. In the last week, we've seen too many examples of Trump and his administration doing everything in their power to harm our communities, demoralize us, and silence our voices, including shoving California Senator Alex Padilla to the ground and forcibly handcuffing him. Let's be clear: the treatment of Senator Padilla wasn't an isolated incident. It was a power move meant to crush dissent and democratic resistance. But once again, it backfired. We won't stop raising our voices and showing them we won't sleepwalk into authoritarianism. Make no mistake: We are facing a rising authoritarian threat, and what we do next matters more than ever. Protest is powerful, but so is building long-term political power. What does that mean? That means organizing. That means voting. That means electing leaders who will fight for our freedoms, not hand them over to Trump. That's why I started The Blue Wave Project — a grassroots effort made up of people like you to elect progressive leaders across the country who are ready to stand up to authoritarianism, take on the powerful and the privileged, and protect our We the People democracy at every level. = = Onward! name: Donald J. Trump
subject: Atop the Golden Escalator
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Never Surrender, Inc
body:
Ten years ago today, I launched the MAGA movement and declared my candidacy for President of the United States. The Golden Age of America has only been possible because you were by my side!
| | | | [](https://link.email.donaldjtrump.)
---
## **10 YEARS OF MAGA!**

Friend,
Ten years ago today, I launched the MAGA movement and declared my candidacy for President of the United States.
It all started at the top of that Golden Escalator in Trump Tower.
After all the indictments, witch hunts, hoaxes, campaigns, assassination attempts, **I must say that I regret nothing!!**
I had the audacity to say what others wouldn’t:
**AMERICA WAS GONE!**
Open Borders, Major Crime, Unsafe Cities, No More American Jobs... Obama spit in the face of Americans.
**I COULDN’T STAND BY WHILE OUR ONCE GREAT COUNTRY DISAPPEARED!**
So, when I descended the Golden Escalator and launched the greatest political movement in American history - THE MAGA MOVEMENT - I did it because of you.
The forgotten men and women of America would be forgotten no longer.
_[I AM DONALD TRUMP, and I became, and still am, your voice! The farmers, the factory workers, the police, the moms and dads, our great TROOPS - I LOVE YOU!](https://link.email.donaldjtrump.)_
Let this letter serve as a reminder to you and everyone else, in America and across the globe: **DONALD J. TRUMP WILL NEVER SURRENDER!**
I make this solemn promise to you: I will never stop fighting to SAVE AMERICA for the Golden Age of America is just beginning!
It’s all thanks to you...seriously.
**_[So, before you click away, I want to ask you just one thing: WILL YOU STAND WITH TRUMP AND MAGA FOR ANOTHER 10 YEARS?>](https://link.email.donaldjtrump.)_**
[STAND WITH TRUMP AND MAGA!](https://link.email.donaldjtrump.)
The forces of evil want nothing more than for you and me to stand idly by and do nothing.
But I know you won’t do that. WHY?
Because MAGA IS FOREVER!
**[So, if you are willing and able, today I am asking you to give what you can afford, so we can make sure that America’s GOLDEN AGE NEVER ENDS.](https://link.email.donaldjtrump.)**

[STAND WITH TRUMP AND MAGA!](https://link.email.donaldjtrump.)
May God bless you,
[](https://link.email.donaldjtrump.)
[](https://link.email.donaldjtrump.)
Donald J. Trump

President of the United States
[STAND WITH TRUMP AND MAGA!](https://link.email.donaldjtrump.)

The army celebrated its 250th anniversary this weekend in an incredibly patriotic fashion. Thank god that President Trump is in office to honor and celebrate our country and its 250th birthday. If Democrats were in power the army might not have even gotten a mention or an acknowledgement for their bravery and dedication. CNN was busy covering the "No Kings" protest in which most protestors weren't entirely sure what they were protesting. If you were in Washington D.C. this weekend then Butterworth's was the place to be after the parade. Restaurateur and editor of the National Pulse, Raheem Kassam joins me to discuss the hottest MAGA joint in town and President Trump's exceptional leadership. A battered and beaten down Iran is ready to come to the negotiation table after Israel took out several of Iran's senior commanders. John Reid is running for Lieutenant Governor in Virginia and currently leading in the polls. Reid is a loyal Republican candidate and has endorsed fellow GOP candidates like Miyares and Winsome. Tomorrow Reid will find out which Democrat he is running against and ready to fight against their radical left policies.
Featuring:
**Raheem Kassam**
Editor | National Pulse
Restaurateur | Butterworth's
https://thenationalpulse.com/
Check out Raheem's D.C. hotspot next time your in town: https://www.butterworths.club/
**John Reid**
Republican Candidate | Lieutenant Governor, VA https://www.johnreidforvirginia.com/

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Add your name: Kristi Noem should resign
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
|
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=8688%2E5257348%2E7AiexI)
**[Derek — Last week, I called on DHS Secretary Kristi Noem to resign. If you agree, add your name today.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1023?c0=eg-2506-noemresignation.wDU4T0&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20250616_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=8688%2E5257348%2E7AiexI)**
[](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1023?c0=eg-2506-noemresignation.wDU4T0&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20250616_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=5&akid=8688%2E5257348%2E7AiexI)
Last week's action, when Alex Padilla was forcibly removed from the public press conference in Los Angeles, was just another check in a long list of terrible things Kristi Noem has done. (In fact, during that press conference, she said she was bringing in the troops to liberate the city from the “socialists.” She wouldn’t know a socialist from a socialite.)
From the start, Kristi Noem has been hyper-partisan and incompetent in a role that demands a serious person.
The Department of Homeland Security has tremendous responsibility: keeping the country safe, controlling immigration and border issues, protecting our people.
This position demands someone of stature, who would bring the necessary thought and determination to protect our country.
**_That is not Kristi Noem._**
She is spending her time cosplaying as different characters — a police officer, a border patrol agent, Coast Guard co-pilot. Often using humans as her props, like when she stood in front of the prisoners in a maximum security prison in El Salvador wearing her $50,000 watch.
But worse are the draconian and cruel immigration policies she is enacting. Dividing families, causing unquestionable heartbreak. Policies violating court orders, and sending people to maximum security prisons in foreign countries without due process.
I’ve met with people and families deeply hurt by Kristi Noem’s policies. She is not only unqualified but actively harming our families, our values, our economy, and our country.
**[She cannot stay in this position. Join me in calling for Kristi Noem’s resignation as DHS Secretary today.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1023?c0=eg-2506-noemresignation.wDU4T0&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20250616_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=6&akid=8688%2E5257348%2E7AiexI)**

---
I will continue to call on Kristi Noem to resign. The louder our voices, the more impact we will have.
Thank you,
Adam

clean_body: | Last week's action, when Alex Padilla was forcibly removed from the public press conference in Los Angeles, was just another check in a long list of terrible things Kristi Noem has done. (In fact, during that press conference, she said she was bringing in the troops to liberate the city from the “socialists.” She wouldn’t know a socialist from a socialite.) From the start, Kristi Noem has been hyper-partisan and incompetent in a role that demands a serious person. The Department of Homeland Security has tremendous responsibility: keeping the country safe, controlling immigration and border issues, protecting our people. This position demands someone of stature, who would bring the necessary thought and determination to protect our country. That is not Kristi Noem. She is spending her time cosplaying as different characters — a police officer, a border patrol agent, Coast Guard co-pilot. Often using humans as her props, like when she stood in front of the prisoners in a maximum security prison in El Salvador wearing her $50,000 watch. But worse are the draconian and cruel immigration policies she is enacting. Dividing families, causing unquestionable heartbreak. | [](https://substack.com/redirect/6c86ce99-8866-4b90-8257-c9f596bca92f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|

### **The Blue Letter: No Kings, No Tyrants, No Trump Parades**
You could almost hear the faint echo of fascist failure on the streets of Washington this weekend, had their been enough traffic to make a sound. Donald Trump's birthday "parade"--an attempted flex of strongman theater--fell flat on its distended, gold-plated face.
Despite all the drunken, Drumpf puffery, the sycophantic hype from his MAGA-mini me's and wannabe Pinochet pageantry, turnout was, what's the industry term again? Oh, right, _pathetic_. The "King" couldn't even summon enough peasants for sustained applause.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/cdfbcde3-7f95-4491-b143-1205f7821f2a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
But, while Trump's ego may have taken a hit, this just fed his rage to keep it goose-stepping on schedule. In fact, his response to his failed fourth-grade-play version of authoritarian military charades was to lash out. Even as his violent fantasies have already, tragically, been converted into marching orders by the brownshirt ordained.
On Truth Social, Trump posted a bonkers screed that wasn't just autocrat mad libs--but a blueprint for vigilante chaos. He accused blue-state governors like Gavin Newsom and Kathy Hochul of "losing control" (this, from the sloth who passed out at his own parade) and threatened to override them with federal force.
That's not just the tired rhetoric of pissant pipsqueak feeling the personal weakness we know eats him up inside. It's the tin-pot totalitarian threatening fascism by failing app, and trying to seize Article I Congressional war powers via meme. **It's also a bright green light to the unhinged among his horde** --and they are many--to live out his violent fantasies.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/fab52be6-868f-42b8-a027-5ce0727b3d82?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
**Trump is actively inciting rogue action** --not just from his cult base, but from the bevy of the forlorn, the feeble, the fanatical--that he's embedded deep in the government. Trump's telegraphing a hostile takeover using ICE and law enforcement, encouraging supporters to "gear up," to view blue cities not as American communities, but as enemy territory filled with those that are less-than-human.
It's not a dog whistle. It's training his Rottweilers to bite. And a good number of his adherents who are less than intellectually agile are listening to his message, with horrific results.
This weekend, two Democratic leaders in Minnesota were murdered. While we wait on official investigations, the facts emerging are frightening, the results expected. A man dressed as a police officer, and an avid Trump supporter who's backed numerous loony right-wing causes, murdered two elected public servants.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/1b0bb0c5-e2dc-425a-aef3-e6bb7697448b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Look back at Trump's Truth Social post again. He viciously targeted "Democrat-run cities." He elevated vigilante justice. He all but gave permission for the next Timothy McVeigh to act with impunity, with the words he wrote--and repeats on a daily basis.
Much like FoxNews personalities, rotund, incel imbeciles like Senator Mike Lee (R-UT--he tweeted out a joke _about_ the murder, b/c that's the scum-based organism he is) and many others among the morally lost. Those with think tank titles or talk radio mics who repeat this garbage on a loop without a care. It's not just stochastic terrorism. It's violent assault set with an egg timer.
The corporate press, as usual, is asleep at the wheel. They'll debate crowd sizes, or pretend this is just more "Trump being Trump," while they bumble around trying to pretend _we can 't possibly figure out the motivation here. _Yes, it must be some kinda fucking Da Vinci Code it's so cryptic, how could one ever discover a pattern?
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/04f13b83-ad24-43f8-b8c2-85b427a5f8cb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
This isn't 2016. This is a man (thanks Merrick Garland! Feeling good right about now about you abandoned us?) with many guardrails removed, who's a pissed off, hated, convicted criminal with a grudge and the powers of the United States of America at his disposal. Not an ideal combination.
**And this violence-fetishizing he-bot is calling for paramilitary force to crush political opposition**. It's the logical end game of years of dehumanizing rhetoric--not just from Trump. He may be the worst, but Ted Cruz, Mike Huckabee, Newt Gingrich and many more odious oafs paved the way for Democrats to be "vermin," for Trump to publicly pine for the days when "protesters were carried out on stretchers."
The results are no longer theoretical. They're deadly. And they're happening regularly, you just don't hear about all the times there is a vicious attack stopped, or *only" one person is hurt or killed. The corporate media won't even bother to cover something in a super-local rural area that happens in this vein unless it's a bloodbath.
Did you hear about the guy in Virginia arrested for purposely driving his car into a crowd of No Kings protesters? Probably not, because nobody was hurt or killed.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/d0815ef6-2e7b-467d-9e88-11fa63ef2f15?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
I could find you five more incidents like this committed by right-wing nuts _just this week_. [Perhaps you remember this](https://substack.com/redirect/fa3c6c46-1565-43a6-96e5-841f940828b8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) from only two months ago?
> In yet another infected chapter in America's untreated wound that's led to MAGA madness, Cody Balmer--the suspect charged with scaling a security fence at the Pennsylvania Governor's Mansion, [breaking in and lighting a homemade incendiary device](https://substack.com/redirect/ebf83b98-8ebe-430a-858b-91a8c981f4e5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in an effort to murder Governor Josh Shapiro and his family--we again see an extremist blueprint for inspiring violence. A concept with which you may not be familiar, but we all should be: Stochastic Terrorism.
This moment demands clarity. There are no neutral corners left. Trump may think like a child playing games, but the results aren't _Space Invaders_ destroyed, but human lives. He's been laying the groundwork to dissolve democracy where he can, and deputize violence.
The 12.1 million--**yes, an incredible number, which is why we ARE going to win** -- "No Kings" marchers who showed up this weekend? We weren't just protesting a failed parade by a feeble fart-in-the-wind-of-a man. We were standing between America and the next authoritarian chapter Trump would like to impose on us.
History will ask what we did when the warning signs were screaming in neon. Let's answer that question right now.

### _**... Yo, Check This Out!**_
#### **🛑 No Kings March: Overwhelming Rejection of His Military Pageantry**
* **Millions on the streets** - Organizers say over **5 million Americans** turned out in **more than 2,000 cities** nationwide, from Seattle to Miami--even as D.C. itself saw no official protest to highlight the contrast
* **Local powerhouses emerge** - Philadelphia led with an estimated **80,000 marchers** , Chicago saw **75,000** gather, while Los Angeles drew around **200,000 protesters** --a clear rebuke to the $45 million fall-asleep spectacle in D.C.
* **Outgunning his own event** - In stark contrast, the military parade--featuring over **6,000 troops** and **100+ tanks** --pulled a far smaller crowd than the **tens of thousands in D.C.** , well short of Trump's claimed **250,000** turnout
* **A movement, not a moment** - Tech‐driven organizers from the 50501 Movement and Indivisible harnessed encrypted platforms (Signal, Discord, Reddit) to span all 50 states--pointing to a decentralized, enduring movement--not just a one‐day stunt

These figures speak volumes: while Trump's militarized birthday self-bash fizzled, the _No Kings_ march erupted into the **largest single ‐day democratic uprising in recent U.S. history**--a forceful statement that America isn't behind a king, and that people power still rules. And it spread across the globes, with marches in Berlin, Porto, Auckland and beyond!

A man dressed as a police officer, and an avid Trump supporter who's backed numerous loony right-wing causes, murdered two elected public servants. | | ---|---|--- Look back at Trump's Truth Social post again. He viciously targeted "Democrat-run cities." He elevated vigilante justice. He all but gave permission for the next Timothy McVeigh to act with impunity, with the words he wrote--and repeats on a daily basis. Much like FoxNews personalities, rotund, incel imbeciles like Senator Mike Lee (R-UT--he tweeted out a joke about the murder, b/c that's the scum-based organism he is) and many others among the morally lost. Those with think tank titles or talk radio mics who repeat this garbage on a loop without a care. It's not just stochastic terrorism. It's violent assault set with an egg timer. The corporate press, as usual, is asleep at the wheel. They'll debate crowd sizes, or pretend this is just more "Trump being Trump," while they bumble around trying to pretend we can 't possibly figure out the motivation here. Yes, it must be some kinda fucking Da Vinci Code it's so cryptic, how could one ever discover a pattern? | | ---|---|--- This isn't 2016. This is a man (thanks Merrick Garland! Feeling good right about now about you abandoned us?) with many guardrails removed, who's a pissed off, hated, convicted criminal with a grudge and the powers of the United States of America at his disposal. Not an ideal combination. And this violence-fetishizing he-bot is calling for paramilitary force to crush political opposition. It's the logical end game of years of dehumanizing rhetoric--not just from Trump. He may be the worst, but Ted Cruz, Mike Huckabee, Newt Gingrich and many more odious oafs paved the way for Democrats to be "vermin," for Trump to publicly pine for the days when "protesters were carried out on stretchers." The results are no longer theoretical. They're deadly. And they're happening regularly, you just don't hear about all the times there is a vicious attack stopped, or only" one person is hurt or killed. The corporate media won't even bother to cover something in a super-local rural area that happens in this vein unless it's a bloodbath. Did you hear about the guy in Virginia arrested for purposely driving his car into a crowd of No Kings protesters? Probably not, because nobody was hurt or killed. | | ---|---|--- I could find you five more incidents like this committed by right-wing nuts just this week. from only two months ago? In yet another infected chapter in America's untreated wound that's led to MAGA madness, Cody Balmer--the suspect charged with scaling a security fence at the Pennsylvania Governor's Mansion, in an effort to murder Governor Josh Shapiro and his family--we again see an extremist blueprint for inspiring violence. A concept with which you may not be familiar, but we all should be: Stochastic Terrorism. This moment demands clarity. There are no neutral corners left. Trump may think like a child playing games, but the results aren't Space Invaders destroyed, but human lives. He's been laying the groundwork to dissolve democracy where he can, and deputize violence. The 12.1 million--yes, an incredible number, which is why we ARE going to win -- "No Kings" marchers who showed up this weekend? We weren't just protesting a failed parade by a feeble fart-in-the-wind-of-a man. We were standing between America and the next authoritarian chapter Trump would like to impose on us. History will ask what we did when the warning signs were screaming in neon. Let's answer that question right now. `Independent Media For Just $1.32/Week!` We launched our Substack show, "Amped Up w/ Cliff Schecter." To celebrate,you get full access to Blue Amp for only $1.32 per week! G et exclusive news/truth corporate media ignores --from a former Biden ad writer & Emmy-winning MSNBC anchor who know where the bodies are buried Amplify Good.Support Indy Media! ... Yo, Check This Out! 🛑 No Kings March: Overwhelming Rejection of His Military Pageantry Millions on the streets - Organizers say over 5 million Americans turned out in more than 2,000 cities nationwide, from Seattle to Miami--even as D.C. itself saw no official protest to highlight the contrast Local powerhouses emerge - Philadelphia led with an estimated 80,000 marchers , Chicago saw 75,000 gather, while Los Angeles drew around 200,000 protesters --a clear rebuke to the $45 million fall-asleep spectacle in D.C. Outgunning his own event - In stark contrast, the military parade--featuring over 6,000 troops and 100+ tanks --pulled a far smaller crowd than the tens of thousands in D.C. , well short of Trump's claimed 250,000 turnout A movement, not a moment - Tech‐driven organizers from the 50501 Movement and Indivisible harnessed encrypted platforms (Signal, Discord, Reddit) to span all 50 states--pointing to a decentralized, enduring movement--not just a one‐day stunt These figures speak volumes: while Trump's militarized birthday self-bash fizzled, the No Kings march erupted into the largest single ‐day democratic uprising in recent U.S. history--a forceful statement that America isn't behind a king, and that people power still rules. And it spread across the globes, with marches in Berlin, Porto, Auckland and beyond! 🐱 KITTY PIC! Torchy & Rocki--more evolved at sharing resources than any MAGAs you know | | ---|---|--- 🎥 VIDEO ON DEMAND! There are the Founders. And there is Trump. name: Andy Beshear
subject: Bluntly: people-first leadership should be a no-brainer for any elected official.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by In This Together PAC
body:
As we look ahead to the elections coming up in 2025, I want you to know this, Peter: **we’re expanding our reach and investing in more races across the country to help elect leaders who will put people first — the kind of leaders who focus on results, not partisanship.**

_But expansion doesn’t mean we’re taking our foot off the gas here at home in Kentucky._ In fact, just this month, I announced a new plan to deliver universal Pre-K to every child in the Commonwealth. It’s a bold step toward giving every family — no matter their zip code or income — the chance to build a better future.

**Because when we invest in our kids, we invest in the strength and future of our state.[Chip in $5, or anything you can, to help me continue to power this work in Kentucky and nationwide. >> ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109711286/551988345/739826862?refcode=em25_250614_mm2_fndd_gq_act___AB_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_250614_mm2_fndd_gq_act___AB_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=939dbdee-ff4a-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTAzNjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTM5ZGJkZWUtZmY0YS1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ELkgp6JOUWm6y5WZfyzXYF-gCGXBVqW-sI6nzVp7tLk=)**

This is the kind of leadership Kentuckians elected me to deliver...practical, compassionate, and focused on making life better for everyone, not just a select few, and certainly not to cater to one person or one agenda.

I’ve never forgotten who I serve, and I never will. This work right here in Kentucky and in races across the country is about showing what people-first leadership looks like in action. It’s about proving that decency, common sense, and a focus on real results can and will win.

Now, I want to continue to show that kind of leadership, while helping elect more good people who will do the right thing, regardless of politics. But I can’t do it alone. Whether we’re lifting up a Kentucky family or helping a local candidate win in another state, our ability to act depends on the resources we have. [**That’s why I’m reaching out: Can I count on you to chip in toward our $15,000 mid-month fundraising goal before midnight subject: United, focused, and ready

| | | Hi there, Pete Buttigieg here. Donald Trump is showing us—in real time—what it looks like when a government leader seeks to consolidate total power. If we care about freedom—not just as a slogan, but as a lived reality—we have to support the people doing the work to protect it.
That means investing in the organizers, campaigns, and infrastructure needed to deliver results on the ground. Freedom and democracy are our greatest inheritance as Americans, but we don’t just get to comfortably sit on them—they are something we must protect and preserve, together, through action.
That’s very much what’s at stake in Nevada. Maintaining this work depends on early investments and sustained support—especially in states where democracy is being put to the test.
I am hoping to see at least 1,000 Democrats to step up by midnight—a show of force in the name of freedom, to demonstrate that we are focused, united, and ready.
**[_Please give $10—or whatever feels right to you—to the Nevada Democratic Party today._](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqu4ksFa5SF7IXH6Sr7Lz9yTXL6bWk1iRCMprVoR5FeEcA_dER2bIsG5D9lEWZ8KHOCOoKrYjQs3Y7Zg-wDJgneKjwTObuHK-QPz5yvAKnDN4lBeR1k6IWFBQV6-mFwxUSez7S6Zrs-7nLSUM-taZOSwK0L2cMcI8EfV_CThmhEQ88BnOZC7gnIGrHur-qdG-6sVY7nLV46gXCdq-MDhzFC-VqriMLMIkGCsmSDKRQiXx9r-H7y8BpL4gHpoRqA6Gwb_KQf2aO0hfXzFtAeiRimD67tsPwKs3sJxKeZUMe0sSMYGwQlKd3HWtswqcZ3f8CDY09DEkCiOhNlnxiaH1fHGsOJ3ZTLAj4kSxyZoKfH4RWqhMI18Syvx1tfKG6WLj1c/4he/XUEH5XmDQCWdJL2HkDgrJw/h5/h001.RIfqm38mBs4RDUBjSuGmH4eWCKYC0ZtW37CzLsHOPAU)**

name: Benson HQ
subject: Big news
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOCELYN BENSON FOR GOVERNOR
body:
Jocelyn is officially kicking off her first statewide tour of the campaign today!
# [](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/203?t=1&akid=418%2E181023%2EYn_MWM)
Hey folks, we have some big news to share with you:
**Jocelyn is officially kicking off her first statewide tour of the campaign today!**
In a battleground state like Michigan, you can’t take any vote for granted. Candidates running for office are expected to earn the support of Michiganders by showing up in their communities and having an honest conversation about what we need to do to move the state forward.
That’s exactly what Jocelyn is planning to do. Over the next few days, she will meet with folks all across the state to hear more about what they’re looking for in their next governor and discuss her plans to make Michigan the best place in the country to be a kid, raise a kid, and call home.
[**As Jocelyn hits the road today, she’s counting on folks like you to help her make the most of this tour and continue her conversations with Michiganders moving forward. If you can, please chip in today to help Jocelyn get her message out all across Michigan:**](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/854?c0=jmb-em-q22025.35DAUP&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250616_PM1_V1_S1&t=2&akid=418%2E181023%2EYn_MWM)

name: Gabby Giffords
subject: An attack on democracy itself
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
We can’t let people use guns to silence those with whom they disagree – regardless of party or perspective.
#

[](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-june25.m4W6Vr&refcode=em250616-1-b&t=1&akid=10587%2E3935704%2Ezje6O1)
---
Friends,
The last 72 hours have made it clear: Our work to end gun violence is far from over.
This morning, the assassin in Minnesota’s tragic Saturday shooting has been captured and awaits trial for murder. The police who located him discovered that he possessed at least three AK-47s, a 9mm handgun, and a list of names and addresses of other public officials he planned to target.
The situation remains volatile, but it is clear that this was an attack on democracy itself.
My family and I know the horror of a targeted shooting all too well. An attack against lawmakers is an attack on the foundation of our democracy. This is a problem for Democratic and Republican lawmakers alike.
**We can’t let people use guns in attempts to silence those with whom they disagree, regardless of party or perspective. The violent rhetoric that is often fueled by the gun lobby needs to stop.**
This is no room for political violence. Leaders must speak out and condemn the fomenting of violent extremism that threatens everything this country stands for.
[**Now more than ever, we must work together to build a safer future, free from gun violence, for all of our communities. If you would like to contribute to GIFFORDS PAC’s work, you can click on this link.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-june25.m4W6Vr&refcode=em250616-1-b&t=2&akid=10587%2E3935704%2Ezje6O1)

---
****
Thank you for continuing to use your voice -- and for standing with GIFFORDS.
Gabby Giffords
**Please, take a second to read this...**
Gabby Giffords has led the fight against the gun lobby for more than a decade, but she can't do it alone.
If everyone reading this donated just $17, we'd have the resources to take on the gun lobby in Congress and states across the country. But not everyone gives -- making it even more important for people who care and understand the stakes of our struggle to pitch in what they can.
If $17 seems worth it to you to change our gun laws in order to make our communities safer from gun violence, we're asking you to contribute to GIFFORDS PAC today.

name: Justice Democrats
subject: Tell State Democratic Parties to ban super PACs
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Super PACs are corrupting our politics. They funnel dark money from
billionaires and corporations into our Democratic primaries to elect
candidates who will protect the rich and exploit the working class.

But we can change this. State Democratic Parties have the power to BAN
super PACs from our primary elections and ensure the people get to choose
our candidates. [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140792?t=1002&akid=36764%2E1203867%2EAHhYWa ]Add your name to this petition urging them to do just
that!

Ever since the Supreme Court’s disastrous Citizens United decision fifteen
years ago, super PACs have taken over our political system. In the past
three election cycles, billionaire-backed interests like AIPAC and
cryptocurrency groups have spent hundreds of millions to defeat bold
progressives like Justice Democrats Jamaal Bowman and Cori Bush – and to
help install Donald Trump as president.

A report shows that just 100 billionaire families spent $2.6 billion to
influence the 2024 elections. We have to get this influence out of our
politics to deliver the bold, working-class victories our communities
deserve.

As we continue calling for Citizens United to be overturned once and for
all, we can build a party that works for us and ban billionaires from
buying Democratic primaries.

State Democratic Parties have the power to stop this corrupt spending.
Now, we must demand they use it.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140792?t=1003&akid=36764%2E1203867%2EAHhYWa ]Join Justice Democrats and progressive groups across the country in
demanding that state Democratic Parties pass resolutions banning super
PACs from influencing Democratic primaries: sign on now!

Sign On

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20250616-36764-footer&t=1004&refcode2=36764_1203867_AHhYWa&akid=36764%2E1203867%2EAHhYWa

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1005&akid=36764%2E1203867%2EAHhYWa

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: Mikie Sherrill
subject: BREAKING: Trump’s handpicked candidate is officially our general election opponent
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Ohio House Democratic Campaign Committee, 545 E Town St
body:
Jack Ciattarelli bent the knee and was rewarded.

|
---
Team, the Republican primary winner has been called — and Jack Ciattarelli, Donald Trump’s handpicked candidate for governor, has won the nomination to face off against me in the general election. [**With Trump already campaigning hard for Ciattarelli, MAGA money is going to be pouring into our opponent’s campaign from all over the country, and we can’t let ourselves get swamped. Will you help me fight back by becoming a Founding Donor with a split donation to my general election campaign and Ohio House Dems today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109711613/551989638/963696235?refcode=250616_Sherrill_Handpicked&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDI2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OTZkZGQ3Ny0wMTRiLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8x3Bm7crinP4JRREoRa0y86xQTaAuaEvaDRTRfZRhr8=) | **[DONATE>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109711616/551989639/1509077774?refcode=250616_Sherrill_Handpicked&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDI2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OTZkZGQ3Ny0wMTRiLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8x3Bm7crinP4JRREoRa0y86xQTaAuaEvaDRTRfZRhr8= "https://secure.actblue.com/")**
---
As you probably know, friend, in most elections, Trump endorses whichever candidate promises to follow his orders most blindly — and Jack Ciattarelli is no exception.
Ciattarelli _shamelessly_ begged Trump for his support. He quite literally hitched a ride on a helicopter to rush to Trump’s golf club in Bedminster to ask for the endorsement. By contrast, I flew helicopters for the U.S. Navy.
**How can we expect anyone who so willingly bends the knee to Trump during the election to EVER stand up to Trump once they take office?**
The answer, friend, is that we can’t. In fact, Ciattarelli has already promised to bring even the most disastrous elements of Trump’s agenda here to New Jersey if he wins — like DOGE, an abortion ban, and defunding Planned Parenthood.
**To me, public service is not about kissing anyone’s ring. It’s about doing what’s right and standing up for your community. I serve the people and the Constitution; Jack serves only himself.**
**But unless we build out a strong grassroots operation right from the start we’re at real risk of being swamped by Ciattarelli and Trump’s massive network of MAGA supporters and billionaire allies.**
[**Can I count on you to help me win this incredibly competitive general election and against Trump’s handpicked Republican nominee by becoming a Founding Donor and splitting $15 between our campaign and Ohio House Dems today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109711617/551989640/963696235?refcode=250616_Sherrill_Handpicked&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDI2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OTZkZGQ3Ny0wMTRiLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8x3Bm7crinP4JRREoRa0y86xQTaAuaEvaDRTRfZRhr8=)

clean_body: Jack Ciattarelli bent the knee and was rewarded. | Team, the Republican primary winner has been called — and Jack Ciattarelli, Donald Trump’s handpicked candidate for governor, has won the nomination to face off against me in the general election. = | = "" As you probably know, friend, in most elections, Trump endorses whichever candidate promises to follow his orders most blindly — and Jack Ciattarelli is no exception. Ciattarelli shamelessly begged Trump for his support. He quite literally hitched a ride on a helicopter to rush to Trump’s golf club in Bedminster to ask for the endorsement. By contrast, I flew helicopters for the U.S. Navy. How can we expect anyone who so willingly bends the knee to Trump during the election to EVER stand up to Trump once they take office? The answer, friend, is that we can’t. In fact, Ciattarelli has already promised to bring even the most disastrous elements of Trump’s agenda here to New Jersey if he wins — like DOGE, an abortion ban, and defunding Planned Parenthood. To me, public service is not about kissing anyone’s ring. It’s about doing what’s right and standing up for your community. I serve the people and the Constitution; Jack serves only himself. But unless we build out a strong grassroots operation right from the start we’re at real risk of being swamped by Ciattarelli and Trump’s massive network of MAGA supporters and billionaire allies. = | = "" | = "" | = "" | = "" Thank you so much, Mikie Sherrill = = Use of photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense. = OHDC 545 E. body:
Be part of this from day one, Peter |
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109712088/551990915/86887870?recurring=true&amount=15&refcode=WUEFE637_20250616_FOTLJuneLaunch_ALL_v1s1&sourceid=1056409&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYjhkYTFkZC0wMzRiLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bzSpTt_ToAchke9LXPFUENDgNVp_PSR6yKdyyPGXOPs=) Peter,

Let's be honest: You probably get a lot of political fundraising emails. And while fundraising is essential to powering progressive campaigns, we know that the constant flood of asks can be exhausting — especially now, when the Republican outrage machine is working overtime to overwhelm us into inaction.

That's why we want you as a **Friend of the List**! And our goal is to bring in **5,000 new Friends of the List** over the next five days.

****[**Here's how it works: Donate $15/month or more, and you'll be part of a reimagined way to support EMILYs List — one built around trust, transparency, and the long-term fight to elect Democratic pro-choice women across the country:**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109712089/551990916/86887870?recurring=true&amount=15&refcode=WUEFE637_20250616_FOTLJuneLaunch_ALL_v1s1&sourceid=1056409&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYjhkYTFkZC0wMzRiLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bzSpTt_ToAchke9LXPFUENDgNVp_PSR6yKdyyPGXOPs=)**** | [JOIN NOW](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109712090/551990917/86887870?recurring=true&amount=15&refcode=WUEFE637_20250616_FOTLJuneLaunch_ALL_v1s1&sourceid=1056409&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYjhkYTFkZC0wMzRiLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bzSpTt_ToAchke9LXPFUENDgNVp_PSR6yKdyyPGXOPs=)
---
When you join Friends of the List with a monthly donation of $15 or more, you'll get:

🛑 No more fundraising solicitations — just meaningful, carefully crafted updates on how your support is making a difference.
🛍️ Exclusive perks like free or discounted merch from the EMILYs List store.
📰 Access to our brand new EMILYs List Substack blog, where you'll find letters from our president, podcast-style candidate interviews, behind-the-scenes Q&As with EMILYs List staff, and more.
🎯 A direct role in shaping the future of the Democratic Party by helping elect pro-choice Democratic women across the country.

Most importantly, _you'll be part of a growing community that believes in fighting smarter, investing earlier, and staying focused on what matters most: taking back power and protecting our rights._

This is how we build a movement that lasts — One that outlives a news cycle, takes the lessons of 2024, and turns them into victories in 2025, 2026, and beyond.

clean_body: Be part of this from day one, Peter | = Peter, Let's be honest: You probably get a lot of political fundraising emails. And while fundraising is essential to powering progressive campaigns, we know that the constant flood of asks can be exhausting — especially now, when the Republican outrage machine is working overtime to overwhelm us into inaction. That's why we want you as a Friend of the List! And our goal is to bring in 5,000 new Friends of the List over the next five days. **= | = When you join Friends of the List with a monthly donation of $15 or more, you'll get: 🛑 No more fundraising solicitations — just meaningful, carefully crafted updates on how your support is making a difference. 🛍️ Exclusive perks like free or discounted merch from the EMILYs List store. 📰 Access to our brand new EMILYs List Substack blog, where you'll find letters from our president, podcast-style candidate interviews, behind-the-scenes Q&As with EMILYs List staff, and more. 🎯 A direct role in shaping the future of the Democratic Party by helping elect pro-choice Democratic women across the country. Most importantly, you'll be part of a growing community that believes in fighting smarter, investing earlier, and staying focused on what matters most: taking back power and protecting our rights. This is how we build a movement that lasts — One that outlives a news cycle, takes the lessons of 2024, and turns them into victories in 2025, 2026, and beyond. =** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = See you on The List! — the EMILYs List Digital team = | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Inbox overcrowded? Sign up to get less email . We'd hate to see you go, but if you want to stop receiving all email, unsubscribe . Have a question? Feel free to drop us a line at mailto:information@emilyslist.org or simply reply to this email. Contributions or gifts to EMILYs List or endorsed candidates are not tax deductible. EMILYs List P.O. Box 96612 Washington, DC 20077 United States | ---|---

name: Mazie Hirono
subject: Prioritizing True Support for Our Servicemembers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mazie Hirono For Hawaii**
body:
|
#
---
Peter, This past weekend, we witnessed the spectacle of Donald Trump's $45 million military parade, purportedly in tribute to our servicemembers. Let’s be clear: no matter how the White House tries to spin it, this was an extravagant vanity project that diverted critical resources away from where they're truly needed. It’s yet another empty gesture designed to prop up Donald Trump’s own ego. What else should we expect from a president who thinks he’s king, and does not hesitate to use our military as a political prop? Donald Trump is not a King, Peter, but his vanity parade shows that he clearly thinks otherwise. In the Senate, I am fighting to call out the lawlessness of this administration every day. But I can’t do it alone. **[Grassroots support is crucial in countering the misguided priorities showcased by Trump's recent parade. Make a contribution today, Peter, and help us remind Donald Trump that we don’t have any kings in this country, and no one is above the law.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109712109/551990938/-171743829?amount=&refcode=AU_MKH_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250616_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MmFjMjhmNy0wMzRiLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FFot0ZuLkFvRk18v02AXavHP25b-JfJyBeWEPD3O6Hw=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109712110/551990939/-1316975115?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=AU_MKH_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250616_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MmFjMjhmNy0wMzRiLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FFot0ZuLkFvRk18v02AXavHP25b-JfJyBeWEPD3O6Hw=)

clean_body: | Peter, This past weekend, we witnessed the spectacle of Donald Trump's $45 million military parade, purportedly in tribute to our servicemembers. Let’s be clear: no matter how the White House tries to spin it, this was an extravagant vanity project that diverted critical resources away from where they're truly needed. It’s yet another empty gesture designed to prop up Donald Trump’s own ego. What else should we expect from a president who thinks he’s king, and does not hesitate to use our military as a political prop? Donald Trump is not a King, Peter, but his vanity parade shows that he clearly thinks otherwise. In the Senate, I am fighting to call out the lawlessness of this administration every day. But I can’t do it alone. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thank you for standing with me. — Mazie Friends of Mazie Hirono 335 Merchant Street #677 Honolulu, HI 96809 United States mailto:info@mazieforhawaii.com | Paid for by Mazie Hirono For Hawaii

name: Gretchen Whitmer
subject: Why this fight matters
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC
body:
I’m counting on you |
#
---
Team, I know there’s a lot of chaos coming out of Washington right now — and trust me, it’s not an accident. The attacks on our rights, the endless political stunts, and the bad-faith policymaking are all meant to divide and distract us. Here in Michigan, we’re doing everything we can to hold the line. We’ve protected reproductive freedom, expanded workers’ rights, are fixing the damn roads, and fighting for every family in our great state. **But we can’t stop there. We need to do more to push progress forward, and I’m counting on you to help us do that.** We’re working to elect leaders who will protect our democracy, take bold action on climate, stand up for voting rights, and build an economy that puts working people first. We’re going beyond defending the progress we’ve made, because every person in this country deserves leaders who will fight like hell for them. **[That’s why I’m so adamant about the work we do, and why I’m hoping you’ll make a contribution to Fight Like Hell PAC before midnight tonight. name: James Carville
subject: A bellwether for the entire country
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-spanberger [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-spanberger]
I’ve seen a lot of tough races in my time, but let me tell you: this one is as important as it gets.
The Virginia Governor’s race isn’t just about the future of Virginia – it's a bellwether for the entire country. This will be the first major election after Trump’s inauguration, and it could set the stage for Democrats in 2026. If we don’t win big here, we’ll be facing a rough road ahead.
So, before I continue, can I count on you to split a contribution to Abigail Spanberger’s campaign for Governor of Virginia? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-spanberger]
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-spanberger]
Here’s what’s got me terrified:
The experts have called this race a TOSS-UP, and I couldn’t agree more. Polls are going to stay tight, and this race is going to be one of the hardest-fought in the nation. Republicans are going to flood the state with millions of dollars through their super PACs, trying to keep the Governor’s seat red. They know this race is everything to them – and we need to match their energy, their money, and their commitment. Remember, this race is the only opportunity to flip a Governor's office from red to blue in 2025.
If we don’t win this one, we’ll be handing Republicans a major victory ahead of 2026, and trust me – we can’t let that happen.
Right now, Democratic Governors are our last line of defense against the reckless policies coming out of the Trump administration, and Abigail Spanberger is the leader Virginia needs at this moment.
That’s why I’m asking you to step up today. We can’t win this without your help. The money that’s coming from the other side is going to be massive, and we need to be able to push back. Every dollar you contribute will make a difference in keeping Virginia blue and in keeping the Democrats on track for victory in 2026.
Will you contribute right now to Tim Kaine and Abigail Spanberger to help Abigail Spanberger win this race and deliver a major victory for Democrats? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-spanberger]
If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-spanberger?express_lane=true&amount=25]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-spanberger?express_lane=true&amount=50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-spanberger?express_lane=true&amount=100]
DONATE OTHER [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-spanberger]
Thank you,
James Carville
Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
1490-5A Quarterpath Road #272
Williamsburg, VA 23185

name: Ron Wyden
subject: Trump’s using our armed forces as political props
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Wyden for Senate
body:
His actions blur the lines that we depend upon to maintain freedom and liberty.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109712314/551991725/2140832878?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NTlmOGM2MS0wNTRiLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tk-1-GY5q1E-HcVvAL22bLIpRjlFyWUPfVHPGE64Obk=&emci=b1b1899a-034b-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=559f8c61-054b-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=9818364)
---

| | Last weekend, Donald Trump sent the military into a U.S. state to quash protests. He did it over the objections of state and local law enforcement – and he did it knowing it only raised the risk of escalating the situation. **But Trump doesn't care.** To him, the military is nothing but a prop to use to bolster his own political capital. Consider Trump's speech on Tuesday at Fort Bragg, in which his team _pre-screened_ service members about their views of him. Those that attended were then directed to cheer and boo on cue. (Not that Trump's ever one to care about the rules, but the U.S. military's code of conduct expressly forbids service members from engaging in partisan political activities while on active duty or in uniform). And _this_ past weekend, Trump chose to spend his birthday throwing a big military parade in D.C. This cost millions of taxpayer dollars – _after Republicans have spent months trying to justify passing their budget bill that cuts veterans' services and health care._ With the money Trump spent on this vanity project, we could provide housing and health care for veterans, make child care more affordable, and invest in new infrastructure projects. Instead, Trump wasted YOUR taxpayer dollars on a birthday party. **Coming from a man who called our country's fallen heroes "suckers and losers," the use of our armed services to stroke his ego couldn't be more insulting. It's also deeply frightening.** The men and women of the Armed Forces deserved all the recognition at the 250th anniversary of the U.S. Army. Instead, we had empty stands for a wannabe dictator trying to show off. The non-partisan structure of military command is a central cornerstone of our democracy. It protects civilians from the whims of a desperate or erratic political leader. **Trump's actions blur the lines that we depend upon to maintain freedom and liberty.** In these trying times, I renew my trust in the core American spirit that rejects wannabe-kings, that understands that freedom can't be squashed simply by threats or strongman images, and that has preserved for nearly 250 years. I will keep working to ensure it perseveres in this moment. _Ron_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Ron Wyden instantly:

Friend,

_Have you seen what 's happening in Los Angeles?!_

The city is on fire, ICE agents and local law enforcement are under attack, and Democrats are siding with the rioters.

What's happening in Los Angeles is NOT a protest. It is an entire city declaring open rebellion against American sovereignty and authority.

Frankly, I've had it.

If you burn or spit on our flag, I want you _out_ of our country.
If you're an illegal alien, I want ICE to _remove and deport_ you.
If you're an American _citizen_ who thinks Mexican culture is preferable, _please_ GET OUT.

This is a preview of our future if we DO NOT defeat Democrats.

Friend, _THIS_ is why it is CRITICAL that we Build the Red Wall now to ensure America First victories in 2026, 2028, and beyond. This craziness cannot be allowed to fester any longer.

[Please, stand with me -- stand FOR America First -- today by donating $50, $250, $500, or even just $10 to help Turning Point PAC fund new field operations in key battleground states like Arizona, Nevada, and New Hampshire! >>](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=d3951e1130724bb5a021460558810697&_e=7fVdE6lm27ySQroe5F5HVY6LyPqYtJAa5joj-CzzCyhdgwM_VPsqw_Wtm9cNMoyO9xGHpJ0wN0s7gheBWdTXFsR_5R8aaW6MIGvxl-tjYPqd7bz_NTov7JHaIzJeBbgSlrLHIGr3ExBkUmAS7qKjHbupv7QlOXCNTKknaqLutnIvEggzOVcR_N9xO6zIh1VEVbLnfqIIV4scyl-rOASmopY4AAiUPJ4jrfxFG1Gi-YIEkIMfS50n6HWpbZdidOM5JiNR2220I_L4mOH2NRN7bj5UMhQs7dHq-s3HFZ52nxe6EQwk7Cb_5ZH22EWJeBk98KnXS1mBRqt6JviF3y2QT_xNKaaoJr_esjK5aFE1Gqc%3D)

President Trump was elected to close the border and restore law and order. If we fail, our nation will be permanently populated by foreigners who hate us and owe their allegiance to another country.

As patriots, we CANNOT stand by and let this happen.

President Trump is doing his part, leading the way on mass deportations, calling for the National Guard to be deployed, and standing firm in the face of arrows being hurled toward him from every side.

Now, it's time for us to do our part...

And that starts by building a winning ground game to Build the Red Wall.

Together, we CAN take our country back, restore law and order, and rebuild our civilization around our shared _America First values_.

_**Are you with me, Friend?**_

Non-Contribution Account (For TTPAC, Inc.'s Expenditures Other Than Direct Contributions to Federal Committees)

As permitted by law, TTPAC, Inc. maintains a non-contribution account for the purpose of influencing federal, state, and local elections. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, address, occupation, and employer of individuals whose contribution exceeds $200 in an election cycle. For contributions from federal committees, corporations, and labor unions - regardless of contribution amount - federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the committee's name and address. State and local law may require us to collect and report additional information.

Contributions to this account may be used to influence federal elections by making independent expenditures in support of or in opposition to federal candidates. Additionally, in state and local jurisdictions that permit non-individual type (e.g., corporate) contributions directly to candidates and/or committees, contributions to this account may be used for both independent expenditures and direct contributions to candidates and/or committees, as permitted by state and local law.

Individuals, federal committees, corporations, and labor unions may contribute to TTPAC, Inc.'s non-contribution account without limit. Contributions by national banks, foreign nationals (without lawful permanent resident status), and other foreign entities (e.g., foreign corporations) are prohibited. Contributions to TTPAC, Inc.'s non-contribution account are not tax deductible for federal income tax purposes.

clean_body: Friend, Have you seen what 's happening in Los Angeles?! The city is on fire, ICE agents and local law enforcement are under attack, and Democrats are siding with the rioters. What's happening in Los Angeles is NOT a protest. It is an entire city declaring open rebellion against American sovereignty and authority. Frankly, I've had it. If you burn or spit on our flag, I want you out of our country. If you're an illegal alien, I want ICE to remove and deport you. If you're an American citizen who thinks Mexican culture is preferable, please GET OUT. This is a preview of our future if we DO NOT defeat Democrats. Friend, THIS is why it is CRITICAL that we Build the Red Wall now to ensure America First victories in 2026, 2028, and beyond. This craziness cannot be allowed to fester any longer. President Trump was elected to close the border and restore law and order. If we fail, our nation will be permanently populated by foreigners who hate us and owe their allegiance to another country. As patriots, we CANNOT stand by and let this happen. President Trump is doing his part, leading the way on mass deportations, calling for the National Guard to be deployed, and standing firm in the face of arrows being hurled toward him from every side. Now, it's time for us to do our part... And that starts by building a winning ground game to Build the Red Wall. Together, we CAN take our country back, restore law and order, and rebuild our civilization around our shared America First values. Are you with me, Friend? Failure is NOT an option. name: Squad Victory HQ
subject: The cruelty is the point
body:
[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/18910?refcode=em20250616-1382-foote&t=1001&akid=1382%2E342411%2E6Wthct ]Squad Victory Fund

Peter,

Donald Trump unveiled an updated version of the racist, xenophobic and
hateful travel ban from his first administration.

People from 12 countries are now completely banned from entering the
United States, and seven more face significant visa restrictions. These
countries were picked to specifically target Black and brown people and
prevent them from entering the United States.

Many of the people coming to the United States from these countries are
fleeing violence and instability. We have a moral duty to welcome them,
not turn them away because of Trump’s white supremacist agenda. Make no
mistake: this ban puts lives at risk.

This policy will also tear families apart. People with loved ones abroad
may not get the chance to see each other again because of this ban. The
cruelty from this administration is the point. They are not doing this for
safety. Instead, it’s to cause fear and do real damage to our communities.

Trump’s plan has always been clear: divide us based on our religion, race,
and nationality. We can’t let him win. We have to come together and fight
back by showing our movement for justice is stronger than their hatred.

We defeated a similar travel ban before, and we know we can do it again –
but it’s going to take all of us.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/signup/svfem20250616/?source=em20250616-1382&akid=1382%2E342411%2E6Wthct ]Can you add your name to our petition demanding Trump immediately
removes his racist travel ban? Raising our voices together is our best
chance at defeating this hateful policy.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/signup/svfem20250616/?source=em20250616-1382&akid=1382%2E342411%2E6Wthct ]Add Your Name

In solidarity,

Team Squad Victory

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.squadvictoryfund.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1382%2E342411%2E6Wthct

Paid for by The Squad Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

In addition to what’s legally required, The Squad Victory Fund does not accept contributions from: (1) corporations, associations, or their PACs; (2) individuals registered as federal lobbyists or under FARA; (3) from the PACs, lobbyists, or SEC-named executives of fossil fuel companies; or (4) from the Fraternal Order of Police.

Contributions or gifts to The Squad Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

Contributions to The Squad Victory Fund will be allocated as follows: 8.33% to each of Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, Rooted in Community Leadership PAC, Politivist PAC, and For the Children PAC.

Any contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if any contributor makes a contribution that, when allocated, would exceed the amount that the contributor may lawfully give to any participant.

After contributing to The Squad Victory Fund, you will automatically be signed up to receive email updates from Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, and Rashida Tlaib for Congress. You may of course opt-out by unsubscribing at any time.

To contribute via check, please address to The Squad Victory Fund c/o MBA Consulting Group, PO Box 15845, Washington D.C., 20003

Email us: info@squadvictoryfund.com

name: Bryan
subject: June 16 Campaign Update
body:
Here Is An Update From Our Campaign

| | | | | [|
---](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=8591ab8bca&e=e907534017)
| | | | | **June 16, 2025**
---
| Here’s an update from our campaign:
---
| | | | | This past weekend, I stopped at Dairy Breakfasts in Walworth and Kenosha Counties.
---
[|
---](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=c05a0b63a3&e=e907534017)
| Farming isn’t easy, and family farming is even harder. It's important that we have families who can pass on farming to the next generation.
---
|
---
| In Congress, I’ve partnered with President Trump to help support our family farms by passing the One Big Beautiful Bill, which will prevent a [**$10 billion**](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=c725993fb0&e=e907534017) tax increase on family farms, help our farmers compete on the world stage, and prevent a $1,500 tax increase for Wisconsin families.
---
| [Learn More About our Work](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=650c31d382&e=e907534017)
---
|
# Securing Elections and Combatting Misinformation
---
| Last week, I joined the Vicki McKenna show to talk about the work I am doing in Congress to secure our elections and how we can tackle misinformation from the Left and the legacy corporate media. You can listen to our discussion below or at the link [**here.**](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=a93b05b0b2&e=e907534017)
---
[|
---](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=7ebf969818&e=e907534017)
|
# Celebrating our Nation
On Saturday, we celebrated Flag Day, President Trump's birthday, and most importantly, the 250th Anniversary of the U.S. Army.
**Thank you to all who serve!**
---
[|
---](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=cc1a5713fe&e=e907534017)
| Founded on June 14, 1775, a year prior to the signing of the Declaration of Independence, the U.S. Army has played a pivotal role in the protection and development of the United States.
To learn more about the U.S. Army's 250 years of service and growth, you can visit their anniversary page [**here.**](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=042061f0e7&e=e907534017)
---
| **On Wisconsin,** Bryan Steil
---
| [DONATE](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=b656409d04&e=e907534017)
---

name: Mary Trump
subject: this fight is personal for me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
| Friends, I never needed political pundits or psychologists to tell me that my uncle Donald shouldn’t be anywhere near the Oval Office. I spent much of my childhood in the very house where Donald grew up. The cruel, weak, and deeply insecure man who brought our democracy to the brink of disaster is the same man I have always known. _Seeing him sworn in for a second time was an absolute gut punch._ This fight is personal for me, and as more people lose their jobs or have their rights and freedoms trampled, it’s becoming personal for them, too. **I’m committed to fighting back, but I’m under no illusion about the uphill battle we face. We need everyone to speak up.[Will you split a $25 donation between my org Democracy Defense Fund and Seth Moulton to push back against my uncle and his dangerous, hateful agenda?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109713264/551994880/-204460493?refcode=250615_MaryTrump_DDF&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMDQwNTRlYS0wNjRiLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=a-vZ0J_kT79N2tWlL7iKgwMKF6lz-S_32SgCXR_rbIw=)** I launched the Democracy Defense Fund to build a grassroots movement to secure our electoral system from Donald and the authoritarian traitors who seek to destroy it. In order to finally defeat Donald once and for all, we must:
1. _**Flip the House.** The GOP’s majority is historically small and ripe for the taking, and if we retake the House, we can put a critical check on Donald’s power._

2. _**Take Back the Senate.** We need a Democratic majority in the Senate to fight back against judicial appointments and prevent Donald from securing a generation of MAGA rule._

3. _**Take the fight to the States.** We must continue to win critical gubernatorial elections and invest in flippable down-ballot races that have the potential to push back on Donald’s dangerous agenda through state legislatures._

4. _**Win in 2025.** Virginia, New Jersey, Louisiana, and Mississippi all have important legislative elections in 2025, and both New Jersey and Virginia will also hold gubernatorial elections._

**Winning big in these races would shift the narrative of GOP dominance and give Democrats serious momentum heading into a pivotal 2026 election cycle.** [**Can I count on you to help me build and grow the grassroots network we need to fight back against Donald, Elon Musk, and the GOP? If so, please split $25 between my org Democracy Defense Fund and Seth Moulton today!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109713265/551994882/-204460493?refcode=250615_MaryTrump_DDF&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMDQwNTRlYS0wNjRiLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=a-vZ0J_kT79N2tWlL7iKgwMKF6lz-S_32SgCXR_rbIw=) In solidarity, Dr. Mary L. Trump

We've set a critical $100,000 Mid-Year fundraising goal - and we must hit it by June 30 to stay on offense. Trump and Vice President Vance are making real progress - securing the border, cutting waste, and taking on the bureaucrats head-on. But the Swamp is fighting back. The radical Left, the Deep State, and their media allies know they can 't win on ideas. So they're trying to cut us off at the knees - starting in key battleground states like Ohio. If we don 't win here, they'll use it to stop the America First agenda dead in its tracks. That's why we need you in this fight right now, Peter. This isn 't just another fundraising deadline. This is about the future of our country. If we fall behind now, we risk giving the Left the opening they've been praying for. That will be the difference between victory and defeat. name: Survey [Team MGP]
subject: Absurd & dangerous
body:
| | Peter, you’ve probably experienced this before: You’re driving along when suddenly, extremely bright headlights flood your field of vision – best case scenario, leaving you momentarily stunned, or worst case scenario, leaving you unable to see the road ahead.

**It’s not just a temporary annoyance, Peter. Overly bright LED headlights present a real danger to drivers, including rural Americans, older Americans, law enforcement, and more. The average headlights have become _twice as bright_ in recent years, with no regulation on maximum levels currently on the books.**

Marie is working to change that. She’s calling for the upcoming infrastructure bill to include maximum brightness standards that will preserve driver visibility while keeping others on the road safe.

clean_body: | | Peter, you’ve probably experienced this before: You’re driving along when suddenly, extremely bright headlights flood your field of vision – best case scenario, leaving you momentarily stunned, or worst case scenario, leaving you unable to see the road ahead. It’s not just a temporary annoyance, Peter. Overly bright LED headlights present a real danger to drivers, including rural Americans, older Americans, law enforcement, and more. The average headlights have become twice as bright in recent years, with no regulation on maximum levels currently on the books. Marie is working to change that. She’s calling for the upcoming infrastructure bill to include maximum brightness standards that will preserve driver visibility while keeping others on the road safe. Let Marie know where you stand on this issue: | | | ** | – Team MGP | | | = | Marie Gluesenkamp Perez is a fifth-generation Washingtonian, a small business owner and a pro-choice mother. As the representative for Washington’s third Congressional District, she's working to bring the voices of working people back to DC. Marie works for Washington! = Email is an important way to stay in contact but if you feel like you’re receiving too much, to only receive the most important messages. That’s the power of Jena’s leadership — and the proof that her record of standing up to Donald Trump and protecting our rights is resonating with voters across Colorado. We can’t afford to take our foot off the gas. These numbers are encouraging, but the stakes are sky-high. = = As Secretary of State, Jena stood up to MAGA extremists and protected our democracy — even after facing threats to her life. As Attorney General, she’ll continue that fight: protecting reproductive freedom, civil rights, and the Colorado way of life. name: Alex Padilla (via Democrats.org)
subject: We will not be intimidated and we will not be deterred.
body:
---
Let’s talk about what just happened, Derek: Last week, I was in the Federal Building in Los Angeles to meet with federal officials as part of my job to provide oversight and accountability of the Trump administration. While I was waiting for a scheduled briefing with General Guillot to learn more about the unprecedented military presence in Los Angeles, I learned that Secretary of Homeland Security Kristi Noem was having a press conference just down the hall. We have repeatedly asked the Trump administration for answers on the deployment of military forces and the needless escalation in Los Angeles over the last week — and have gotten limited to no information. I attended Secretary Noem’s press conference in hopes of getting some answers. After identifying myself and trying to ask a question, I was aggressively pushed out of the room, forced to the ground, and handcuffed. If that’s how this administration responds to a United States Senator with a question, imagine what they do to farm workers, day laborers, cooks, and the other nonviolent immigrants they are targeting in California and across the country. If that’s what the Trump Administration will do to a U.S. Senator with cameras broadcasting live — imagine what they’ll do to Americans when the cameras are off. **Imagine what they can do to anyone who dares to speak up.** This is a wake-up call for our nation. An attack on anyone’s rights is an attack on everyone’s rights. Derek, we will not be intimidated and we will not be deterred. We must hold this administration accountable. **[If you’re with me, I hope you’ll consider splitting a contribution between my campaign and the DNC. Right now, it’s essential that we come together to stand against Trump and his allies’ abuse of power. Each donation helps send a powerful message.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-padilla-split?amount=10&refcode=em_20250617_3746_fr&refcode2=3746_22930333_DknK4W&akid=3746%2E22930333%2EDknK4W) _If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your split contribution between Alex Padilla and the Democratic National Committee instantly:_ | | | **[Donate $10](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-padilla-split?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=em_20250617_3746_fr&refcode2=3746_22930333_DknK4W&akid=3746%2E22930333%2EDknK4W)**

We have repeatedly asked the Trump administration for answers on the deployment of military forces and the needless escalation in Los Angeles over the last week — and have gotten limited to no information. I attended Secretary Noem’s press conference in hopes of getting some answers. After identifying myself and trying to ask a question, I was aggressively pushed out of the room, forced to the ground, and handcuffed. name: GOP Cruelty Alert via Care in Action
subject: Urgent: Tell Your Senators to Vote NO on Trump’s Cruel Bill
body:
The Senate is days from voting on the Republicans’ cruel reconciliation bill.
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109713776/551996843/664783965?utm_campaign=cia_pp&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cs&ms=june-2025-senate-medicaid-letter-campaign-swap&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YThiNTdmMi0wYjRiLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OvX6ISEL0JC0DJ7JZ0vnzyDzVJZdOEDMDyp5oTiO4ro=&emci=8e72984d-f34a-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=4a8b57f2-0b4b-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=864787)
[ ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109713777/551996844/-2028182532?source=group-care-in-action-2025&referrer=group-care-in-action-2025&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fact.careinaction.us%2Fa%2Fcare-in-action-membership-2025&utm_campaign=cia_pp&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cs&ms=june-2025-senate-medicaid-letter-campaign-swap&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YThiNTdmMi0wYjRiLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OvX6ISEL0JC0DJ7JZ0vnzyDzVJZdOEDMDyp5oTiO4ro=&emci=8e72984d-f34a-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=4a8b57f2-0b4b-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=864787)
Communities across this country are terrified, Peter. Families are being torn apart as federal agents storm neighborhoods in armored vehicles. And now **Trump is deploying the military to silence neighbors standing up for their communities and loved ones.**
While this is happening in our streets – it’s made possible by what’s happening behind closed doors in Congress. The **Senate is days from voting on the Republicans’ calculated, devastating attack on families across the country.**
The GOP’s cruel reconciliation bill will strip 16 million people of their health insurance. **51,000 lives will be lost every single year as people lose access to critical healthcare** in order to pour billions more dollars into brutal detention and deportation raids like we’re witnessing in Los Angeles.
[**This is going to be a close fight. Every single email will make a difference. clean_body: The Senate is days from voting on the Republicans’ cruel reconciliation bill. Communities across this country are terrified, Peter. Families are being torn apart as federal agents storm neighborhoods in armored vehicles. And now Trump is deploying the military to silence neighbors standing up for their communities and loved ones. While this is happening in our streets – it’s made possible by what’s happening behind closed doors in Congress. The Senate is days from voting on the Republicans’ calculated, devastating attack on families across the country. The GOP’s cruel reconciliation bill will strip 16 million people of their health insurance. 51,000 lives will be lost every single year as people lose access to critical healthcare in order to pour billions more dollars into brutal detention and deportation raids like we’re witnessing in Los Angeles. Deploying the military against the residents of Los Angeles who are speaking out, attempting to strip Medicaid from millions, and supercharging funding for militarized raids in our neighborhoods and schools are all centered on one thing: creating fear and instability in our communities. Care and domestic workers, who provide essential support for families and help make all other work possible, are bearing the brunt of these attacks. We WILL NOT stand by and let Republicans in Congress get away with it – and right now we have a crucial opening to block this dangerous bill: a handful of Republican Senators are already publicly uneasy with the bill. Now is the time to seize this moment and send the Senate a clear, overwhelming message: reject this cruel attack on our communities and vote ‘no.’ We have fought too long and too hard to allow this heartless bill to unravel our care infrastructure, hurt hardworking domestic workers, and rapidly scale up inhumane attacks on immigrants. So, let’s come together once again to show that an attack on one of us is an attack on us all. Thanks for all you do, The Care in Action Team

name: Deb Haaland
subject: Every 8 years this happens. It can’t happen again.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO
body:
Rush a donation before midnight.
# [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/133?t=1&akid=2645%2E400544%2EacW3md)
Hi again,
Our campaign’s fundraising hit a rough patch this month, and we set a goal to bring in **10,000 donations before midnight tonight** to help us turn things around.
**Here’s why this moment right now matters so much:**
1. **Trump and MAGA billionaires are watching.** They’re ready to pour millions into this race to flip our state red, and we’re hearing rumors that a self-funded Republican could jump in any day now.

2. **Every eight years, New Mexico’s governorship switches parties.** For about 20 years, control of the governor’s office has shifted between parties every two terms. That means we’re running directly into the headwinds of history — and the GOP knows it.

3. **Our end-of-quarter deadline is coming up quickly.** The strength of our grassroots support will determine how much we can organize across New Mexico this summer.

**[We can’t fall behind now. If I can count on you, will you rush a donation of any amount before midnight?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250616_2_mm?amount=5&refcode=em20250616-2645&refcode2=2645_400544_acW3md&akid=2645%2E400544%2EacW3md)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250616_2_mm?amount=5&refcode=em20250616-2645&refcode2=2645_400544_acW3md&akid=2645%2E400544%2EacW3md)**
Be fierce,
Deb
